title: Closing Analyst (Remote)
description:
We help Americans buy profitable businesses so they can build real wealth and escape the corporate 9–5 grind. We're a fast-growing, detail-driven remote team that values ownership and execution.



Our core values are Team-First Performance, Perfect Professionalism, and Mastery Through Feedback. We move with urgency, hold high standards, and improve continuously.



As a Closing Analyst, you own the final mile of execution. You manage documentation, lender coordination, compliance reviews, and deadlines to ensure deals move from signed offers to close without friction. This isn’t administrative follow-up. It’s precision, accountability, and protecting the integrity of every transaction.



About the Role



We’re looking for a sharp, proactive analyst to drive execution from signed LOI to close. You’ll oversee closing workflows, handle documentation quality control, manage lender and legal communication, and step in across diligence, underwriting, and final approvals to keep deals moving. You don’t wait for issues to escalate. You identify blockers early and push transactions across the finish line.



Results / Success Metrics

Deals submitted accurately and on time, consistently meeting SLAs

Clean, audit-ready documentation and deal folders

Clear, proactive communication with lenders and internal teams

Minimal rework due to documentation or compliance issues

Timely resolution of risks, blockers, or process gaps





Responsibilities

Coordinate deal closings, managing documentation, tracking lender requirements, and ensuring submission readiness

Monitor and prioritize lender, legal, and financial communications; address inquiries and resolve documentation gaps

Track and manage critical deal deadlines using shared timelines to ensure timely approvals and responses

Maintain organized and compliant deal folders in Google Drive and Notion, including proper file naming, version control, and retention standards

Conduct compliance reviews of active SBA 7(a) loan packages against SBA and lender guidelines

Update financial models, reconcile P&Ls and balance sheets, and finalize projections as needed

Lead deal kick-off calls and lender intro calls independently after onboarding

Own daily cadence calls and ongoing deal-related communications

Proactively flag risks, challenges, and process improvement opportunities to improve deal execution efficiency

Requirements

1+ year of related experience in lending operations, M&A, or deal execution

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

Ability to manage multiple deals simultaneously in a fast-paced environment

Clear, professional written and verbal communication

Financial literacy with P&Ls, balance sheets, and projections

Experience with loan documentation, SBA 7(a), or lending operations preferred

Proficient with Google Workspace and documentation tools

Comfortable working independently and taking full ownership of assigned deals



Nice to Have

Experience with Notion, Slack, Google Calendar, or other collaboration tools

Background in startups or fast-growing teams

Why Join Us

Fully remote work setup

Collaborative and supportive team environment

Opportunity to grow with a scaling organization

Meaningful impact on deal execution and building strong teams

title: Admin Assistant
description:

Are you a customer service pro with a knack for sales? Do you love turning leads into loyal customers? Our fast-growing snow removal & lawn care company is looking for a tea
mber to handle client communication, close deals, and keep our operations running smoothly year-round.



What You’ll Do



Client Communication & Sales (Top Priority)

- Answer incoming chats,
s, and phone inquiries quickly and professionally

- Upsell and cross-sell both lawn care & snow removal services—every lead is an opportunity

- Handle objections and close more deals by providing clear, value-driven solutions



Estimating & Follow-Ups

- Send out quotes fast, always offering both lawn care & snow removal options

- Proactively follow up on pending estimates to convert leads into paying customers

- Use Google Maps to measure square footage.



Invoicing & Payments

- Follow up on overdue invoices and ensure timely collections

- Generate new invoices as needed

- Take credit card payments over the phone, making it easy for customers to say yes



What We’re Looking For

- A sales-driven mindset—you’re not just answering calls, you’re closing deals!

- Strong communication and persuasion skills

- Willingness to learn

- Ability to multitask, stay organized, and think like a salesperson

- Previous experience in lawn care, snow removal, home services, or a fast-paced sales environment is a plus

If you love helping customers, closing sales, and keeping things running smoothly, we want you on our team.



To Apply please indicate "GREENSCENE Office Tea
mber" in your Subject Line.

title: Operations & Creator Support Assistant
description:
We are an ultra-high-volume content production house producing 40,000+ videos a year across Gaming, Mobile, and Software niches. We are looking for a reliable, process-driven Operations Assistant to manage our "supply chain" of content and creators.



You will be the glue that holds our production pipeline together—handling everything from AI-assisted data processing and forum marketing to minor technical maintenance.



Wage / Salary

Rate: $7.00 USD per hour.



Hours: 12-16 hours per week.



Schedule: Monday, Wednesday, Friday | 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM UK Time (4:00 PM – 8:00 PM Manila Time).



Key Responsibilities

Creator & Pipeline Management: This is the core of the role. You will assist in "keeping the engine running" by processing incoming videos from our creators, ensuring strict naming conventions are met, and moving files through our storage pipeline.



AI-Assisted Data Entry: Use Gemini and ChatGPT to handle high-volume, repetitive data tasks. You will be responsible for organizing and filling out our massive SEO keyword and metadata databases.



Forum Marketing & Outreach: Use our provided templates to post on gaming forums. You will engage with the community, reply to threads, and invite prospective members to join our 
.



Minor Technical Maintenance: Once a week (approx. 1 hour), you will perform scheduled updates and maintenance on our Minecraft servers. This is a strictly process-driven task, and full training will be provided.



Skills & Requirements

Extreme Attention to Detail: In a factory producing 300 videos a day, one small error in a filename or a keyword can break the system. You must be obsessive about accuracy.



AI Literacy: Experience using ChatGPT or Gemini to automate or speed up administrative workflows.



Technical Comfort: While you don't need to be a developer, you should be comfortable following a technical SOP to manage a server console or edit a config file. (If you don't have this experience, then do not worry.)



Native-Level English: Exceptional written & spoken English is required for forum marketing and communicating with our creator team.



Reliability: Ideally a backup power supply / mobile hotspot incase Typhoon season is an issue for you.



How to Apply

Start your application with the word: "ENGINE".



Confirm you are available during the specific UK hours mentioned (9 AM - 2 PM GMT/BST).



Briefly mention your experience using AI tools like ChatGPT or Gemini for work 7 anything else you believe may make you stand out as an applicant.



Attach a screenshot of your latest SpeedTest.net result.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Company: McNeil Creative Enterprises

Location: Remote 

Hours: Up to 10 hours per week (must overlap with 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Eastern Time, U.S.)

Compensation: Competitive hourly rate (based on experience)



About the Role:

McNeil Creative Enterprises (MCE) is seeking a highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented Executive Assistant to support the Founder and leadership team. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced, high-accountability environment and can manage logistics with precision and professionalism.



You will play a critical role in ensuring that scheduling, coordination, travel, and communication run smoothly so leadership can remain focused on strategic priorities.



Key Responsibilities:

Calendar Management: Coordinate and manage a dynamic calendar, including scheduling internal and external meetings across multiple time zones; own calendar accuracy and integrity at all times, ensuring all details are correct the first time



Inbox Management: Monitor, organize, and support
 correspondence; flag priorities, draft responses, and maintain a clear, prioritized, and well-managed inbox



Scheduling Coordination: Communicate with clients, partners, and tea
mbers to secure meeting times and confirm logistics



Travel Planning: Research and book flights, accommodations, and transportation; prepare clear and organized travel itineraries



Meeting Preparation: Ensure meetings are properly scheduled with accurate links, agendas, and relevant materials



Communication Support: Draft and send clear, professional
 correspondence as needed



Administrative Support: Assist with light operational tasks to keep workflows organized and on track



Required Qualifications:

1. Reliable internet and a professional remote work setup

2. Fluent in English (written and verbal) with strong, professional communication skills

3. Proven experience as an Executive Assistant, Virtual Assistant, or similar role

4. Exceptional organizational skills and attention to detail

5. Demonstrated track record of reliable execution and follow-through (meeting deadlines, minimizing errors, and closing loops without reminders)

6.Strong writing skills with a high level of accuracy and minimal to no typographical or grammatical errors in written communication

7. Ability to manage multiple priorities and work independently with minimal oversight

8. Comfortable working within Eastern Time (U.S.) hours overlap

9. Comfortable managing up in a fast-paced environment, including keeping leadership organized, surfacing priorities, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks

10. High level of professionalism, discretion, and reliability



Preferred Qualifications:

-Experience supporting senior executives or founders

-Familiarity with tools such as Google Workspace (Calendar, Gmail, Docs), Zoom, and project management platforms (e.g., Asana)

-Experience coordinating across teams and external stakeholders

-Comfortable working within structured systems and processes (calendar protocols, scheduling workflows, and task tracking)



Work Expectations

-Availability to work up to 10 hours per week in pre-agreed, structured time blocks within 9 AM – 6 PM ET

-Strong responsiveness and communication during working hours

-Consistent accuracy with time zone coordination and conversions across regions

-High standard for written communication, with clear, polished, and error-free
s and materials

-Ability to anticipate needs, problem-solve, and execute tasks efficiently

-Commitment to accuracy—details matter in this role



What Success Looks Like in This Role:

-The calendar runs smoothly with minimal back-and-forth

-Meetings are scheduled accurately the first time (correct links, time zones, and participants)

-The inbox is organized, prioritized, and easy to navigate

-Travel is organized, clear, and stress-free

-Tasks are completed with strong follow-through, without the need for repeated reminders

-Leadership can trust that priorities are being managed and surfaced proactively



How to Apply:



Please submit:

-A brief introduction outlining your relevant experience

-Your resume

-A short example of a calendar you’ve managed or a scheduling scenario you’ve handled



Application Requirement (Important):

Include the phrase “Calendar is strategy” in your subject line and briefly describe how you prioritize conflicting meeting requests. Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Additional Information



This role will begin with a short trial period to ensure strong alignment and execution.

This role requires a high level of attention to detail and consistency in execution.

title: Motivated Cold Caller
description:
We are a marketing agency that helps electricians and concrete contractors get more clients through paid advertising. We are growing fast and need a dedicated cold caller to book discovery calls with business owners across the United States.



This is a long-term, full-time role. We are not looking for someone to test for a week — we want to find the right person and build something together. If you are disciplined, competitive, and love talking to people, this role will suit you well.



Your one job: Call business owners (electricians and concrete contractors) from a list we provide, follow a proven script, and book 20-minute discovery calls for our agency owner. You are not closing deals — you are starting conversations.



What you will do every day:

--Make 80–120 outbound calls per day to US-based trade businesses

--Follow a provided script and handle common objections confidently

--Log every call outcome in a shared Google Sheet or simple CRM

--Book qualified discovery calls directly into the agency owner's calendar

--Send follow-up messages (text or
) to warm leads who asked for more info

--Join a short daily check-in call (15 minutes) to review the previous day's results



What we are looking for:

>At least 1 year of outbound cold calling or BPO experience — this is required

>Clear, confident English with a neutral or easily understood accent

>Comfortable calling business owners who may be skeptical or busy

>Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace

>Available to work US business hours (Eastern or Central time preferred)

>Self-motivated — you hit your daily call targets without being chased

>Experience with Google Sheets, Calendly, or any basic CRM is a plus



What we provide

A proven, word-for-word call script with objection responses

A daily call list — you will never have to find your own leads

A US phone number to call from (so it shows as a local number)

Training and feedback on your calls during the first two weeks

A clear target: X booked calls per week so you always know what success looks like



Stand out with your application:



Please record a 60–90 second voice or video introduction telling us: (1) your cold calling background, (2) one objection you have handled well in the past and how you handled it, and (3) why you want this role. Applications without a recording will not be reviewed. We want to hear your voice — that is the job.



Shortlisted candidates will be asked to do a short paid trial — we will give you a script, a list of 20 numbers, and ask you to make calls while we listen in. This takes about two hours and you will be compensated for your time regardless of the outcome.

Market Resonance: Apply a deep understanding of skincare trends and feminine aesthetics to every frame.



What You Bring



1+ Years Experience: Proven track record in eCommerce video editing (Direct Response/UGC/VSL).

Note: This is an advanced role.

title: Full-Time Remote Professional Assistant (US based company)
description:
Job Title: Full-Time Remote Professional Assistant (US based company)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Salary: $9/hour (~$1,440/month for 40 hours/week)

Schedule: Full-time, 3:00 PM – 11PM US Eastern Time (3:00 AM – 11:00 AM Philippine Time), Monday to Friday



About Us:

We are a remote digital marketing agency called Platform Marketing, specializing in
 and Google Ads for 
, helping them generate seller and buyer leads, and producing their branding content. Our team includes talented Filipino and US based professionals who work remotely, delivering exceptional results for our mostly US and some Canada clients. We’re excited to grow our team with another dedicated Professional Assistant who shares our commitment to excellence.





To apply, include the phrase “Realtor Marketing” in the subject line of your application
 or the top of your response message.





Job Overview:

As a Professional Assistant, you’ll be primarily working with our Account Managers, and sometimes
ing US based clients when you need more details. You will be doing various tasks including: managing
 inboxes, queuing client projects for our Editing team to claim and complete, performing tasks related to HighLevel CRM, and some other tasks to support out Account Management team. This is a full-time remote position requiring strong communication skills and a proactive attitude.





Key Responsibilities:

Respond promptly and professionally to Account Managers during your work hours, and to clients when needed, ensuring high satisfaction for our realtor clients.



Use 
 for creating project assignments for other tea
mbers to claim and complete, and for keeping track of your own tasks and deadlines.



Use HighLevel CRM to update client records/site links, and set up basic sites and automations for client workflows.

Escalate complex issues to senior tea
mbers and follow up to ensure resolution.

Maintain accurate records of customer interactions and report common issues to improve processes.



Requirements:

3 years of experience in virtual assistance with experience in a customer service or a customer-facing role, preferably remote with US or Canada clients.

Moderate understanding of Meta Ads (e.g., navigating ads manager dashboards, understanding the interface, and basic campaign monitoring and set up).

Familiarity with HighLevel CRM or similar platforms (e.g., managing leads, basic automation setup, updating links, etc.,).

Excellent written and verbal English skills (near-native fluency) to communicate effectively with US employees and US/Canada clients

Reliable internet connection (minimum 10 Mbps) and a quiet, professional workspace.

Ability to work 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM US Eastern Time (3:00 AM – 11:00 AM Philippine Time).

Strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and a proactive attitude.

Must provide your own computer and necessary software (we’ll provide access to specific tools as needed).

As part of your application, include a screenshot of your internet speed test (showing download and upload speeds) taken within the last 24 hours.



Nice-to-Haves:

Prior experience in digital marketing or ad operations, especially for real estate clients.

Knowledge of HighLevel CRM or other CRMs (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce).

Experience with remote collaboration tools like Slack, Monday, Asana, or Trello.



What We Offer:

Competitive starting pay of $9/hour (~$1,440/month for 40 hours/week).

10 days of paid time off (PTO) per quarter to support work-life balance.

$50/month health stipend toward private health insurance (with verified receipt).

Weekly pay via Wise or PayPal for reliable and timely compensation.

13th-month pay disbursed in late November each year.

Stable, long-term remote work with a supportive team of Filipino and global colleagues.

Opportunity to grow your skills in digital marketing and customer relationship management.

Performance-based bonuses (to be discussed after onboarding and training).



How to Apply:

Please reply to this job posting, and include the phrase “Realtor Marketing” in the subject line of your application
 or the top of your response message. Submit your resume, a brief explanation why you’re a great fit for this role, and a short video or audio recording (1-4 minutes) describing why you’re the ideal candidate for this position. Include any relevant experience with Meta ads, HighLevel CRM, virtual assistant, or customer support, especially with American or real estate clients. Shortlisted candidates will be invited for an interview to assess communication skills and technical fit.



Apply via response to this job posting.

title: Zoho Specialist
description:
Join Our Growth Journey: Zoho CRM & Campaigns Specialist (Remote, Flexible Hours)



About Us



We’re a fast-growing, forward-thinking company based in Vancouver, BC — but our team is spread far and wide. Innovation, integrity, and continuous improvement aren’t just words on a wall for us — they’re how we work and grow every day. We’re looking for someone who shares our mindset and knows how to bring Zoho CRM and Zoho Campaigns to life in ways that truly move the needle.



Why This Role Is Exciting?



If you're a Zoho whiz who loves building systems that actually make a difference — this is your 
nt. We’re offering a flexible, part-time or project-based opportunity where your ideas are valued, your skills are trusted, and your schedule is respected.



We’re not just looking for someone to “keep the lights on.” We want a partner to help us unlock the full potential of Zoho, streamline our sales and marketing workflows, and ensure that we’re always one step ahead in how we engage with our customers.



What You'll Do



>>> Customize & optimize Zoho CRM to support our evolving business needs

>>> Design and manage
 campaigns using Zoho Campaigns that actually get results

>>> Analyze CRM data to help us better understand our customers and their journeys

>>> Train and support our internal team so everyone can thrive using Zoho tools

>>> Troubleshoot, configure, build, and refine—you're the go-to Zoho expert

>>> Recommend smarter ways to use dashboards, workflows, integrations, SMS/email campaigns and more



What We're Looking For



- Hands-on experience with Zoho CRM and Zoho Campaigns (customization is your jam)

- Strategic thinker who loves turning messy processes into clean, scalable systems

- Comfortable working independently and communicating clearly in a remote environment

- Familiarity with tools like Asana (or other project management software)

- Someone who genuinely enjoys sharing knowledge and helping others get the most out of their tools



Perks & Benefits



- Flexible hours — work when you’re most productive

- Remote-first culture — work from anywhere

- Competitive pay (part
 basis)

- Potential for long-term collaboration and future projects

- A small, nimble, and supportive team that values your input



How to Apply:



We want to get to know you more, please send us:



- Your updated resume

- 1-minute introduction video that tells us:

- Your experience with Zoho CRM and Zoho Campaigns, especially around buildouts

- Your availability (we’re looking for someone to contribute 5–10 hours/month)



Whether you feel confident reviewing our existing Zoho setup and offering expert guidance on ways to improve (e.g., dashboards, automations, integrations, campaigns, etc.)



Let’s build something great together. If you're excited to leave a real impact and love making systems sing, we can’t wait to meet you.

We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, and partitions.



Our commitment to delivering the best value property maintenance has established us as a reliable partner for residential and commercial clients nationwide. With decades of experience, including 50 years of expertise in garage conversions, we pride ourselves on impeccable craftsmanship, turning our clients' visions into reality while ensuring their properties remain in top condition.



Role Overview

 Management: Handle professional

mbers

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
About Juniper

Juniper is a grant consulting agency built on a simple belief: when organizations are strong from the inside out, that strength ripples into the communities around them. We work with changemakers — nonprofits, advocates, and mission-driven teams — to simplify the grant process so they can spend less time on paperwork and more time on the work that actually matters.

We care deeply about the health of people, communities, and the planet. Learn more: 



The Role

We're looking for a proactive, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support grant research, communications, and light content work. We want someone who takes ownership, thinks ahead, and genuinely cares about the mission. This role starts part-time with real potential to grow into a full-time position if we find the right person. We're looking for someone who wants to be part of a real team, not just work in the background. You'll be included in tea
etings, introduced on our website, and treated as a full member of our organization. We want you to feel like you truly belong here.

You'll work closely with our Executive Assistant and Operations Business Manager as part of a small, remote team.



What You'll Do

Research grant opportunities and evaluate funder fit for clients

Review 990s and funder documents to assess alignment

Build grant skeletons and support lead researchers with preliminary materials

Verify data accuracy across grant documents and databases

Support inbox and communications management

Flag gaps or inefficiencies before they become problems

Contribute to content or design drafts if that's in your wheelhouse (bonus, not required)

And more! (We’re growing, adding new things, shifting roles. More importantly though, we like to find out what people are good at, what makes them get in the “zone” and lean into that).



Who We're Looking For

- Highly organized and self-directed (you manage your own workload without needing reminders)

- Strong research skills with sharp attention to detail

- Excellent written and spoken English is a must — we'll be giving priority to applicants with a C2 (Advanced/Mastery) proficiency rating, as this role involves grant research, writing, and possibly direct client communication.

- Genuinely excited about Juniper's mission (nature, climate, equity, and systems change)

- Experience working with neurodivergent/ADHD clients (or at least a demonstrated understanding that our communication style may be nonlinear, and the flexibility to work with that rather than against it.)

- Experience with ClickUp and/or Airtable is a plus (training available)

- Design or content creation skills are a bonus



We use AI tools thoughtfully in our work, and we're happy to work with someone who does too. But what matters more to us is someone who writes and communicates well on their own, someone who helps us stay human in the work we put out into the world.



A good fit is someone who feels the urgency of the polycrisis and wants to support work that actually moves the needle. You're committed to a workspace that is safe and inclusive across gender identity, cultural background, religious belief, and neurodiversity.

 what content gets posted daily based on what performs

This role is ideal for someone with deep Pricelabs experience who can keep calendars full, strengthen occupancy, and maximize revenue while providing reliable support during the night shift (EST).





Key Responsibilities:

-Adjust nightly rates, minimum night stays, orphan-night strategies, and last-minute discounts based on market demand.

-Review pricing alerts daily and apply intelligent adjustments.

-Perform competitive analysis using market dashboards and comp-set reviews.

-Track occupancy trends and identify revenue opportunities across the portfolio.

-Ensure pricing calendars remain fully optimized 30, 60, and 90 days out.

-Communicate proactively with leadership about revenue changes, occupancy risks, and pricing strategies.



2. Guest Support (EST Night Shift)

-Provide timely, professional guest communication across Airbnb, VRBO, Hostaway, and OpenPhone during overnight EST hours.

-Assist with reservation questions, troubleshooting, guest verifications, and after-hours issues.

-Coordinate next-day cleaning or maintenance needs when required.



3. Owner & Financial Operations Support

-Assist in preparing monthly Owner Statements.

-Draft client invoices for property owners.

-Review and manage Stripe disputes, gather evidence, and submit organized responses.

-Maintain accurate records and update information in Hostaway, Breezeway, and internal dashboards.







Qualifications



Required

-Hands-on experience with Pricelabs (non-negotiable).

-Strong understanding of dynamic pricing, occupancy strategy, and revenue optimization.

-Experience using STR platforms (Airbnb, VRBO) and PMS systems.

-Excellent English written and verbal communication skills.

-Must be able to work overnight EST hours consistently.



 Preferred

-Previous employment at Airbnb, VRBO, a PMS company, or an STR management company.

-Knowledge of Hostaway, Breezeway, Stripe, and Google Sheets.

-Prior customer service experience.

-Experience handling invoices, owner statements, or payment disputes.



Working Hours

Night shift aligned with EST timezone: 8 hours per day, 5–7 days per week.

Must be comfortable supporting pricing and guests during EST overnight hours.





How to Apply

Your subject line MUST be formatted exactly like this or your application will not be considered:

“Green Pigeon: Your First Name + Your Last Name”

title: Senior Estimator – QC / Reviewer
description:
Blitz Contractor Solutions is looking for a Senior Estimator (QC / Reviewer) to lead the review and quality control of all estimating outputs. This role is focused on ensuring accuracy, completeness, and consistency across takeoffs, cost builds, and final estimates.



Role Overview



You will be responsible for reviewing estimates before submission—validating quantities, scope coverage, pricing logic, and overall structure. This is a high-responsibility role that directly impacts bid quality and overall performance.



This role is not focused on doing takeoffs—you are responsible for checking, correcting, and improving the work of the team.



Key Responsibilities

- Review quantity takeoffs for accuracy and completeness

- Validate scope coverage against drawings and specifications

- Identify missing scope, overlaps, and inconsistencies

- Review cost build-ups (labor, materials, subcontractor pricing)

- Ensure estimates follow structured templates and standards

- Flag risks, assumptions, and unclear scope early

- Provide clear, actionable feedback to estimators

- Maintain consistency across all estimate outputs

- Support final bid reviews prior to submission



Skills & Requirements

- 5+ years experience in construction estimating

- Strong exposure to US and/or Canada construction projects

- Proven experience reviewing or leading estimates

- Ability to read and interpret full drawing sets and specifications

- Strong understanding of scope breakdown, cost structures, and pricing logic

- High attention to detail and ability to catch errors quickly

- Experience with PlanSwift and/or Bluebeam

- Ability to manage multiple estimates under deadlines

- Strong communication—clear, direct, and structured feedback



What We’re Looking For

- Someone who can quickly identify gaps in scope, quantities, and pricing

- Someone who works with structure and process, not guesswork

- Someone who can improve team output, not just review it



Work Setup

- Full-time, remote role

- Requires dedicated availability (no concurrent full-time roles)

- Must be responsive and able to work within a structured workflow



Application Requirement (Mandatory)



To be considered, candidates must submit:

- Submit 1–2 full estimates (preferably US/Canada residential) with a quantity takeoff summary, cost breakdown (labor, materials, subcontractors), and a clear, organized structure by scope. For one sample, include a brief QC / review explanation outlining how you validated quantities, checked scope completeness, verified pricing logic, and identified key risks or assumptions. Applications without samples and explanation will not be reviewed.



Selected candidates may also be given a short QC test to identify issues within a sample estimate.

title: Amazon Image and Design Specialist
description:
About the Role



We are seeking an experienced Amazon-focused Visual Designer to create high-converting product images for our luxury brand portfolio. Our products are design-led (e.g., premium plates and tabletop items) where aesthetic appeal, heritage, craftsmanship, and brand storytelling drive purchasing decisions, not as much the technical features or functionality.



We need a designer who understands how to visually communicate desirability, quality, brand love, emotional connection, and luxury positioning on Amazon. We have thousands of images to produce, so efficiency and AI-powered workflow expertise are required .



 



 



Key Responsibilities



Design Amazon-compliant product listing images (main images, lifestyle, A+ content, infographics where appropriate).

Translate brand identity, heritage, and craftsmanship into compelling, emotional, visual narratives.

Create imagery that elevates perceived value and reinforces luxury positioning.

Develop scalable, AI-assisted workflows to produce large volumes of high-quality images efficiently.

Ensure all assets meet Amazon image guidelines and optimize for conversion.

Maintain visual consistency across multiple SKUs and collections that match the brand vibe

 



Required Experience



Proven experience designing product images specifically for Amazon marketplace listings.

Demonstrated work with luxury, premium, or heritage-driven brands.

Experience marketing design-led products (homeware, décor, tabletop, fashion, beauty, lifestyle brands, etc.) where emotional appeal outweighs technical features.

Advanced proficiency with AI image-generation tools and automation workflows to produce high-volume content quickly.

Deep understanding of conversion-focused visual strategy for Amazon.

 



 



Ideal Candidate



Understands the psychology of premium buyers, how they shop, where they research (example social media)

Can visually communicate craftsmanship, legacy, and exclusivity.

Balances brand integrity with marketplace performance.

Highly organized and able to manage large-scale asset production.

Can work independently but also within boundaries of a larger system

title: Amazon Listing Specialist (Flat File Expert)
description:
We’re looking for a highly detail-oriented Amazon Listing Specialist with 2+ years of hands-on experience creating and maintaining Amazon listings with a strong knowledge of Amazon flat files (inventory file templates) who can confidently navigate complex category requirements (including regulated attributes like UL compliance in Lighting) and push listings live accurately and consistently.



If you’re the type of person who won’t stop until the data is correct, all the applicable fields are filled in (for maximum Amazon exposure), and the listing is fully compliant, this role is for you.





What You’ll Own:



Amazon Listing Creation & Optimization (Flat File Heavy)



Build new listings using flat files, completing all applicable attributes.

Know the difference between required vs. recommended vs. optional fields and fill them appropriately.

Understand when to use Amazon Valid Values vs. when custom entries are appropriate (and how to format them correctly).

Create and maintain variation structures (parent/child), ensuring clean, logical relationships.

 



Category Complexity for example Compliance (Lighting & Beyond)



Handle harder categories (e.g., Lighting) with additional compliance and attribute requirements.

Accurately input certification/compliance-related attributes (e.g., UL, safety claims, etc.) per Amazon policy and category rules.

Interpret category templates and adapt to different attribute needs across multiple categories.

 



Troubleshooting ,  Seller Support Case Management



Open Amazon cases that get useful, actionable answers (not copy-paste responses).

Be persistent: escalate, reframe, and follow up until the issue is resolved and the listing is live.

Diagnose errors/warnings in flat file uploads and resolve issues efficiently.

 



Quality Assurance



Spot-check live listings after upload to ensure every field populated correctly (titles, bullets, attributes, variations, compliance fields, etc.).

Catch missing attributes, suppressed listings, browse node issues, mismatched valid values, and formatting errors

Ensure that ALL fields are filled in to maximize Amazon exposure and Rufus understanding of our listing

 



Additional Amazon Ops Tasks as applicable



Inventory updates, price updates, and Amazon-related reporting tied to listing and catalog projects.

Support ongoing catalog maintenance and data updates as the Amazon business scales.

 



What We’re Looking For 



Required



2+ years Amazon listing experience with flat files

Strong understanding of:

Required vs. recommended fields

Valid values, attribute formatting, and template logic

Troubleshooting upload errors and feed processing results

Demonstrated ability to work through Amazon support to get real solutions.

Extremely detail-oriented, organized, and persistent.

Comfortable asking questions when stuck, and proactive about finding answers either through opening Amazon cases or internal company support

Strong excel skills to handle thousands of skus at a time – organizing, filtering, sorting data at speed

Works well independently but also part of a larger team!

title: JUNIOR/MID-LEVEL WORDPRESS & JAVASCRIPT DEVELOPER
description:
JUNIOR/MID-LEVEL WORDPRESS & JAVASCRIPT DEVELOPER

Studio SWEAT onDemand | Remote | Contractor | Part-Time with Growth Path | $25/hr + bonus



---



ABOUT US



**VIDEO INTRO IS REALLY IMPORTANT TO US :)



Studio SWEAT onDemand (SSoD) is a subscription-based online fitness platform built for people who want real workouts on their schedule: spin, strength, HIIT, yoga, and more. We serve a growing community of members through our web platform and native apps, and we partner with corporate wellness programs and gyms around the country.



We're a small, focused team running a real product at real scale. No enterprise bureaucracy, no bloated processes. Just a tight-knit group solving practical problems and building something people genuinely use every day.



---



THE ROLE



We're looking for a dependable, execution-focused developer to take on a meaningful share of our day-to-day platform work. Our infrastructure runs on a heavily customized WordPress stack, and there's a significant amount of maintenance, debugging, and incremental improvement work that needs consistent, capable hands.



This role exists so our Lead Developer can focus more on architecture, strategy, and our upcoming platform evolution. You'll work closely with them, getting clear direction, real context, and quick feedback.



We're planning a transition toward a modern JavaScript-driven architecture over the next 12-24 months. If you're strong in WordPress today but excited about growing into modern JS work, this is a role where that progression happens naturally.



One non-negotiable: we are an AI-native team. We expect you to already be using tools like Cursor, Claude Code, or GitHub Copilot as a core part of how you work, not as an experiment you're considering. If that's not already your workflow, this probably isn't the right fit.



This is not a senior architect position. It's the right fit for a strong junior-to-mid level developer who does solid work, communicates clearly, and wants room to grow.



---



WHAT YOU'LL WORK ON



In the near term:

- Debugging and fixing issues in production: WordPress site, custom plugins, and REST API integrations

- Maintaining and improving custom PHP plugins and our WordPress theme

- Implementing small features and enhancements based on internal priorities

- QA and regression testing after changes

- Working with third-party APIs and service integrations

- Maintaining technical documentation as the codebase evolves

- Supporting internal tooling and developer utilities

- Backlog work that hasn't had bandwidth: unit tests, code cleanup, performance audits, and refactoring fragile areas ahead of the rebuild



As the role grows:

- Contributing to feature development in a modern JavaScript stack

- Supporting the platform rebuild and migration away from legacy WordPress components

- API development work in support of native apps

- Building new features and integrations

- Taking on increasing ownership of development areas over time

- Interfacing with other tea
mbers and external vendors as needed



Ongoing:

- Close collaboration with the Lead Developer

- Leveraging AI tools to work efficiently and ship quality work

- Self-organizing around a task list with clear direction but minimal hand-holding

- Proactive communication on blockers and progress



---



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Required:

- Solid WordPress development experience: themes, plugins, hooks, custom functionality

- PHP: you can read, write, and debug it confidently

- [removed] modern JS, not just jQuery basics

- MySQL: comfortable writing and optimizing queries

- REST API experience: consuming and working with external APIs

- Git and GitHub: you use version control properly and without being prompted

- AI-native workflow: you already use tools like Cursor, Claude Code, or GitHub Copilot as a core part of how you work. This is a firm requirement, not a nice to have.



Nice to have:

- WooCommerce and WooCommerce Subscriptions experience

- Modern JS frameworks (React, Next.js, Vue, or similar)

- CI/CD familiarity (GitHub Actions or equivalent)

- Docker or Linux server environments

- Headless CMS or decoupled frontend experience



You're probably a good fit if you:

- Prefer solving real problems over building toy projects

- Communicate proactively: you ask questions early instead of going quiet

- Can self-organize around a task list without daily hand-holding

- Take quality seriously without over-engineering simple things

- Get genuinely excited about working in a codebase that has history and wants to evolve



---



WORK ENVIRONMENT



- Part-time to start, with a clear path to grow as the role and platform expand

- Contractor role

- Reasonable overlap with US business hours expected

- Direct working relationship with the Lead Developer

- Small, no-nonsense team: you'll know what's going on and your work will be visible



---



COMPENSATION



$25/hr + bonus, with compensation reviewed based on experience and performance



---



ROOM TO GROW



This role starts part-time, but that's a starting point, not a ceiling. We're a small team with real technical ambition, and we invest in people who show up and do good work. The platform rebuild we're planning is a significant project, and the right person will have the opportunity to grow alongside it in hours, responsibility, and ownership.



We're not looking for a contractor to plug a gap. We're looking for someone who could become a core part of the team over time.



---



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered for this role, please submit a short video (2-3 minutes) introducing yourself. In your video, cover:



- A brief overview of your background and experience

- The types of WordPress projects you've worked on

- A WordPress bug you debugged that turned out to be harder than expected and how you worked through it

- Your experience with WooCommerce or subscription billing systems, if any

- What AI development tools you currently use and how they fit into your day-to-day workflow

- Why this role makes sense for where you're at right now



Applications without a video will not be reviewed.



In addition to your video, please separately include:



- A link to your GitHub profile or examples of relevant work (portfolio, live projects, private repo descriptions, etc.)

- A brief note on your current availability and any other ongoing commitments we should know about



We move quickly with candidates who are a strong fit. We'll ask for a small paid technical exercise before any final decisions: straightforward, practical, and respectful of your time.

title: Graphic Artist - Apparel Production
description:

Company: One Off Apparel in West Boylston, Massachusetts - USA



About Us:



One Off Apparel is a premium custom apparel manufacturer specializing in screen printing, embroidery, and private label production. We’re known for high-quality work, fast turnaround, and top-tier customer experience.

This is a hands-on, production-focused role working under our Art Director in a fast-paced environment. You’ll be responsible for turning customer ideas into clean, production-ready artwork.

- Ensure accuracy, consistency, and quality across all files

- Collaborate with sales and production teams to hit deadlines

- Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop and Adobe Illustrator

- Strong attention to detail and organization

- Ability to work quickly and efficiently under deadlines





Nice to Have:



- Experience in screen printing or apparel production

- Understanding of color separations and print processes

- Previous prepress experience





Compensation & Schedule:



$7.50 per hour





Please send:

- Resume

- Portfolio or examples of work (if available)



Include 'Production Artist' in the subject line so we know you read this -

title: Ecommerce Manager
description:
The role

Part-time ecommerce operations role with two sides.



Client operations: Day-to-day ecommerce operations. Performance monitoring across META and Google, proactive flagging of issues and opportunities, operational follow-up across platforms, briefing notes for strategic meetings, etc.



New venture support: Early-stage DTC brand. Work evolves with the business — market and competitor research, supplier tracking, regulatory research, brand reference collection, operational setup. You look at where the business is and figure out what it needs.



Requirements



- 3–5 years hands-on ecommerce experience, in-house or agency

- Extensive Shopify experience — this is a must

- Deep working knowledge of META Ads Manager and Google Ads Manager

- Strong analytical instincts — you read data and form your own conclusions

- Excellent English, written and spoken

- Works independently, manages own priorities, does not need a task list to be productive

- Coding background or experience — nice to have



What we offer



- Competitive salary — we pay very well for the right person

- Flexible hours, work in your own timezone

- Clear path to full-time contract as the business grows



How to apply

Subject line: OPS — [your full name]. Applications without this subject line will not be opened.

Cover four things, one page maximum:



1. Background — specific platforms, environments, and client types. Be concrete.

2. A real result — one campaign or project where you made a measurable difference. What was the situation, what did you do, what was the outcome.

3. Proof of work — at least one concrete example of results. Screenshot of an ads account, anonymised case study, dashboard, or similar. No proof of work, no consideration.

4. Expected monthly rate for 16–24 hrs/week.



Shortlisted candidates will be invited for a video interview.

title: Product Data Administrator
description:
Product Data Administrator



We are looking for a detail-oriented and highly accurate Product Data Administrator to support us with a data population project.



This is a data-entry style role that will require a high level of independent working, strong attention to detail, and a consistently accurate approach.



The role involves reviewing a series of product data sheets and Amazon product listings, then accurately transferring the relevant information into a master product data spreadsheet.



You will be working across a range of Audio/Visual products, so confidence handling technical specifications is important. An understanding of areas such as wattage, inputs/outputs, connectivity, and product features would be a strong advantage.



Key responsibilities:



Review technical product data sheets and Amazon product listings

Extract and input product information into a master spreadsheet

Work independently to manage and complete the data population task

Ensure all data is entered with a high degree of accuracy

Identify and clearly highlight any missing or unavailable information

Maintain consistency across all product records



Ideal candidate:



Excellent written English and strong attention to detail

Comfortable working with spreadsheets and structured data

Able to work independently and accurately with minimal supervision

Confident interpreting technical product specifications

Methodical, reliable, and organised in their approach



The role is a temporary full time role for 2 months, however once the project is complete, we will be looking to keep someone on part time to manage the file.

title: Part-Time Customer Support Rep (Shopify E-commerce)
description:
We run a fast-growing e-commerce operation and are looking for a detail-oriented, highly reliable Customer Support Representative to join our team.



This is a long-term role with room to grow as the business scales.



Role Overview

You’ll be responsible for handling customer support across our Shopify stores, ensuring fast, clear, and professional communication with customers.

We are not looking for beginners. You must already understand how real e-commerce support works at scale.



Requirements (Read Carefully)

- Must have experience working with multiple Shopify brands

- Must have worked with stores doing at least $100k+/month

Strong understanding of:

 - Order tracking issues

 - Refunds, cancellations, chargebacks

 - Shipping delays and customer expectations

 - Fluent English (written) — this is non-negotiable

 - Experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to assist workflows (not replace thinking)

 - Extremely detail-oriented and able to follow instructions precisely

 - Able to work independently with minimal oversight



What We’re Looking For

- Someone who thinks like an operator, not just an employee

- Someone who understands tone, customer psychology, and retention

- Someone who can use AI as a tool, not rely on it blindly



Hours & Pay

Starting: 1 hour per day

Will scale to 2–3 hours/day as workload increases

Pay: $3.50/hour

Long-term opportunity with increased responsibility



IMPORTANT – APPLICATION FILTER (READ OR YOU WILL BE IGNORED)

To apply, you MUST follow these steps exactly:

Start your application with this keyword:

"VELVET SUPPORT"



Answer the following:

 - What Shopify brands have you worked with? (List them)

 - What was their approximate monthly revenue?

 - What tools/platforms did you use for customer support?

 - How have you used AI tools like ChatGPT or Claude in your workflow?



Write your answers in your own words.



If your response looks AI-generated, it will be ignored.



Next Step

If you are a strong fit, we will send you a paid test project to evaluate your skills.

title: Ecommerce Video Editor (Wellness Lifestyle Brand)
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce wellness brand. Our brand narrative is the "Return to Nature."



We are looking for a full-time Direct Response Video Editor. You will be the engine of our paid acquisition strategy on Meta and TikTok.



You are not just a splicer; you are a visual storyteller. You will receive raw product assets and scripts, but you should also know to source high-quality organic B-roll and leverage AI tools to generate conceptual visuals that fit our narrative.



What You Will Do:



Edit at Scale: Produce short-form direct response variations daily for Meta/TikTok testing.



Visual Storytelling: Weave together raw product footage with high-retention storytelling frameworks



Hook Mastery: Master the "First 3 Seconds" hook psychology to stop the scroll.



Native Formatting: Apply native-looking text overlays and captions that blend seamlessly into social feeds.



What We Do NOT Want (Please read carefully):



Do NOT apply if you only edit cinematic travel vlogs. We are a Direct Response brand. Every second must be designed to convert.



Requirements:



Proven track record editing Direct Response video ads that generate engagement/ views, or even better, profitable sales for e-commerce/DTC brands.



Deep understanding of pacing, storytelling, and viewer retention metrics.



Expert proficiency in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or Final Cut.



Experience prompting AI video/image generators to match a specific brand aesthetic.



How to Apply:

Please include a link to your portfolio, work, videos or ads you've created, and if you've gotten results for your previous works.

title: Sales Coordinator
description:
Summary of Position

The Business Development Coordinator supports the Business Development tea
mbers by handling internal coordination, with a strong focus on sampling support and inbound customer communication. This role ensures that customer sample requests are processed quickly and accurately, project data is entered and maintained in systems, and customers receive timely and professional updates. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced environment, is detail-oriented, and communicates clearly with both customers and internal stakeholders.

Essential Job Duties

Sampling & Customer Fulfillment Support

• Receive and support processing of customer sample requests on behalf of sales reps utilizing Imbibe’s project management software.

• Coordinate internal fulfillment, including shipping, lead times, and communication with operations/logistics teams.

• Prepare and submit documentation such as quotes, order forms, or product details.

• Proactively update customers on status, shipping info, and next steps.

• Send follow-up documentation and pricing after sample delivery.

• Track sample inventory and flag risks or delays.



Prospecting Coordination & CRM Management

• Log inbound customer requests and new opportunities into CRM with complete and accurate details.

• Assign or escalate inbound leads to appropriate sales personnel.

• Build and maintain targeted prospect lists using CRM, LinkedIn, industry databases, and other research tools.

• Support the Business Development team with lead qualification through background research on companies, decision-makers, and industry trend via tools like LinkedIn and Wiza.

• Maintain organized, up-to-date records on accounts and project statuses.



Internal Communication & Process Coordination

• Serve as a liaison between Sales, R&D, and Customer Service to ensure aligned timelines and deliverables.

• Identify and help implement workflow improvements for sampling and sales admin processes.

• Maintain shared resources (e.g., sample request trackers, sales templates, documentation libraries).

• Coordinate internal kickoff and check-in meetings.



Minimum Qualifications

• 2+ years in a sales coordination, administrative, or customer support role.

• Proficiency with CRM platforms and order tracking systems.

• Excellent organizational and time management skills.

• Strong communication skills—both verbal and written.

• Able to work cross-functionally with multiple teams and manage multiple tasks simultaneously.

title: Executive Assistant to Founder – High Fashion Brand (Odoo Mastery + Full Ownership Required)
description:
Type of Work: Full Time

Wage / Salary: $5 per hour

Hours per week: 60

Date Updated: 21 April 2026

Job Overview

We are looking for an exceptional, highly proactive Executive Assistant who will become the right-hand to the founder of an international high-fashion brand operating across Europe, USA and Asia.

This is not a standard assistant role. You will act as an extension of the founder: structuring operations, managing communications across time zones, driving projects to completion, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.

Odoo is our single source of truth and central control panel.

You are expected to fully master, set up and maintain Odoo as the backbone of all our operations. Every task, every file, every communication and every deliverable must live inside Odoo.

Key Responsibilities

•  Take full ownership of daily operations and priorities

•  Manage all communications 
, WhatsApp, internal teams, clients, suppliers)

•  Coordinate with retail stores, logistics, production and partners

•  Structure tasks, create reports and maintain perfect overview

•  Support operations across multiple entities and time zones

•  Proactively solve problems and take initiative without being asked

•  Log every hour in Odoo Timesheets with clear description + attach all delivered work (CVs, contracts, reports, spreadsheets, research, etc.)

•  Keep Odoo perfectly organized and up-to-date at all times

Important Clarifications

•  This role is not focused on finance or accounting (you will collaborate closely with our finance responsible)

•  You will work directly and daily with the founder

•  Full commitment and long-term mindset required (this is not a short-term gig)

Requirements (we only want the best)

•  Exceptional organizational and communication skills

•  Extremely proactive mindset – you anticipate, you act, you own

•  Able to handle high pressure and multiple priorities simultaneously

•  Fluent in English (written + spoken) at a professional level

•  Comfortable communicating with high-level clients and business partners

•  Proven experience as Executive Assistant / Operations Manager / Coordinator

•  Strong experience with Odoo (or proven ability to master complex systems quickly)

•  Interest in fashion / luxury is a big plus

•  Willing to travel internationally (Ibiza, Los Angeles, China, and other locations) when needed

What we expect from day 1

•  Perfect daily use of Odoo (Timesheets + file attachments)

•  Full transparency and detailed reporting

•  60 high-quality hours per week

•  100% ownership attitude

If you are someone who thrives in a fast-paced, high-standard environment and is ready to treat this role as your own business within the company, we want to hear from you.

Only serious, long-term candidates who are ready to master Odoo and deliver at the highest level should apply.

title: Fast Placement! VA Remote Virtual Receptionist
description:
Important: Our application process moves quickly. If you are selected to proceed to the next interview stages, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist to manage inbound calls and book spa appointments. This is a long-term, performance-based position. Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement in this role depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: Tech & Automation Specialist – Long-Term
description:
Who We Are



Vhire (
) is an Australian recruitment agency that runs on AI and automation. We're a small, fast-moving startup and we need someone who loves building systems and making things work smoothly without manual effort.



This is a long-term role with room to grow. We're not a body shop. We want someone who's invested in helping us build something.



What You'll Be Doing



Set up and manage integrations between our tools: Wix, Manatal, 
, Stripe, Square, Zapier, Calendly, LastPass

Build Zapier automations so our business runs without manual steps

Set up and manage our calling system (OpenPhone) for the sales team

Build a live CEO dashboard showing KPIs from all our tools

Troubleshoot tech issues for the team and keep all systems running smoothly

Research and recommend AI tools to help the business scale

Manage tool subscriptions, access, and documentation

You Must Have



2+ years experience managing SaaS tools in a business environment

Hands-on Zapier experience — you must be able to build multi-step Zaps on your own

Experience with CRM, ATS, or sales tools (any — doesn't have to be our exact stack)

Ability to build basic dashboards or reports in Google Sheets or Looker Studio

Strong written English

Self-starter — you don't need someone looking over your shoulder

Big Bonus If You Have



Experience with Manatal, 
, or Stripe specifically

Knowledge of AI tools like Clay, Claude, ChatGPT API, or Instantly.ai

Previous work with Australian or Western clients

What We Offer



PHP 10,000–15000/month depending on experience

Part-time 15–20 hours/week — flexible schedule, you manage your own time

100% remote

Long-term position — this isn't a project, it's a career opportunity

Direct working relationship with the CEO — your work will matter

Performance bonuses as the company grows

Opportunity to move into a full-time Systems Manager role

How to Apply



Do NOT just send your CV. We receive many applications and generic applications go straight to the bottom.



To be considered, please include:

Your CV or LinkedIn profile

OPTIONAL but highly recommended: A short Loom video (2–3 mins) walking us through one automation or system you've set up. This alone will move you to the top of our shortlist.

We're looking to hire quickly for the right person. If you're reliable, technically solid, and excited about building systems for a growing Australian company — we want to hear from you.

title: HR Organizational Manager
description:
JOB SUMMARY



The Organizational Manager is a senior operational leader responsible for building, maintaining, and optimizing the internal systems that drive organizational efficiency and growth. This role serves as the connective tissue between leadership vision and day-to-day execution — bridging strategy with operations through structured processes, data-driven accountability, and AI-powered tools.



The Organizational Manager will be building internal operational infrastructure from scratch, including CRM, SOPs, communication systems, and organizational structure. This role will also oversee KPI tracking and team accountability. This individual is equally comfortable supporting C-suite leadership as an executive assistant and leading cross-functional teams toward measurable outcomes.



The company operates within the Microsoft ecosystem and prefers all operational systems to remain within Microsoft infrastructure where possible (Microsoft Teams, OneDrive/SharePoint, Dynamics Business Central, Power BI, and related tools), supplemented by platforms such as Asana where necessary.





1. Systems & Operations Management



Design, implement, and continuously improve Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) across all departments

Pioneer, create, proposed then implement an organization's CRM platform, ensuring data integrity, pipeline accuracy, and team adoption

Define, monitor, and report on Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for all teams and functions

Lead weekly, monthly, and quarterly business rhyth
etings aligned with the EOS Rocks and Scorecard methodology

Identify operational bottlenecks and deploy process improvements using AI-powered workflow tools

Select, implement, and fully operationalize a CRM system (preferred: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central or equivalent Microsoft-integrated solution), including setup, data structure design, team onboarding, and ongoing optimization.

Design and implement company-wide file and folder organization standards using Microsoft OneDrive and SharePoint, including naming conventions, access control, versioning, and documentation hierarchy.

Establish and maintain internal operational workflows and communication systems (primarily through Microsoft Teams) to ensure clarity, eliminate duplicated work, and improve cross-departmental alignment.

2. EOS Implementation & Integration



Champion and manage the full EOS (Entrepreneurial Operating System) implementation across the organization

Facilitate Level 10 Meetings (L10s), facilitate the Issues Solving Track (IDS), and maintain the organizational Vision/Traction Organizer (V/TO)

Track Rocks, Todos, and Issues with rigor and ensure 90-day sprint accountability across all teams

Serve as the internal EOS integrator and coach for department leads

NOTE: EOS implementation will be prioritized AFTER foundational systems are established, including CRM setup, KPI frameworks, SOP structure, and internal communication workflows.

3. Executive Assistant & Leadership Support



Provide high-level executive support to the CEO/Founder including calendar management, meeting preparation, and priority filtering

Prepare executive briefings, dashboards, and reports for leadership decision-making

Coordinate between executives and department heads to ensure alignment on priorities and deliverables

Act as a trusted liaison and gatekeeper for leadership's time and focus

4. Accountability & Performance Culture



Build and maintain a culture of ownership and accountability across all levels of the organization

Track team and individual commitments against KPIs and SOP benchmarks and escalate when necessary

Conduct regular performance reviews and pulse checks with team leads

Develop accountability frameworks and scorecards aligned with organizational goals

5. Communication & Internal Alignment



Serve as the central communication hub ensuring clear, consistent, and timely information flow

Draft and distribute internal communications, announcements, and operational updates

Manage meeting agendas, follow-up action items, and inter-departmental communication cadences

Facilitate clarity between leadership vision and team execution through structured communication channels

Build and enforce structured internal communication workflows using Microsoft Teams channels, ensuring all departments operate with aligned visibility and no duplication of effort.

6. AI & Technology Integration



Identify and implement AI tools to automate repetitive processes, reporting, and communications

Stay current on emerging AI platforms and evaluate their applicability to business operations

Train tea
mbers on new technology adoption and ensure organization-wide tool utilization

Create AI-assisted SOPs, workflows, and reporting templates that reduce manual effort

JOB QUALIFICATIONS



Education & Experience



Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Operations Management, or a related field (Master's preferred)

3–7+ years of experience in operations, project management, or organizational leadership roles

Demonstrated experience working within or implementing EOS (Entrepreneurial Operating System)

Proven track record of managing CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce, 
, or equivalent)

Strong preference for candidates with experience implementing Microsoft-based business systems (Dynamics 365 Business Central, Power BI, Teams, OneDrive/SharePoint ecosystems).

Technical Skills



Proficiency in CRM platforms and data management (HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho, or similar)

Experience building and managing KPI dashboards and reporting systems

Hands-on experience developing, documenting, and enforcing SOPs

Familiarity with AI tools and productivity platforms (ChatGPT, Notion AI, Zapier, Make, etc.)

Proficiency in project management tools (ClickUp, Asana, 
, or similar)

Strong command of Microsoft Office Suite and/or Google Workspace

Strong proficiency in Microsoft ecosystem tools is preferred, including Microsoft Teams, OneDrive/SharePoint, Dynamics 365 Business Central, and Power BI for reporting and operational dashboards.

Leadership & Soft Skills



Exceptional organizational skills with a high attention to detail and follow-through

Strong interpersonal and communication skills — written, verbal, and presentational

Ability to build trust and influence across all levels of an organization

High emotional intelligence and discretion when handling confidential executive matters

Proactive problem-solver with a continuous improvement mindset

Comfortable navigating ambiguity in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment

EOS-Specific Qualifications



Certified or highly experienced EOS Implementer/Integrator is a strong advantage

Deep understanding of the EOS tools: V/TO, Scorecard, Rock Management, L10 Meeting format

Ability to facilitate structured conversations that lead to Issues resolution and alignment

title: VA- Content/SEO Writer
description:
We work with legal companies to have them move to digital notarization of legal documents. We are building a blog content program to educate clients and law firms about the legal process, rights, and related legal topics. We are seeking a Legal Content Writer with experience in SEO to produce high-quality, research-driven blog posts. The ideal candidate can take complex legal and financial topics and translate them into clear, engaging, and SEO-optimized content that builds trust and drives organic traffic.



**No AI can be used for any content, it must be 100% human written and generated.**



Work with our SEO team to take their content needs and turn them into articles. 

Incorporate targeted keywords naturally into content, titles, and headings. We provide topics and words.

Create clear, informative content for non-lawyer readers while maintaining credibility.

Deliver work on schedule and accept feedback/revisions.



This is a long-term role for the right person. We value reliability and consistent quality over speed.



WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR

This role is perfect for someone who:

- Has experience writing SEO content or knowledge of the legal world. 

- Knows how to structure a post for both readers and search without it feeling mechanical

- Writes in a voice that sounds human — warm, specific, and free of filler

- Is comfortable working from a detailed brief without needing heavy direction

- Is reliable — hits deadlines and communicates early when something comes up



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

- Every post you deliver is publish-ready with minimal revisions needed

- Your writing sounds like a real person wrote it — not a content machine

- Clients and readers find the content genuinely useful and engaging



Schedule

This is a fully flexible role. You set your own hours — deadlines matter, not when you work.

Volume is approximately 1 or 2 posts per week. Some overlap with EST needed.





HOW TO APPLY

- Share one writing sample you are proud of — ideally a blog post or article for a lifestyle, fashion, or consumer brand. In 2–3 sentences, tell us what the brief was and what you were trying to achieve with the piece.



Applications without both a writing sample and a video will not be reviewed.

We respond quickly to strong applicants. If it's a good fit, we'll start with a paid trial post before committing to an ongoing arrangement.

title: Accounting Manager (E-commerce & Consumer Brands)

- 5+ years of full-cycle accounting experience

- 2+ years in a multi-client, outsourced, or consulting environment

- Proven ability to own accounting end-to-end (Controller-level capability)

- Experience managing 1–2 direct reports (bookkeepers)

- Strong client-facing experience (calls, presentations, communication)

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting

- Expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Online

- Strong experience in e-commerce accounting

- Hands-on experience with Shopify and Amazon reconciliations

- Proven ability to own the full accounting cycle independently

- Strong understanding of financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet)

title: FULL-TIME COLD CALLER (CPA / CFO SERVICES – US CLIENTS)

WHAT WE NEED

HOW TO APPLY (STRICT INSTRUCTIONS)

IMPORTANT: Applications without a voice note will NOT be reviewed.

IMPORTANT NOTE

We are ONLY looking for confident, sharp communicators who can think and speak naturally—not robotic script readers.

title: Klaviyo/AI/Claude/Accout/Project Manager
description:
I am looking for someone with a specific set of skills all combined.  



Klaviyo account manager + Claude AI expert - Automations/SOPs/Management



If you are not deeply interested in both of those and how they work together please do not apply.  



Required experience:

2+ Years Klaviyo Account Management





Client Operations:

Own the Monday client-processing rhythm (run through all retainers in priority order)

Respond to inbound client messages within SLA (Slack/email), escalate anything strategic to Jason

Maintain a single source of truth per client: goals, flow map, campaign calendar, open questions

Track client deliverables against retainer scope — flag scope creep early



Campaign Management part AI:

Own the monthly campaign calendar for each client (send dates, themes, angles)

Brief the copywriter with: objective, segment, product focus, offer, tone notes, references

QA copy against brand voice doc and product-benefit mapping (e.g. RLR benefit matrix) before it moves to design

Brief the designer with layout direction, image references, and any on-brand constraints

Brief the technician for build: segment logic, A/B tests, send time, UTMs

Final QA on Klaviyo before scheduled send: links, UTMs, segment, mobile preview, subject/preview

Post-send: confirm delivery, flag anomalies (deliverability dips, bounce spikes)



Own Flow Management:

Run monthly flow health checks: open/click/placed-order rate vs benchmark and by message — action findings (brief refreshes, subject tests, timing/offer tweaks)

Suggest new flows and opportunities 

Find broken or underperforming flows and flow messages and suggest improvements 



Reporting & Analytics using AI:

Weekly or monthly client reports: campaigns sent, flow revenue, list growth, deliverability

Pull Klaviyo data via MCP — no manual exports for anything repeatable

YoY comparisons on key metrics for quarterly reviews

Flag red metrics (RPR decline, click rate drops, unsub spikes) before the client notices

Feed insights back into the campaign calendar



Team Coordination part AI:

Run the ClickUp board for each client: tasks, owners, due dates, dependencies

Daily async standup: what's shipping, what's blocked, what needs Jason

Keep the copywriter, technician, and designer sequenced so nothing waits on Jason unnecessarily

Maintain capacity view across the team — surface overloads early



QA & Brand Stewardship:

Every client-visible asset passes through the AM before send: copy, design, build, scheduling

Maintain and update each client's brand/voice/product doc as new knowledge emerges



Strategy Support using AI:

Pre-brief Jason before any strategic client conversation (state of account, wins, issues, opportunities)

Draft first-pass proposals for new flows, tests, or segment ideas for Jason to review

Maintain the per-client opportunity backlog



Internal Systems & Documentation using AI:

Keep SOPs current as workflows evolve

Update the Idea Bank and Information Dumps in ClickUp with anything worth preserving

Document onboarding steps for new clients

Feed recurring issues into process improvements



Further AI & Tooling:

Use Claude/MCP connectors as the default for pulling data, drafting reports, and prepping briefs

Build and refine prompts/skills/apps for repeatable tasks

Identify workflows ripe for further automation and raise them with Jason





If you are a systems first strategic thinker who loves Klaviyo
 and how AI works with it please apply. 



There will be a quick test job involved to assess your capabilities.   



Send an
 to 
 with the subject line "Klaviyo AI Account Manager"
