title: Cold Caller (Remote)
description:
About Pearl Lemon



Pearl Lemon Group is a UK-registered company (No.
) headquartered in London (EC1V 2NX), founded in 2016 by Deepak Shukla — a former Deloitte consultant, TEDx speaker, and 
 contributor.



We’re not a traditional agency.



We’re a global growth ecosystem spanning SEO, lead generation, PR, accounting, legal services, food brands like Pearl Lemon Café and How Matcha, and even gaming through Pearl Lemon Games.



Today, we are:



A team of 134+ professionals across 30+ nationalities

Generating over 1,000 inbound leads every month

Trusted by clients worldwide with 1,000+ 5-star reviews across platforms



Our culture is simple but intense: launch fast, fix live, and own your numbers.



Role Overview: Cold Caller (Remote)



As a Cold Caller, you are not just booking calls — you are opening doors.



Your role is to initiate conversations with potential clients, qualify their needs, and convert interest into booked appointments for our sales team. You are the first impression of the business and a key driver of pipeline growth.



Success in this role is not measured by how many calls you make — but by how many meaningful conversations you create and how consistently you turn those into opportunities.



This is a performance-driven role with clear KPIs, full transparency, and real earning potential.



What You’ll Be Doing



You’ll spend your time where it matters most — generating results.



Make outbound calls to targeted prospects using provided data and systems

Engage decision-makers with confidence, clarity, and curiosity

Deliver concise, compelling messaging that sparks interest

Qualify leads based on business needs and fit

Book qualified appointments for the closing team

Handle objections professionally and persistently

Maintain accurate records in CRM systems

Collaborate with global sales and marketing teams to refine outreach strategies



You won’t be left guessing. Scripts, training, and ongoing feedback are part of the system — but your personality and initiative are what make the difference.



Who This Role Is For



This role is ideal for someone who sees sales as a skill worth mastering — not just a job.



You’ll do well here if you:



Have experience in cold calling, telemarketing, or sales outreach (preferred but not required)

Speak clear, confident English with strong communication skills

Are comfortable handling rejection and staying consistent

Can work independently in a remote environment

Are organized and disciplined with your time

Are motivated by performance, targets, and incentives

Are willing to learn, adapt, and improve daily



We value mindset over credentials. You don’t need a degree — you need drive.



What You’ll Gain



This isn’t just another remote job. It’s a training ground for high-level sales and business skills.



Access to Pearl Lemon Academy — structured training in sales, communication, and systems

Exposure to global markets and international clients

Mentorship from experienced sales leaders

A clear understanding of performance metrics and how to improve them

Opportunity to grow into closer roles, account management, or leadership

Real-world experience in a fast-scaling, multi-industry business



If you’re serious about building a career in sales, this role gives you a foundation most people never get.



Culture & Work Environment



We are remote-first, but not disconnected.



You’ll be working with teammates across the UK, India, Pakistan, South Africa, and Europe — all aligned around performance and growth.



Here’s what defines our culture:



Speed over perfection — we act, test, and iterate quickly

Radical transparency — numbers are visible, feedback is direct

Accountability — you own your results, not just your tasks

Continuous learning — through internal training and real-time coaching

Entrepreneurial thinking — every tea
mber is expected to think like a builder



We don’t micromanage. But we do expect consistency.



Compensation



Compensation is structured to reward performance.



Base pay (depending on experience)

Commission per qualified appointment or deal contribution

Performance-based bonuses



The more value you create, the more you earn. Simple.



Working Hours

Fully remote position

Flexible scheduling depending on campaign requirements

Must be available during agreed calling hours (based on target market)

How to Apply



If you’ve read this far, you’re not just browsing — you’re considering.



That’s exactly the kind of intent we’re looking for.



To apply, submit:



Your updated CV

A short voice recording (5 minutes) introducing yourself and why you’re a fit for this role

Any relevant sales or calling experience



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a practical assessment — because we hire based on ability, not just claims.

title: Job Title: Google Ads & Meta Ads Specialist
description:
Role Overview



We are seeking an experienced digital advertising specialist who will be responsible for managing and optimizing campaigns across both Google Ads and Meta Ads platforms. This role will focus on strategic planning, execution, and performance analysis of paid campaigns aimed at driving measurable results.



Responsibilities

1. Campaign Management & Execution

Create, manage, and optimize campaigns on Google Ads (Search, Display, Video, etc.) and Meta Ads 
, Instagram, etc.).

Set up targeting parameters, budgets, and bidding strategies aligned with business goals.

Develop ad creatives, working closely with designers and content teams to ensure messaging is on brand and effective.

Experience

Detail-oriented and able to manage multiple campaigns simultaneously.

Strong communication skills to collaborate with tea
mbers and stakeholders.

What Success Looks Like



The ideal candidate will drive significant improvements in campaign performance and efficiency, ensuring a strong return on ad spend while continuously innovating strategies to meet business goals.

title: Shopify Theme Designer (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
Zentra Digital is looking for an A-player Shopify Store Builder (UI/UX Focus).



At Zentra Digital, we build 15 high-converting Shopify stores per month for fast-growing e-commerce and DTC brands. We’re looking for a designer-minded store builder who thinks in terms of buyer psychology, page flow, and clean aesthetic.



Responsibilities:

- Build and launch Shopify stores from scratch using the Dawn theme

- Design product pages, collection pages, and homepages with strong UI/UX principles

- Customize sections, banners, and layouts to match each brand’s identity

- Continuously refine design and flow based on performance feedback



What we expect from you? 

A real eye for design. You notice spacing, hierarchy, contrast, and rhythm. You understand that a store needs to feel trustworthy and premium in the first 3 seconds.



Performance-first thinking:

You care about what the design does, not just how it looks. You think about load speed, mobile-first behavior, and where attention lands on the page. You see design as a conversion tool, not decoration.



Beyond the day-to-day build work, we want someone who takes initiative. That means reviewing competitor stores, flagging sections that underperform, and suggesting improvements before we ask. The best people on our team don’t wait for briefs — they push ideas forward. As a small note to confirm applicants actually read the description carefully, please include the words Copper House somewhere in your application message.



Requirements:

1.) 1+ years of hands-on experience building Shopify stores

2.) Strong working knowledge of Shopify and the Dawn theme

3.) Fluent written and spoken English

4.) Reliable internet and a quiet working setup

5.) Deadline discipline is a must



Who We Are Looking For? We are looking for A-players only!



What We Offer?

1. Full-time remote position with fully flexible working hours (no timezone overlap required)

2. Long-term opportunity with Zentra Digital

3. Opportunity to grow in the company

4. Performance-based bonuses and incentives

5. Monthly salary: ?50,000–?75,000 PHP depending on experience



And of course; a warm, welcoming environment where you genuinely feel like part of the team, not just another contractor on a list.



If u are interested, please send:

1. Your portfolio with at least 3 Shopify stores you’ve built or designed

2. A short introduction about you, your experience and why you’d be a great fit

3. Your availability and prefer working hours per month



We look forward to hearing from you!



Kind regards,



The Zentra Digital Team

title: Outbound Appointment Setter (Paid Training + Result Bonuses)

Reliable internet connection

Quiet, distraction-free workspace

Willing to learn and work inside GoHighLevel (GHL)

Consistent long-term work for agents who deliver

eting

eting)

title: Creative Video / Visualization Specialist – One-Time Project $50-100
description:
I am looking for a creative and skilled person to make a short video for a personal visualization project. The goal of this video is to show a story as if it is happening in real life, so it feels emotional, immersive, and believable as I am trying to manifest something in my life and as we know the law of manifestation is as strong as much as you visualize and and feel the vision being rooted in reality.



This is a one-time project, but it requires someone who can be very creative and professional. You may need to create or find images, design backgrounds, or set up scenes yourself. The video should feel real and polished, like the story is actually happening.



I am looking for a video that helps me imagine a scenario clearly and emotionally. It should show a sequence of events, with music, images, or clips that tell a story. The focus is on how it feels, not just visuals. You need to use your creativity to make everything come together, including backgrounds, scenes, and the flow of the story.



What You Will Do



Make a short video or montage that tells a story visually.

Use photos, video clips, or images you create or find. You may need to design backgrounds or add visual effects.

Arrange the sequence so the story feels real and emotional.

Add music and simple effects to make the video polished and professional.

The first version doesn’t have to be perfect, but it should be very close to perfect (around 80%). I can then give feedback for final tweaks.



Requirements

Proven experience creating similar videos. Must show samples of previous work.

Creative and able to tell a story with images and video.

Knowledge of apps like Mind Movies, Canva, or similar tools.

Able to follow instructions carefully and understand the project concept.

Professional and serious about delivering high-quality work.



How to Apply

Send a voice note/text on WhatsApp 
explaining how you understand the project and how you would do it.

Send samples of previous videos you have made similar to what I am looking for

Only apply if you can deliver a high-quality video that is close to perfect on the first try.



 I do not have time for trial-and-error or experimental work. You need to have real experience and be confident in what you can create.



Pay

$75–$100 total, depending on experience and portfolio.

Payment options:

Down payment via PayPal, or

Submit the first video with a watermark until full payment.



Other Notes

Project will start after the holiday.



The video should feel real, emotional, and immersive.



You must be able to use your own creativity to make backgrounds, scenes, and layouts.



I am looking for someone professional, skilled, and creative who can deliver a video that is mostly correct on the first try.



This is a manifestation/visualization project, so it is very important that the story feels believable and emotionally engaging.

title: Content Specialist & Video Editor
description:

title: Graphic Designer
description:
Who We Are:



We bring a touch of holiday enchantment to a variety of public spaces. Our premium holiday lighting transforms these venues, infusing them with a warm, joyful atmosphere that fosters festive goodwill and enhances your business during this crucial season. We are seeking a talented Graphic Artist to join our team part-time and help create visually stunning marketing and branding materials for our clients.

 templates, social media graphics, and website visuals.

- Project Management: Manage multiple design projects simultaneously, ensuring timely delivery and adherence to deadlines.

- Trend Awareness: Stay updated on the latest design trends and tools to continuously enhance the quality of our work.

- Additional Design Projects: Assist on additional design projects as needed, contributing to a dynamic and creative work environment.



Qualifications:



- Experience: Two to four years of relevant experience in graphic design.

- Technical Skills: Proficiency with basic and current design tools ( Adobe Creative Suite, Canva, Figma & Photoshop).

- Collaboration Tools: Experience with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Slides) for collaborative work.

- Communication: Strong communication skills, both verbal and written, in English.

- Efficiency: Ability to work efficiently and meet deadlines while managing multiple projects.

- Attention to Detail: A keen eye for detail and a strong understanding of design principles, including typography, color theory, and layout.

- Availability: Must be available to work Monday to Friday, 9am-5pm CT.







Job Type: Full Time, 20-40 hours per week

Work Location: Remote



Application Process:

Please send your resume, cover letter, and any relevant work samples to 
 with the subject line "Graphic Artist - [Your Name]".



For candidates who are shortlisted, you will receive an
 from us with further instructions. This
 will outline the next steps in the application process, including details about the design skill test.



As part of the application process, candidates will be required to complete a design skill test. This will help us assess your design capabilities and ensure they meet our standards for quality and creativity.



About the Role:



This role is designed for a skilled Graphic Artist who is passionate about design and eager to contribute to our festive mission. You will be a key player in crafting visual materials that support our marketing and branding efforts, ensuring our holiday displays and services are presented in the best possible light. If you have a creative mind, an eye for detail, and the ability to deliver high-quality work efficiently, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Construction Painting Estimator / Estimating Assistant
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled Estimating Virtual Assistant with specific experience in commercial construction, particularly in painting, wallcoverings, and architectural finishes. The ideal candidate has strong takeoff and measurement capabilities using professional estimating software and can independently extract quantities and detailed scope data from large plan sets.



This role requires someone detail-oriented, process-driven, and capable of working with minimal supervision to support estimating team tasks at a high level.



Primary Responsibilities:



Perform digital takeoffs, measurements, and material quantity surveys using tools such as:

* OnScreen Takeoff

* PlanSwift

* Bluebeam Revu



Generate comprehensive quantity surveys including:

* Wall areas by type and finish

* Ceilings

* Number of doors & openings

* Drywall & substrate details

* Wallcovering scope & measurements

* Interpret large plan sets and construction drawings to extract all painting and finishing requirements

* Build estimates organized by category, scope, and deliverable

* Prepare takeoff reports, spreadsheets, and summary breakdowns for review

* Review plans/specs for missing info, inconsistencies, and RFIs

* Support pricing, bid assembly, and proposal preparation

* Log, update, and manage bid pipeline details as assigned





Tools & Tech Stack



Must Have:

* OnScreen Takeoff, PlanSwift, or Bluebeam expertise (at least one required)

* Google Suite (Sheets, Docs, Drive)

* PDF Markup experience



Preferred:

* Procore (plan distribution & workflows)

* iSqFt / ConstructConnect

* Slack (internal comms)

* ClickUp or CRM/task platform familiarity



Ideal Candidate Experience:

* 3+ years estimating experience in commercial construction (preferred)

* Strong understanding of painting, wallcovering, and architectural finishes scope

* Able to read construction drawings (architectural, interior, reflected ceiling plans, elevations, schedules)

* Familiar with CSI divisions and trade codes

* Knowledge of wallpaper installation principles (bonus)

* Understands construction process & basic sequencing

* Ability to convert client plans into structured takeoff data with precision

* Very high attention to detail — MUST ensure that what is measured is accurately captured in the output



Key Success Indicators:

* Accurate takeoffs delivered on schedule

* Clear and complete quantity breakdowns

* Minimal errors and rework required

* Ability to “inspect their own work” before submission

* Ability to independently run tasks once plans are provided (e.g. via Procore)



Soft Skills:

* Excellent English communication (written & verbal)

* Fast learner, proactive, highly organized

* Comfortable collaborating with a North American-based team

* Problem-solver with strong construction intuition

* Ability to work independently AND follow detailed instructions



Bonus Skills:

* Experience with drywall, flooring, or other finishing trades

* Knowledge of bid leveling & proposal formatting

* Ability to assist in vendor outreach for pricing

* Familiarity with paint codes, surface prep, and application methods

Coordinate technician availability and routing

Monitor service call progress and update customers when necessary

Escalate urgent issues to management when needed

CRM & Documentation

Update detailed notes in our CRM

Record customer concerns accurately

Document call outcomes and dispatch status

Maintain organized records of after-hours service calls



Performance Expectations



Maintain fast response times on inbound calls

Follow company dispatch protocols

Maintain professional, calm communication during emergencies

Meet daily call handling and scheduling targets

Requirements (Please Read Carefully)

C2-level or near-native English fluency (required)

Clear, professional speaking voice

Strong listening skills and conversational awareness

Prior customer service, appointment setting, call center, or dispatch experience

Comfortable speaking with homeowners and business owners

Ability to remain calm and organized during urgent service calls

Reliable high-speed internet

Quiet, professional home office setup

Coachable, dependable, and detail-oriented

This role requires someone who can sound natural and confident on the phone. If English is difficult or heavily accented to the point of impacting clarity, this role will not be a fit.



Compensation & Position Details



$3–$6 per hour, based on experience and performance

Full-time position with consistent hours

After-hours shift coverage (evenings or overnight)

Long-term opportunity for the right candidate

Performance-based bonuses available after ramp-up period

Ideal Candidate

The ideal candidate is someone who:

Speaks clear, professional English

Can stay calm while handling urgent service calls

Is organized and capable of managing multiple technicians

Has strong customer service instincts

Takes pride in providing excellent customer experiences

How to Apply

To be considered, please submit:

A short voice recording introducing yourself (required)

A brief explanation of your customer service, call center, or dispatch experience

Your availability (including which shift you prefer)

Your internet speed

Applications without a voice recording will not be reviewed.

This is a stable, long-term position with clear expectations and measurable goals. We are looking for someone professional, confident, and serious about performing at a high level.

If that describes you, apply.

________________________________________

• Competitive base salary plus performance-based incentives.

• Training and development opportunities.

• Career growth within a supportive sales team.

 marketing background, ideally DTC

 marketing

title: Senior Graphic Designer
description:
We are seeking a Senior Graphic Designer to join our team. In this role, you will play a crucial role in creating visually appealing and impactful designs across multiple mediums, including digital, video and print. Your creativity and expertise will contribute to enhancing client brand identities, marketing materials, and overall visual communication.



Responsibilities

- Develop and design creative graphics and video content aligned with client objectives and brand guidelines.

- Create visual concepts, graphics, and layouts for digital and print media (including newsletters and UX design).

- Collaborate with clients and internal tea
mbers to understand design requirements and deliver compelling visual solutions.

- Ensure all designs are visually appealing, on-brand, and effectively communicate the intended message.

- Stay up to date with design trends, tools, and best practices to ensure high-quality and innovative output.

- Provide revisions and refinements based on client feedback to achieve desired results.



Requirements

- Proven experience as a Senior Graphic Designer or in a similar role, supported by a strong portfolio of successful design projects.

- Mandatory experience with the following tools is a must: Figma (Website UX Deisgn), Capcut, Premier Pro (Video Creation) Adobe Suite platforms (Graphic Design).

- Experience with video editing, motion graphics and illustration is required.

- Experience with Envato AI tools is a positive.

- Experience across the full Adobe Suite is required.

- Experience in and kit creation.

- Strong understanding of typography, colour theory, layout, and visual composition.

- Excellent problem-solving skills with strong attention to detail.

- Ability to work independently in a remote environment with minimal supervision.



Location

- Remote position - only candidates based in the Philippines will be considered.



Schedule

- Part-time or Full-time



Benefits

- Competitive compensation based on experience and project scope.

- Opportunity to work with diverse clients and industries.

- Professional growth and development within a creative agency environment.

- Flexible work schedule and fully remote setup.



How to Apply

Interested candidates are invited to send a message with their resume and portfolio (mandatory) showcasing relevant and successful design projects. Please highlight your experience with CapCut, Adobe Creative Suite, Envato and your overall approach to effective graphic design.



Depending on the interview we may also share a test project which you can submit with your own watermark.



**Applications without a portfolio will not be considered. NO VA to apply (you will be automatically deleted)**

title: Amazon OA Product Researcher / Sourcer (Industrial Niche)
description:
We are an Amazon eCommerce business focused on Online Arbitrage (OA) in the industrial parts industry, selling OEM and replacement products across categories such as Industrial & Scientific, Tools & Home Improvement, Appliances, Laundry parts, and DIY repair components. Our products support maintenance, repairs, and everyday operational needs for both professional and DIY customers, and we prioritize accurate sourcing, quality listings, and long-term account health through clear systems and organized workflows.



Key Responsibilities

- Source profitable products for Online Arbitrage on Amazon

- Analyze product metrics such as sales rank, pricing history, competition, pineapple and restrictions

- Analyze Keepa and SellerAmp to validate demand, profit margins, and risks

- Track sourced products and maintain organized sourcing records

- Follow sourcing guidelines and business profitability standards

- Communicate regularly with the team regarding sourcing progress and results



Requirements

- Strong attention to detail

- Proven experience in Online Arbitrage sourcing in the industrial niche for Amazon

- Hands-on experience using Keepa and SellerAmp

- Strong understanding of product research fundamentals (ROI, margins, fees, competition, restrictions)

- Strong attention to detail

- Ability to work independently and meet daily/weekly sourcing targets



Benefits

- Stable long term role

- 30,000 PHP per month paid weekly

- Flexible working hours

Follow these instructions extremely carefully. This is a test of your attention to detail.

- Send your resume

title: Account Manager
description:
Benefits:



Work From Home

Guaranteed $500 USD per week

Additional available if you perform well

Unlimited potential through residual because you earn as long as your customers say with Fleetsmarts



What we do as a company:



We give a fuel card away for free to truckers in the US that have discounts on diesel fuel. We have add-on products that make the sale more attractive to the customer. Customers can get weekly credit lines for their fuel card if they use our factoring service, which is akin to a pay-day loan service for businesses, but we provide this service for free. We also have a service to help reduce the down payment on their insurance. We market to new trucking companies that are just starting out and all our products are designed to help them get going faster than they would be able to on their own.



What you do:



You call warm appointments for truckers who have already expressed interest

You explain how we can help them

95% of people say yes

The key is following up until they actually start using our services







We set up 4 interviews per day in between the hours of 4:00 and 6:00pm

We will choose one new Cat 3 Re-Engager per week.

After one week, if they don’t hit 60% patch rate, they are out.

For 5 weeks, if they hit high patch rate, we rotate them between Hannah and Cat 1s

We promote one each week to Cat 3 leads and replace our worst AM.











Key Responsibilities:

Proactively follow up on abandoned or inactive leads assigned to account managers.

Present and promote fuel card programs, factoring services, and insurance solutions to potential clients.

Assist customers with the activation of fuel cards and ensure a preferred payment method is added.

Offer factoring services and guide customers through the contract signing process to ensure completion and compliance

Qualifications:

Proven experience in sales, customer retention, or outbound calling (required)

Strong communication and negotiation skills

Confident handling high-volume outbound calls

Goal-oriented, persistent, and able to work independently

Organized and comfortable using CRM tools and office software

Positive attitude and ability to build rapport quickly.

title: Sales And Customer Service Manager
description:
Job Title: Sales And Customer Service Manager



Location: Remote



Hours: Monday-Friday, 8-5 Central Standard Time. Full Time (40 hours per week).



Company Overview



Everblue Pond is based in the United States.



Everblue Pond is a pioneering online pond and lake store dedicated to guiding customers to the right products and solutions. With a focus on selling highly technical products that require intricate electrical configurations, we pride ourselves on our unmatched customer service and technical expertise. Established for 3 years, our mission is to surpass competitors in customer care, embodying values of integrity, strong relationships, and exceptional service. As a small, family-owned business, we uphold the highest standards of ethics and professionalism, striving to build positive and honest relationships with our customers, dealers, and vendors while driving revenue and business growth.



Role Summary



As a key player in our company, the Sales and Customer Service Manager will be the face of Everblue Pond, leading day-to-day operations and driving our mission forward. This role requires a unique blend of tech savvy, sales and customer service skills. You will guide customers through thorough product selection, manage customer service issues, and forge strong supplier and customer relationships—all while operating remotely.



Primary Responsibilities



-Guide customers through the sales process via phone, providing technical advice and solutions while generating and closing sales.

-Handle customer service inquiries, troubleshooting, and warranty claims.

-Develop and maintain relationships with suppliers, HOAs, contractors, and business customers.

-Process orders, fulfillments, and returns through Shopify.

-Create sales materials and update website when needed.

-Participate in and contribute to ongoing training and professional development.



Candidate Requirements



-Strong problem-solving skills and technical aptitude.

-Experience in sales and customer service preferred.

-Ability to learn and apply technical information.

-Proficient in relationship-building and sales closing strategies.

-Self-motivated with extreme ownership, good judgment, and decision-making skills.

-Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, comfortable with confrontation and capable of closing sales.

-Must have a reliable computer and internet connection for remote work.

-A self-starter attitude is critical. We seek someone who actively seeks solutions, approaches challenges creatively, and shows -exceptional judgment in autonomous decision-making while learning quickly.



Benefits/Compensation



-$16,000-$18,000 Salary + Commission (based on monthly sales volume)

-Flexible, remote working environment.

-Opportunities for professional development and growth within the company.

-This will be a Full Time contractor position estimated at 40 working hours per week.



Our Culture



At Everblue Pond, we believe in empowering our team members to make decisions and learn from their experiences. We value open communication, teamwork, and a culture of continuous improvement. Our daily operations are grounded in our core values, and we strive to deliver the “Wow” factor in everything we do.



Application Process



Please follow these directions to apply for this position. Any applications that do not follow these steps will be immediately disqualified.



1.) Send an
 to 

2.) The subject line of your response must be "Sales And Customer Service Manager"

3.) Write one paragraph of 3 lines or less in black font and tell me about yourself.

4.) Write a second paragraph of 3 lines or less in blue size 14 font about why you would be a great fit for this role.

5.) Include your resume as an attachment in the
.



If you're a proactive problem solver with a technical edge and a passion for sales and customer service, we'd love to hear from you! Everblue Pond is more than just a business; it's a family committed to excellence, integrity, and our customers. Join us in making a difference together.



Job Types: Full-time, Contract



Benefits:



-Flexible schedule

-On-the-job training

-Paid time off and paid holidays

-Work from home



Work Location: Remote

title: Sports Scriptwriter for YouTube
description:
About Viral Vault Studios:

Viral Vault Studios is a digital content creation company dedicated to producing educational and entertaining videos on YouTube. Our mission is to make online learning fun and engaging by creating content that captivates and informs global audiences. We focus on high-quality faceless YouTube videos across niches like anime recaps, celebrity health, and more.



About the Role:

We are seeking a YouTube Sports Scriptwriter who can research, conceptualize, and write engaging scripts specifically designed for YouTube videos. You will turn sports stories, breaking news, player profiles, game recaps, and list-style content into compelling scripts that keep viewers watching until the end.



What You’ll Do:

- Write high-retention scripts tailored for YouTube formats (9–12 minutes typical length)

- Create engaging hooks, storytelling arcs, and strong closings

- Research players, teams, leagues, rivalries, and trending sports topics

- Break down complex sports information into entertaining, easy-to-follow narratives

- Develop listicles, “Top 10,” story breakdowns, and documentary-style scripts

- Adapt tone for voiceover narration style content

- Ensure pacing, structure, and viewer engagement techniques are applied

- Collaborate with video editors and thumbnail/title teams

- Revise scripts based on feedback and performance metrics (CTR, AVD, retention)

- Ensure accuracy and original content (no plagiarism)



Topics May Include:

- Basketball, Football/Soccer, American Football

- Boxing/MMA/UFC

- Athlete scandals, comeback stories, and biographies

- Game analyses and highlights

- Sports history deep-dives

- “What happened to…” style content



Qualifications:

- Proven experience writing for YouTube channels (sports niche highly preferred)

- Strong storytelling and conversational writing style

- Ability to write engaging hooks and cliffhangers

- Understanding of YouTube metrics such as watch time, retention, and CTR

- Strong research skills and fact-checking discipline

- Ability to meet deadlines and work with a content calendar

- Portfolio or samples required (sports scripts highly preferred)



Nice to Have:

- Familiarity with narration writing

- Knowledge of YouTube SEO (titles, keywords, audience targeting)

- Passion for sports culture and trends

- Experience working with remote teams



If interested to apply, please submit a sample script of any sports-related topic. Note we will be screening your output for any AI written output. If its 75% AI, you will be disqualified in the process. Put on subject " Applying for Sports Scriptwriter"

 management and follow-up

title: Transaction Coordinator
description:
Job title: Residential Coordinator



We looking for an experienced, organized, and detail-oriented Residential Coordinator to join my team. We manage a property management and investment firm based in Illinois, and I need someone who can take ownership of the applicant lifecycle and ensure our operations run smoothly.



In this role, you’ll be responsible for making sure every applicant is fully qualified according to our policies and local laws. You’ll be the bridge between our leasing department, property managers, and prospective tenants—managing documentation, processing screenings, and ensuring leases are signed and fees are handled correctly in our system. You will also be a key resource for my Property Managers, helping them navigate tenant issues, rent payments, and move-in logistics.



Primary Responsibilities:



- Applicant Relations: I need you to ensure all applications are complete and accurate, collecting state IDs and income verification for every person applying. You’ll handle the full screening process—including background, credit, criminal, and employment checks—while making sure all administrative fees are collected or waived as appropriate.

- Leasing & Data Entry: You will type up leases, complete all necessary paperwork, and input data into Yardi accurately and on time. This includes managing rentable items like parking and storage additions.

- Tenant Relations: You’ll be a primary point of contact for our tenants, helping them understand their leases, answering move-in questions, and guiding them through processes like subletting, reletting, or roommate changes.

- Reporting & Ledgers: I’ll rely on you to assist with updating renewals and market rents, while keeping tenant ledgers fully up to date.

- Internal Collaboration: You’ll stay in close contact with me and the rest of the team to discuss portfolio status and consult on applicant decisions before we finalize any leasing agreements.

- Assist the management team with various tasks as they arise to ensure we stay compliant with company policy and local regulations.

- Attend tea
etings to share best practices and stay aligned on our goals.

- Handle additional projects or tasks as assigned by management.



Qualifications:



-  Communication & Professionalism: You must have strong oral and written communication skills and maintain a professional demeanor at all times.

- Conflict Resolution: I need someone who can stay calm and diffuse customer concerns before they escalate.

- Technical Skills: You should be proficient in Outlook, Word, and Excel. Experience with (or a strong desire to learn) Yardi, RentCafé, Monday, DocuSign, and Mxie is a huge plus.

- Organization: High-level organizational skills and a sharp eye for detail and follow-up are non-negotiable.

- Attitude: You should bring a positive, team-oriented attitude to the desk every day.

- Ability to work during CST Business hours (PH Graveyard Shift)

title: Male Voice YouTube Actor (Anime / General Voice Acting)
description:
About Viral Vault Studios:

Viral Vault Studios is a digital content creation company dedicated to producing educational and entertaining videos on YouTube. Our mission is to make online learning fun and engaging by creating content that captivates and informs global audiences. We focus on high-quality faceless YouTube videos across niches like anime recaps, celebrity health, and more.



Job Overview:

We are looking for a Male Voice Actor with strong skills in anime voice acting, character dubbing, and general voice over work. The ideal candidate can deliver expressive, dynamic, and high-quality audio for anime-style projects, digital media, and storytelling content. This role is perfect for someone passionate about anime characters, voice performance, and remote voice acting.



Key Responsibilities:

- Perform anime-style voices, character voices, and general voice overs based on script direction

- Record clean and high-quality audio using your home studio setup

- Interpret scripts, portray emotions accurately, and follow creative instructions

- Adjust performance based on feedback from the creative team

- Submit recordings on time and communicate any delays

- Maintain consistent audio quality and proper file labeling



Qualifications:

- Preferably male speaking fluent (Native-like) in English with a standard Neutral North American Accent.

- Experience in voice acting, voice over, anime dubbing, or character narration especially in YouTube

- Ability to perform a range of male anime voices—youthful, mature, energetic, soft, dramatic, comedic, etc

- Clear diction, strong emotion delivery, and acting capabilities.

- Must have a quiet recording environment and quality microphone

- Able to basic audio editing skills (Audacity, Adobe Audition, Reaper)

- Ability to follow directions and adapt quickly

- Reliable and responsive remote worker



How to Apply!

Please submit your resume plus 2 Vocaroo links using the scripts below.



Script One:

(Episode 1)

Yuki, a high school loser, complains about how he has to clean the classroom every morning. 

You see, bro is basically a roomba with legs, so everyone dumps the chores on him.

Little bit of context: In this world, all the girls can eat extradimensional peaches and get superpowers, while the boys get nothing except chores and back pain. 



So Yuki, like all the other weaklings, tries to stay useful. One friend asks him to fix a button, so he pulls out his hyper masculine sewing kit and repairs it like a sewing machine. 

We find out his sister taught him to sew by literally choking him out whenever he got it wrong. So yes, his drip and trauma are both hand-stitched.



As he’s walking home, Yuki wonders if his future is just dead end work and sewing forever. 

But before he can sink too deep into his life crisis, a thick fog rolls in and a strong gust throws him off his feet. When it clears, he gets surprise isekai’d, without the help of Truck-kun, into Mato, an alternate dimension full of monsters called Shuki.



If a civilian ends up in Mato, they should stay still and wait for the Demon Defense Force to rescue them. Yuki fully plans to do that, until an off-brand Hollow from Bleach appears. This apparently, is a Shuki. 

Dude runs, hits a dead end, and d
 to get himself killed by throwing a rock at the monster. Just when he starts imagining his body sliced up like sashimi, a girl riding on a Shuki swoops in and saves him.



This is Kiyoka, commander of the Seventh Squadron. She slices up the low-budget demons like she’s doing a murder speedrun any%. Her squad arrives soon after: Himari, who turns her arm into a literal Gatling gun, and Shushu, who can grow in size like Mt. Lady from My Hero Academia. 

Yuki realizes that among all the peach powered girls, these ones are the top shelf.



After they rescue Yuki, as well as a lost kid, more monsters appear. Kiyoka tries to fight but her borrowed “ride” breaks down like a Tesla Model Y. 



Desperate, she gambles and d
 to experiment with her powers. She tells Yuki she needs something from him. Yuki thinks it’s finally his 
nt—romantic? heroic? meaningful? Nope. She needs a slave.



She sticks out her finger, and Yuki goes monkey brain. He LICKS it. Immediately, he transforms into a demon beast that looks like a crossover of a Hollow and a Digimon. The squad is SHOOKT. 

Kiyoka hops on his back and commands him, like a Palworld trainer… if chaining your Pals and submitting them to slavery was your goal.



Yuki wrecks the monsters effortlessly, and even when a giant one appears, bro drills through it like a beyblade and saves the day. When he turns back into his lame ass self, Kiyoka d
 she wants to keep him permanently. But… Every time he fights for her, she must “reward” him. This time, it’s a kiss, and apparently, the more Yuki uses his monster-form, the greater the reward is. (Use the “hehe boah” 
) 



But even the prospect of such a heavenly reward system doesn’t take the baka out of the loser. 

Yuki a
 headbutts her in panic, but she still kisses him anyway, calling him a perv because her powers force her body to react no matter what. 



Yuki, freshly kissed and confused, d
 he wants to become a hero and avenge his sister. Kiyoka takes him to the Demon Defense dorm where he confidently introduces himself… only for the girls to call him “the new caretaker.” Apparently men aren’t allowed on the force. 



So his job is to clean, cook, and obey girls who have never even seen a boy before. Yuki’s dreams shatter into dust as he becomes the squad’s manservant. But at least Kiyoka still believes in him… kind of. She threatens to rip his manhood off if he misbehaves, so that’s supportive, in a way.



Script Two:

From getting into a fight for a bracelet…



To even challenge a well known rapper for a boxing ring to settle their problems.



This is the controversial case of TraxNYC.



Today, TraxNYC is a famous and debated name in the US jewelry scene, with a business valued at over $300 million. 



His journey began far from expensive gems or famous people. Long before the public attention and internet fame, he arrived in New York as a 7 year old refugee. During those years, he did not know much English and had no idea what his future held. The person who eventually created a huge luxury brand started out as a shy boy just trying to get by in a different country.



So, Max Agadjani was born in 1986 in Baku, Azerbaijan. 



At that time, the region was part of the Soviet Union. 



He grew up in a home that seemed very stable. His father was a detective who worked on hom
 cases. His mother was a reporter. They had two good jobs and steady money. Life looked safe on paper. However, the area changed quickly. In 1991, the Soviet Union fell apart. Azerbaijan became its own country almost overnight and political trouble took over. 



The streets that used to feel normal became hard to predict. 



Because the safety his family relied on disappeared so quickly, staying was a risk. Crime was rising. In 1992, his family made a major choice to leave.



("This is the world's first steak cooked on gold. Gold conducts heat faster than any other metal. Therefore, it heats up faster and you could cook the steak three times faster than you would on cast iron. That's why this steak is finished in minutes.")



("I got a 50 g 14k gold nugget that I'm going to give away for free to you. Sir, would you like this gold nugget? Of course not. Anyway, so we've got the gold nugget. Nobody's going to want it. That's one person. If this guy right here doesn't want it, sir, free, then we'll throw it in the wood.")

title: Senior Business Systems Specialist (Client Services)
description:
Job Overview

We are a US-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) seeking a high-level Senior Business Systems Specialist to help us build, lead, and scale our Software Solutions department. This is a unique, multi-disciplinary role designed for a strategic thinker who sits at the intersection of Finance, Business Operations, and Technology.

 

We aren't just looking for an implementer; we are looking for a partner in growth. You will work directly with leadership to build out our service offerings, meet with potential clients to architect solutions, and eventually help us recruit and mentor the team that will execute your vision. If you have a deep understanding of Dynamics 365, a passion for Power BI analytics, and the business acumen to solve complex operational problems, we want to hear from you.

 

Key Responsibilities

*Practice Development & Strategy

  - Partner with leadership to define and build out our Software Solutions Department services and "go-to-market" strategy.

  - Develop standardized implementation methodologies, project templates, and best practices for the team.

  - Identify and vet new tools and integration patterns that can be productized for our client base.



*Presales & Solution Architecture

  - Join leadership in high-level discovery meetings with potential clients to identify pain points and opportunities.

  - Translate business requirements into technical "Proof of Concepts" and high-level solution designs.

  - Lead the technical scoping and pricing of projects, ensuring Scopes of Work (SOWs) are accurate, profitable, and achievable.



*Senior Implementation & Delivery

  - Act as the lead consultant for high-value Dynamics 365 and Power Platform implementations.

  - Architect advanced Power BI reporting suites that provide clients with real-time visibility into their financial and operational health.

  - Oversee complex data migrations and system integrations, ensuring data integrity across the client's tech stack.



*Team Building & Mentorship

  - Help define the roles and skills needed as we scale the Software Solutions department.

  - Assist in the interviewing, hiring, and onboarding of junior specialists and engineers.

  - Provide technical mentorship and "over-the-shoulder" guidance to ensure high-quality delivery across all projects.



*Operational & Financial Consulting

  - Use your understanding of business operations and finance to advise clients on process improvements (e.g., automated billing, inventory management, financial consolidation).

  - Ensure system configurations align with GAAP/audit requirements and support the client's long-term scalability.

 

Required Qualifications

* Experience: 7–10+ years in business systems consulting, solution architecture, or IT leadership (MSP or Professional Services experience is a major plus).

* Business & Finance Acumen: A strong understanding of core business operations and accounting principles (P&L, Cash Flow, AP/AR, and operational workflows).

* Dynamics 365 Mastery: Proven track record of architecting and implementing Dynamics 365 environments.

* Power BI Expertise: Advanced skills in data modeling and creating executive-level dashboards.

* Presales & Scoping: Experience meeting with clients, identifying needs, and building out detailed project scopes and pricing models.

* Leadership Mindset: A desire to move beyond "doing the work" into building a practice and leading a team.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

* Professional accounting background or deep experience with ERP financial modules.

* Experience with the broader Microsoft Power Platform (Power Apps, Power Automate).

* Previous experience in a "Founding" or "Lead" role within a growing technical practice.

 

What Success Looks Like in This Role

* Phase 1: You are successfully co-leading sales meetings, closing new projects, and delivering high-value implementations.

* Phase 2: You have established a repeatable "playbook" for our business systems offerings and project delivery.

* Phase 3: You are leading a small, high-performing team of specialists, allowing you to focus more on strategy, high-level architecture, and practice growth.



Why Join Us?

We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:

* Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

* Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

* Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

* Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?

* Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

* Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

* Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

* Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply:

If you’re ready to take your career to the next level as a Senior Business Systems Specialist, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (2027) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



The working hours for this role are 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM CST Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Junior Systems Administrator (Client Services)

title: Cybersecurity Engineer
description:
We are seeking a skilled and motivated Cybersecurity Engineer to join our team. As a Cybersecurity Engineer, you will play a critical role in protecting our clients’ IT environments by identifying vulnerabilities, implementing security measures, and responding to potential threats.



This is an exciting opportunity to work in a dynamic and collaborative environment, where you’ll help safeguard businesses from cyber risks while growing your expertise in the ever-evolving field of cybersecurity.

 to identify potential threats.

, providing detailed reports and recommendations.

* Stay up-to-date with the latest cybersecurity trends, threats, and technologies.

mbers and clients on cybersecurity best practices.

 response.

title: Reddit Sales Appointment Setter (Remote)
description:
Fractional Reddit Sales Appointment Setter (Remote)



Type: Part-Time / Fractional (10–20 hrs/week)

Location: Remote



About the Role



We are seeking a highly experienced Reddit-native appointment setter to drive lead generation and booked calls through strategic, relationship-first engagement on Reddit.



This role requires someone who deeply understands Reddit culture, behavior, and platform dynamics — and knows how to generate conversations and convert them into qualified calls without triggering spam filters or damaging account trust.



This is not a mass outreach role. Precision, timing, and authenticity are critical.



What You’ll Do

1. Community Engagement & Positioning

Identify and actively engage in high-value subreddits relevant to founders, entrepreneurs, and business owners

Contribute thoughtful, insight-driven comments that build credibility and trust

Position yourself as a knowledgeable, helpful voice within conversations



2. Lead Identification

Monitor threads for high-intent signals (hiring needs, scaling challenges, operational bottlenecks)

Identify qualified prospects organically through conversations



3. Warm Outreach & Conversation Management

Transition from public engagement to private messages naturally

Send highly personalized, context-based DMs (no scripts, no copy/paste)

Build genuine conversations that lead to interest



4. Appointment Setting

Qualify leads efficiently

Guide conversations toward a booked discovery call

Coordinate and confirm scheduled calls



5. Account Health & Growth

Maintain and grow Reddit account credibility (karma, engagement, trust signals)

Operate within Reddit’s guidelines to avoid restrictions or bans

Continuously refine approach based on performance and platform behavior

Non-Negotiable Requirements

5+ years of active Reddit experience (personal or professional)

Deep understanding of Reddit culture, etiquette, and unwritten rules

Proven ability to engage without appearing promotional or spammy

Strong written communication skills (clear, natural, human tone)

Ability to think critically and respond contextually (no templated responses)

Ideal Candidate

Has successfully generated leads or built influence through Reddit

Understands how to balance value, timing, and conversion

Can read between the lines in conversations and identify intent quickly

Operates with discretion and professionalism

Success Metrics

Qualified conversations started

Calls booked per week

Conversion rate from comment ? DM ? call

Account health and growth (karma, engagement quality)

Compensation

Competitive hourly or retainer (based on experience)

Performance-based incentives tied to booked calls



How to Apply



Please include:



- A brief summary of your Reddit experience (5+ years required)

- Examples of subreddits you actively engage in

- Screenshots or links demonstrating your activity/karma (if available)

- Any experience with lead generation or appointment setting

title: Financial Modeling and Unit Economics Analyst
description:

Develop revenue forecasts based on client growth, seat expansion, and pricing assumptions

Create hiring forecasts aligned with operational growth and projected demand

Build scenario models to evaluate different growth paths, margin expansion opportunities, and operational changes

Model the financial impact of operational metrics such as utilization, retention, and time-to-fill

Translate business and operational assumptions into clear, logical financial frameworks

Design dashboards and reporting views that make financial insights easily understandable for leadership

Document model assumptions, logic, and key drivers to ensure transparency and usability

Continuously refine models as new data becomes available and business needs evolve



Qualifications:

Minimum 2–4 years of experience in financial modeling, FP&A, or analytical roles

Experience building financial models for startups, SaaS, or service-based businesses preferred

Strong proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets (must be comfortable building models from scratch)

Strong analytical and structured thinking skills with attention to detail

Ability to simplify complex financial concepts and communicate insights clearly

Comfort working in a fast-paced, evolving environment with incomplete data



Requirements:

Availability to work in U.S. business hours

Availability to start within 2 weeks from job offer

Comfortable working with time tracker

Has own work equipment with at least 8 GB RAM, i5 processor or equivalent, and Windows 11

Has at least 50 Mbps of internet

Has a working camera and noise-cancelling headphones

Has backup equipment in cases of power and internet outages



To apply, please send your resum.e to G.Mail: goldenburg.business

title: HR / Recruiting & Placement Assistant in Healthcare, Nanny Agency or Home Care Services Industry
description:
Apex Social brings together experienced educators, therapists and care providers with families who have special care needs and provides personal & career development through a unique, collaborative work experience for Care Professionals in a new state or new country. 



Our Mission 

-Unlocking children’s greatest potential through integrating skilled Care Professionals into their family’s daily life.

-Empowering Children to develop to their fullest abilities. 

-Empowering Care Professionals by providing personal & career development, experiential learning and cultural enrichment through a unique, collaborative work experience. 

-Empowering Families by providing specialized, skilled child care and cultural exchange in the home through an individualized recruiting and matching process. 

-Empowering Schools & Universities by providing career coaching and support for their students and alumni to gain interdisciplinary paid work experience & continuing education in Germany, the United States and Australia.

-Empowering Tea
mbers by providing a collaborative, remote work environment with opportunities for training and growth as well as a commitment to our mission ensuring that we find purpose, fulfillment and a sense of belonging in our careers.



Role Summary: 

We are seeking a Matching & Transition Experience Virtual Assistant who supports the Director of Matching with families and care professionals – not only during matching, but through the critical transition phases before and after arrival. This role ensures that no one feels unsure, forgotten, or unsupported during 
nts of change.

You will help create a smooth, reassuring experience for:

          - Apex Care Professionals (ACPs) arriving into a new role

          - Families welcoming an ACP (first-time or returning)



This role combines clear communication, empathy, process awareness, and systems thinking, and plays a key role in strengthening trust and satisfaction during transitions.



Key Responsibilities

Matching Communication & Weekly Updates

-Prepare and send clear, thoughtful matching-related communications to families and Apex Care Professionals

-Ensure each family and ACP in matching receives a weekly status update, including:

     -What actions were taken that week

     -What progress was made

     -What steps are next

-Reduce uncertainty during waiting periods by maintaining consistent communication



Transition & Arrival Support

-Support pre-arrival and post-arrival transitions for both families and ACPs

-Proactively check in with:

-ACPs before arrival to confirm readiness, expectations, and key logistics

-Families preparing for a new or first ACP to ensure clarity and confidence

-Send practical tips, reminders, and guidance tailored to the transition stage, such as:

    -What to expect in the first days and weeks

     -Common adjustment phases

     -Communication best practices during early placement

-Conduct follow-up check-ins after arrival to identify concerns early and escalate if needed



Experience Optimization & Relationship Continuity

-Help families and ACPs feel seen, supported, and informed throughout matching and transition

-Provide an additional layer of human connection without replacing the Director of Matching

-Ensure continuity so that handoffs between matching and post-arrival support feel seamless



Process, Data & AI Support

-Track transition stages and communication touchpoints

-Use AI tools (Hormozi Gem, ChatGPT, Google Gemini, etc.) to draft, personalize, and improve communications

-Maintain templates while tailoring messaging to individual situations

-Identify recurring questions, friction points, or gaps in the transition experience

-Suggest improvements to workflows, templates, and timing of outreach



Cross-Team Collaboration

-Coordinate closely with the Director of Matching and internal teams

-Ensure communications align with current status, expectations, and decisions

-Escalate concerns or red flags promptly and clearly



Required Skills & Experience:

-Strong written English with a warm, professional, and reassuring tone

-High emotional intelligence and empathy

-Comfortable managing multiple families and CPs simultaneously

-Strong organizational and follow-through skills

-Confidence using AI tools and structured data to support communication

-Interest in process improvement and experience design



Personality Fit

-Calm, proactive, and people-centered

-Enjoys guiding others through change

-Comfortable reaching out, checking in, and following up

-Thinks in systems but communicates like a human



With minimum of 3 years work experience as Executive Assistant or the same

BA or higher post secondary degree 

3-5 years work experience in recruiting and placement management 

Proficient in Google workspace and CRM 



Work Hours: 8am-4pm EST (work weekends - hours vary)

title: Founder Operations & Systems Assistant
description:
Work Directly With the Founder. Own the Details. Build the Systems.



We’re hiring someone who can operate at two speeds:



Fast and organized on day-to-day execution

Structured and thoughtful when building systems behind the scenes



This is not a typical Executive Assistant role.

This is not an engineering role.



You’ll work directly with the founder to keep everything moving while also helping build the internal systems that make the company run.



If you like ownership, clarity, and figuring things out, keep reading.



What You’ll Do



1. Executive Support (Execution Mode)



Manage the founder’s calendar and inbox

Track tasks, follow-ups, and commitments

Keep priorities clear and moving forward

Make sure nothing slips



2. Systems & Operations (Builder Mode)



Build and maintain Zapier automations (logic will be provided)

Manage Mailchimp automations (flows, triggers, not copywriting)

Support WordPress sites and WPForms

Organize workflows in Trello

Use ChatGPT to troubleshoot and improve systems



3. Documentation (Clarity Mode)



Create SOPs for everything we build

Turn messy processes into clean, repeatable systems



4. Light Design



Use Canva to clean up slides and simple visuals

Tools You Should Already Be Comfortable With

Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Docs, Sheets)

Trello

Canva

ChatGPT



Strong plus if you’ve used:



Zapier

Mailchimp automations

WordPress

WPForms

Who This Is For

You like working directly with a founder

You don’t need constant direction

You enjoy systems, tools, and problem-solving

You’re calm under pressure and don’t drop balls

You learn new tools fast

You want a long-term role where you grow with the company

Who This Is NOT For

You only want admin work

You avoid technical tools

You need step-by-step instructions for everything

You struggle to manage multiple moving parts

Important



This role blends execution and systems.



You will be expected to:



Stay organized under pressure

Learn tools quickly

Follow processes exactly

Help improve systems over time



At SO Good, we value people who take ownership, move fast, and figure things out.



How to Apply:

* Your resume

* A short 2–3 minute voice or video recording introducing yourself and explaining why you’re a good fit for this role.

Communication skills

Dealing with difficult people

Workplace conflict and emotional intelligence

We will provide most of the copy, messaging, and creative direction. Your role is to execute, manage, and optimise LinkedIn campaigns to drive registrations and results.

title: Full-Time Video Editor for Ecom Brand
description:
Hey — I’m Karos. I’m 17, and I’m running a 7-figure e-commerce brand. This is not a corporate, LinkedIn-style job post. No fluff. No buzzwords. No BS. I’m looking for a full-time Video Editor who understands direct response and actually cares about performance. This is not a “just cut clips together” role. This is about making ads that perform.



I’m building fast and I’m obsessed with results. This is only the beginning. If you join now, you’re not just editing videos — you’re growing with me, long-term. This is NOT a short-term gig. It’s a chance to build something real together.



What you’ll be doing:

Editing direct-response video ads (Meta-focused)

Creating high-converting ads, not just aesthetic edits

Producing 3 hooks per video

Turning our raw ideas + strategy into scroll-stopping creatives

Using AI tools like ElevenLabs and AI Personas where it makes sense

Iterating based on performance data

Working directly with me — fast feedback, fast decisions

Helping push the brand from “doing well” to dominating



VERY Highly valued skill:

- AI: Experience with tools like HeyGen, Google Veo, Kling, Nano Banana

Candidates with this skill set will have a strong advantage.



Who I’m looking for:

You’ve edited direct-response ads for e-commerce brands

You understand performance, not just visuals

You have a STRONG EYE for details

You’re fast, disciplined, and competitive

You care about results and high standards

You want to work exclusively on one brand and help grow it

If you want something slow, safe, and corporate — this isn’t for you.



Compensation:

Full-time, remote role

Base salary depends on experience and skill

Performance-based bonuses tied directly to ad results

For strong performers, monthly bonuses can realistically reach around $1,000, depending on output and performance. There’s no fixed cap — results drive upside. If you make winning ads, you make more money. When the brand wins, you win.



The Big opportunity:

This starts as a Video Editor role, but there’s room to grow. If you consistently deliver, understand what’s working, and show good judgment over time, you can move into a better role with more responsibility and higher pay. I’m building brands for the long run and looking for people who want stability, ownership, and multi-year collaboration, not constant job hopping.



Application process (important):

To filter unserious applicants, start your message with:

“I create high-converting creatives.”

Then include:

Your experience with video editing & direct response ads

Whether you have AI experience

Links to relevant e-commerce ad work (portfolio)

Your availability and start date

Why you want to work with us



If this resonates and you’d thrive in this environment, D
 and I’ll get back to you.

Speak soon, Karos

title: Full-Time Video Editor
description:
Hey — I’m Karos. I’m 17, and I’m running a 7-figure e-commerce brand. This is not a corporate, LinkedIn-style job post. No fluff. No buzzwords. No BS. I’m looking for a full-time Video Editor who understands direct response and actually cares about performance. This is not a “just cut clips together” role. This is about making ads that perform.



I’m building fast and I’m obsessed with results. This is only the beginning. If you join now, you’re not just editing videos — you’re growing with me, long-term. This is NOT a short-term gig. It’s a chance to build something real together.



What you’ll be doing:

Editing direct-response video ads (Meta-focused)

Creating high-converting ads, not just aesthetic edits

Producing 3 hooks per video

Turning our raw ideas + strategy into scroll-stopping creatives

Using AI tools like ElevenLabs and AI Personas where it makes sense

Iterating based on performance data

Working directly with me — fast feedback, fast decisions

Helping push the brand from “doing well” to dominating



VERY Highly valued skill:

- AI: Experience with tools like HeyGen, Google Veo, Kling, Nano Banana

Candidates with this skill set will have a strong advantage.



Who I’m looking for:

You’ve edited direct-response ads for e-commerce brands

You understand performance, not just visuals

You have a STRONG EYE for details

You’re fast, disciplined, and competitive

You care about results and high standards

You want to work exclusively on one brand and help grow it

If you want something slow, safe, and corporate — this isn’t for you.



Compensation:

Full-time, remote role

Base salary depends on experience and skill

Performance-based bonuses tied directly to ad results

For strong performers, monthly bonuses can realistically reach around $1,000, depending on output and performance. There’s no fixed cap — results drive upside. If you make winning ads, you make more money. When the brand wins, you win.



The Big opportunity:

This starts as a Video Editor role, but there’s room to grow. If you consistently deliver, understand what’s working, and show good judgment over time, you can move into a better role with more responsibility and higher pay. I’m building brands for the long run and looking for people who want stability, ownership, and multi-year collaboration, not constant job hopping.



Application process (important):

To filter unserious applicants, start your message with:

“I create high-converting creatives.”

Then include:

Your experience with video editing & direct response ads

Whether you have AI experience

Links to relevant e-commerce ad work (portfolio)

Your availability and start date

Why you want to work with us



If this resonates and you’d thrive in this environment, D
 and I’ll get back to you.

Speak soon, Karos

title: Sales and Support for High Growth Cleaning Company (Part Time)
description:
We are a US-based house cleaning company looking for a part-time, home-based Virtual Assistant to support our customer service and operations team. This role will start part-time covering our weekday shift from 5pm-8pm central time and Sunday 8:30am-5pm central time.



Your daily responsibilities would include:

- Send a daily report detailing completed and ongoing tasks.

- Respond to customer questions via phone call,
, live chat,
 messenger, or SMS.

- Take inbound customer service and scheduling requests and make occasional outbound calls.

- Provide service quotes & make sure to follow up with leads.

- Book new jobs, reschedule &/or update service jobs in our booking calendar system.

- Communicate with cleaners and track job progress.

- Hire cleaners

- Flag any urgent issues, customer escalations, or last-minute cleaner problems.



We are invested in our agent’s success. You will go far if you are/have:

- 2-3 years of customer service or VA experience

- A fast learner

- A great communicator

- Calm and collected under pressure

- Highly detail-oriented

- Able to work independently and escalate when needed

- A self-starter who enjoys working remotely

- You need to have excellent English skills.



Work hours during training will be flexible, approximately 10–20 hours per week during Central Time business hours. After that, you will continue on a long-term basis with weekday evenings 5pm-8pm and a Sunday shift 8:30am-5pm central time (20 hours/week or more where needed).



Pay is $4–5.5/hr to start, with raises based on performance.



If accepted, you will be provided with training to help respond to customer queries via phone call,
, live chat,
 messenger, & SMS.



How to Apply:

Send an
 to 
 with the subject line: “I want to be a virtual assistant”. Please include a link to your OnlineJobs.ph profile and your resume within the
 when you apply, then complete the Google form you will receive in an
.



Note: After you send the
 to apply, you will receive a response fro
 with a link to a Google form. Please complete the questions in the Google form to be considered for this position. Forms that are not completed or only partially completed will not be considered. In the form, you will be asked your age. Answer 40 to prove you are paying attention to detail.



I look forward to working with you!

title: Social Media Associate
description:
PLEASE COPY & PASTE THIS LINK TO APPLY:

hire.li/ZnupsBKbioll9IUDj29LR



ABOUT US:

The MVMT Team at EXP Realty, a top-performing real estate team in New York City, is expanding and looking for a highly skilled Social Media Associate to join our team. With a strong presence in the NYC real estate market, we’re committed to driving engagement and creating meaningful connections through our social media pillars: Education, Empowerment, Entertainment, and Community. If you’re passionate about crafting content that aligns with these pillars and can execute impactful strategies, this is your chance to shape our digital footprint.



QUALIFICATIONS:

2+ years of social media management experience.

Bachelor's degree

Passion for social media, staying ahead of trends, and creating innovative content.

Expertise with tools such as Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, Canva, and Adobe Creative Suite.

Proficiency in AI assistive tools (ChatGPT, HeyGen, etc.)

Strong communication and collaboration skills to work across teams.

Proven ability to independently juggle multiple projects and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

A keen interest in real estate and community engagement is a plus.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Manage the team’s presence on
, Instagram, LinkedIn, and other key platforms.

Develop and maintain a robust social media content calendar that incorporates the MVMT Team’s social media pillars:

Education: Provide valuable real estate insights and industry knowledge.

Empowerment: Share motivational content to inspire clients, agents, and followers.

Entertainment: Craft engaging and creative content that resonates with our audience.

Community: Highlight our events, team culture, and contributions to NYC neighborhoods.

Build and execute cross-channel social media strategies aligned with team goals.

Lead content ideation, scheduling, and community management for targeted audiences.

Plan and execute social strategies for seasonal and promotional campaigns.

Analyze performance metrics and present monthly progress reports with actionable recommendations.



REQUIREMENTS:

Reliable internet connection (50+ Mbps preferred).

Noise-canceling headset for clear communication.

Flexibility to work during EST time zone hours.

Backup power supply in case of power outage

Comfortable being on camera during the entire shift

Can deliver 10 posts per day and make sure to preload posts 1 month advance

We’re looking for someone who embodies creativity, ownership, and precision. This role is perfect for someone who thrives on bringing brand stories to life through compelling social media strategies. If you’re excited to champion the MVMT Team’s pillars and help elevate our digital presence, we’d love to have you on board!

mbers when needed

title: Senior SEO and Marketing Specialist
description:
Job Summary

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Senior SEO Specialist to join our dynamic CNSS marketing team. The ideal candidate will have a deep understanding of search engine optimization strategies and techniques, with a proven track record of driving organic traffic and improving search rankings. This role requires a blend of technical expertise and creative problem-solving skills to enhance our online presence and maximize the effectiveness of our digital marketing efforts.



TRACKING SOFTWARE IS MANDATORY FOR ALL OUR EMPLOYEES. WE USE TERAMIND



Duties

Minimum 3 years of experience

Develop and implement comprehensive SEO strategies to increase organic search visibility and traffic.

Conduct keyword research to identify high-value opportunities for content creation and optimization.

Analyze website performance using tools such as Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Tag Manager to monitor traffic trends and user behavior.

Optimize website content, structure, and on-page elements (including HTML, CSS, and JavaScript) for improved search engine rankings.

Collaborate with the content team to create SEO-friendly content that aligns with business goals and audience needs.

Perform technical SEO audits to identify issues affecting site performance and provide actionable recommendations for improvement.

Stay updated on industry trends, algorithm changes, and best practices in SEO to ensure ongoing optimization efforts are effective.

Manage E-commerce SEO initiatives to enhance product visibility and drive sales through organic search channels.

Utilize Adobe tools for design enhancements that support SEO strategies.

Build high-quality backlinks and improve domain authority

Plan, launch, and manage Google Ads campaigns

Requirements



Proven experience as an SEO Specialist or similar role, with a strong portfolio demonstrating successful projects.

Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and WordPress; familiarity with website development is a plus.

Experience with E-commerce platforms and optimizing product listings for search engines.

In-depth knowledge of Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Google Tag Manager, and other relevant SEO tools.

Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret data and make data-driven decisions.

Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to collaborate effectively across teams.

A proactive approach to problem-solving with attention to detail.

If you are passionate about SEO and eager to make a significant impact in a fast-paced environment, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity.

title: SEO Specialist for Content
description:
This role is focused on keyword research and on-page SEO, with a strong emphasis on supporting scalable, high-quality content production.

You will support content workflows by handling keyword research, SEO optimization, and assisting with blog production when needed. This role plays a key part in ensuring content is aligned with search intent and optimized for performance.
