Conduct high-volume keyword research to support blog and content production

Build keyword lists, content briefs, and search intent analysis

Execute on-page SEO including meta data, headers, internal linking, and content structure

Work closely with the Content Team to ensure SEO is applied across all content

Support the blog pipeline with SEO recommendations and optimization

What We’re Looking For:

Strong experience in keyword research and on-page SEO

Familiarity with tools like Ahrefs, SEMrush, and Google Search Console

Strong organization and ability to follow structured workflows

Comfortable working across SEO and content teams



Nice to Have:

Role Structure:

Works day-to-day within the Content Team’s blog pipeline

Starts as part-time with strong potential to scale quickly to full-time

title: Short Form Content Editor/Assistant
description:
We’re hiring a reliable Short-Form Video Editor + Virtual Assistant to support multiple clients across different niches. This role is part-time to start, with the opportunity to grow into more hours as you prove consistency and quality.



What you’ll do



1) Short-form video editing (primary)

 • Edit content optimized for Instagram Reels / YouTube Shorts (15–90 seconds)

 • Add captions, emojis, zooms, b-roll, sound effects, and music

 • Match pacing and style to the client’s brand

 • Export in the correct formats (9:16, high quality, platform-ready)

2) Content research + idea generation

 • Research competitors and trends in different niches (depends on the client)

 • Find high-performing content examples and break down why they work

 • Generate content ideas + hooks (and organize them clearly)

3) Assistant / operations support

 • Organize content systems in Notion

 • Help with simple tasks in Google Suite (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

 • Basic Instagram DM management (responding, labeling, organizing, tracking)

 • Keep things organized and on schedule

Required skills

 • Strong short-form editing ability + good taste (pacing, storytelling, retention)

 • Experience using Adobe Premiere Pro and/or Instagram Edits

 • Comfortable working inside Notion

 • Comfortable using Google Docs / Sheets / Drive

 • Able to do independent research (not just “random ideas” — real research)

 • Great communication, fast turnaround, attention to detail

 • Fluent English

Bonus skills (not required, but appreciated)

 • Basic understanding of viral concepts and formats

 • Understanding of hooks, retention editing, and viral structure

 • Familiarity with multiple niches (fitness, business, combat sports, real estate, etc.)

title: Amazon Vendor Central Catalog Specialist
description:
Vendor Central Catalog Specialist

Up to $1,600 Monthly + Benefits



We are looking for a Vendor Central Catalog Specialist to help manage catalogs on 
. We are looking for someone who understands the importance of optimized product detail pages and how to help us win the digital shelf through best-in-class product content. The successful candidate will spend most of their time within the 
 Seller Central or Vendor Central portal, ensuring digital merchandising strategy is best in class. We are looking for someone with strong attention to detail and firm knowledge of how to create new product listings and variation families, upload digital content, and audit detail pages for accuracy. If you are excited about working in a fast-moving space with an opportunity to expand skills on Amazon as well as across other ecommerce platforms, this is the perfect job for you.



Responsibilities

*Work with client success managers (CSMs) and account directors (ADs) to implement the product detail page changes for clients on Amazon.

*Communicate directly with the team on tasks related to catalog optimization efforts.

*Monitor product sales and trends using the proprietary sales and reporting dashboard.

*Collect product data and organize it into the product management software.

*Create, optimize, and upload listing content—titles, bullet points, and descriptions.

*Upload enhanced digital assets created by the internal creative team—A+ content, videos, images, and brand stores.

*Run product page diagnostics on existing products on Amazon to determine the accuracy of the content.

*Conduct product and competitor research to aid in executing an effective listing strategy.

*Monitor both account and listing health closely to limit listing and account downtime.

*Report product pages that fraudulently use the clients' trademarks or copyrighted material.

*Respond to buyer messages in a timely manner while providing excellent customer service.

*Maintain current knowledge of Amazon's policies and best practices for product listings.

*Other responsibilities that come when working with a growing agency.



Successful Candidates

*2–5+ years’ experience working with and on 
 (Vendor Central and Seller Central).

*Proficient in both Seller Central and Vendor Central, with a primary focus on the Vendor Central catalog.

*Bonus points for experience working on international catalogs in Vendor Central.

*Knowledge of the Amazon back-end and the ability to load new products, create variations, fix suppressed listings, upload creative content, and do other similar work within the Amazon portal.

*An extreme eye for detail with impeccable organization skills.

*Proficient multitasker with the ability to manage many tasks at once.

*Ability to work in a collaborative environment.

*A problem solver who can work with the many challenges and inconsistencies the Amazon platform provides.

*English speaking—an effective and timely communicator.

*Proficient in Microsoft Excel.

*Bachelor’s degree in business, marketing, or a related field is preferred.



Benefits

*3 weeks of PTO

*10 holidays

*2 personal days



Please send your application to 
 using the answer to '1,782/54x720+14.98+22' as the subject line.

title: Executive Assistant – Operational Support
description:
We are looking for a highly organized, proactive Virtual Assistant to support daily operations and ensure consistent follow-through across the business.

This role goes beyond completing tasks, you will help bring structure, clarity, and accountability to a fast-moving environment. You will act as the central point of coordination, ensuring communication is clear, priorities are tracked, and nothing falls through the cracks.



This role operates within 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST.

Compensation is hourly and based on active work performed.

Availability during this window is expected, with flexibility depending on workload. When work is light, you may shift focus to other commitments or coordinate an early clock-out. Work load is expected to increase with integration and  as trust is built. 



Qualifications:

Character – High Trust

 You are reliable and honest.  You handle responsibility with care, especially when managing sensitive business information.

Teachable – Humility

You are open to feedback, willing to learn, and able to adjust quickly.

Competence – Experience

You have experience in administrative, operational, or coordination roles and can confidently manage tasks, communication, and organization.

This role involves access to highly sensitive business information. Integrity, discretion, and consistency are non-negotiable.



Core Responsibilities:

Track tasks, deadlines, and follow-ups across the business

Ensure consistent execution through reminders, check-ins, and accountability

Manage and organize communication 
, messaging, team coordination)

Support scheduling, logistics, and daily operational flow

Maintain accurate records, reports, and internal tracking systems

Monitor key items (documents, deadlines, reporting) and flag issues early

Identify gaps or breakdowns and bring proactive solutions



What Success Looks Like:

Nothing is missed, dropped, or forgotten

Communication is clear, timely, and proactive

The business operates with greater structure and consistency

The owner is able to stay focused, prepared, and ahead



****Application Requirements:*** 

To be considered, please complete all of the following:

1. Loom Video (2–3 minutes)

      Please submit a Loom video answering:

      1. Tell us about something you genuinely enjoy or are passionate about (not work-related)

      2. Why does it matter to you?

      3. How do you personally track tasks, manage workflows, and keep yourself accountable?



2. Written Response (3–5 sentences)

Describe a time when something was at risk of falling through the cracks.

 What did you do to ensure it was handled successfully?  (3-5 Sentences)



Why This Role Matters

This role is built on a simple principle: when the leader is supported well, the entire business benefits. Your role is to help create that support.

By bringing consistency and  follow-through, you allow the owner to focus on leading, making decisions, and showing up well. When you do this role well, you are not just completing tasks, you are helping someone operate at a higher level. Their success becomes your success.

If you’re someone who takes pride in doing things well, communicates clearly, and values being someone others can rely on, we’d love to hear from you. Please send us a message with your loom link, written response and your
.

title: Billing and Claims Assistant
description:
Job Summary:

We are seeking a detail-oriented and organized Billing and Claims Assistant to support our billing operations within the ABA therapy space. This role is responsible for assisting with insurance claims processing, payment posting, eligibility verification, and resolving billing discrepancies. The ideal candidate has experience working with ABA providers, understands the insurance billing lifecycle, and can manage multiple tasks while maintaining accuracy and compliance. Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to communicate professionally with internal teams and insurance payers are essential.



Key Responsibilities:



Prepare, submit, and track insurance claims for ABA therapy services.



Review claims for accuracy and completeness prior to submission.



Follow up with insurance companies on unpaid or denied claims.



Assist with claim corrections, resubmissions, and appeals when necessary.



Post insurance and patient payments accurately into the billing system.



Reconcile billing reports and assist with identifying discrepancies.



Verify patient insurance eligibility and benefits as needed.



Maintain accurate billing records and documentation in accordance with company policies and payer requirements.



Communicate with internal teams regarding claim status, missing documentation, or billing updates.



Assist with maintaining organized records of authorizations, claims, and payment history.



Support the billing team with administrative tasks and reporting.



Qualifications:



Previous experience in medical billing, claims processing, or revenue cycle support, preferably in ABA therapy or behavioral health.



Familiarity with insurance claims processes, EOBs, and denial management.



Experience working with Medicaid, commercial insurance, or behavioral health payers is preferred.



Strong attention to detail and accuracy when handling financial and patient data.



Excellent organizational and time-management skills.



Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.



Strong written and verbal communication skills.



Proficiency with billing software, EHR systems, and Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets.



Benefits:**

Fully remote:

Salary - $5 per hour

Opportunities for professional development and growth.

Dynamic and supportive work environment.

Full time, Monday to Friday, 9AM - 5PM EST

Job Security and Stability

PTO

Inclusive Culture

Upskilling Opportunities

100% Work-From-Home

Exceptionally Supportive Team

Opportunities for Career Growth

USB Headset with Noise Cancellation feature

Working Webcam

Computer with at least 1.8 GHz processor and at least 4GB RAM

Main Internet Service Speed: at least 25 Mbps cable connection

Backup Internet Service Speed: at least 10 Mbps

etings as needed

TV and screen replacements

Pay:

Role specialization as the team expands

Long-term, stable position

Expand your skills beyond editing

Your resume

title: E-Commerce Operations Manager - Right Hand to the Founder
description:
We're a fast-growing Danish multi-brand e-commerce company, and we're looking for someone to work directly alongside the founder as his right hand. You'll own workflows, solve problems, and help scale a multi-brand operation - with real responsibility from the start.

We're looking for someone who has already owned something. Not just followed instructions, but actually taken a messy process, figured out what was broken, and made it work better. The specific tools don't matter as much as the mindset - if you've done it before in any context, you can do it here.

The founder works closely with the team and will give you direct access to learn AI tools, automation, and advanced e-commerce strategy. We invest in the people who invest in us.

OUR CULTURE

We're a small, friendly team that genuinely enjoys working together. Everyone is supportive, always ready to help each other out, and we celebrate wins together. You'll be joining a warm, positive environment where your ideas matter and your growth is a priority. We also pay a Christmas bonus to show our appreciation for the people who help build this company.

WHAT YOU'LL DO



Manage and optimize daily e-commerce operations across multiple brands

Own workflows end-to-end - inventory, fulfillment, influencer coordination, supplier communication

Build and improve processes and automations (n8n, Make, AI tools)

Spot problems early and come back with solutions

Handle whatever needs handling - the scope evolves as the business grows, and you'll grow with it



WHO YOU ARE



Excellent English, written and spoken. Clear, confident communication is the one thing we won't compromise on.

You've owned something before. Maybe you managed operations for an e-commerce brand, ran a team's workflows, or built a system from scratch. You can point to something real and say "I did that."

A critical thinker who enjoys solving problems, not just flagging them.

Detail-oriented and precise. You take pride in getting things right.

You're energized by change. New tools, shifting priorities, and learning new things excite you rather than stress you out.

Experience with Shopify, Klaviyo, Google Sheets, or automation tools is a strong plus.



WHAT YOU'LL GET



Direct collaboration with the founder - strategy, AI tools, automation, and business growth

A path to become a top 1% AI-powered operator

A supportive team that has your back from day one

Real ownership with room to grow into a senior role

$8-$12/hour with raises tied to performance, plus a Christmas bonus



How to Apply



Applications that do not include ALL of the following will not be considered.



Your application MUST include:



A short Loom video - Link to Google Drive video is also OK (2-3 minutes max). Introduce yourself in English. Tell us what you like to do when you're not working. Then tell us why you're excited about this role and why you believe you're the right fit. This is how we evaluate your English and communication skills. Do NOT use a script. If we can tell you're reading from a script, your application will be disqualified - and yes, we can tell.



Your Tony Robbins DISC profile - Share your PDF result as a Google Drive link, set to 'anyone with link can view'. It must be the Tony Robbins assessment specifically. Take it for free here: 
/disc. Applications without this will be automatically archived.



Include the magic word 'UNICORN' in the Subject line field of your application - not in the application text itself. This tells us you've actually read the full job posting. Applications without this will be archived and not be opened or read.

title: Junior Personal Assistant (Remote - Work Directly With Founder)
description:
JUNIOR PERSONAL ASSISTANT

Remote • Full-Time • $3-$6/hour • No Experience Needed

Hi! I'm the founder of a growing Danish e-commerce company, and I'm looking for a junior assistant to work directly with me every day. I don't care about your experience, your degree, or your CV. I care about you.

If you're someone who learns fast, works hard, and genuinely wants to grow, keep reading. This might be the opportunity that changes your career.

WHAT MAKES THIS ROLE DIFFERENT

Most VA jobs give you a task list and expect you to follow it. This is the opposite. You'll work side by side with me, and I'll personally teach you:



How to use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, automation) to work 10x faster than most people

E-commerce operations, marketing, and business strategy

How to build systems, workflows, and automations

Skills that will make you one of the most valuable operators in the Philippines



I've done this before with my current team, and they'll tell you the same thing: you'll learn more here in 6 months than most people learn in years. This is not just a job, it's a launchpad.

WHAT YOU'LL HELP WITH



Day-to-day operations across multiple e-commerce brands

Managing tasks, coordinating with tea
mbers, and keeping things organized

Learning and using AI tools to handle tasks faster and smarter

Communicating with suppliers, influencers, and partners

Whatever needs doing. The role will grow and change as you grow, and that's the point.



WHO YOU ARE



Your English is great, written and spoken. This is the only hard requirement. If your English is strong, I'll teach you everything else.

You're hungry. You want more than a paycheck, you want to learn, grow, and build something.

You figure things out. When something is unclear, you don't freeze, you try, you Google, you ask smart questions.

You pay attention to details. The small things matter to you.

You're not afraid of change. New tasks and new challenges excite you.

Experience? Doesn't matter. Attitude? Everything.



WHAT YOU'LL GET



Personal mentorship from the founder every single day

AI skills that put you in the top 1% of virtual assistants

A friendly, supportive team that always has your back

$3-$6/hour starting pay with real raises when you deliver. If things are going well, your pay goes up. Simple.

Christmas bonus every year

A role that grows with you, there's no ceiling here



How to Apply



Applications that do not include ALL of the following will not be considered.



Your application MUST include:



A short Loom video - Link to Google Drive video is also OK (2-3 minutes max). Introduce yourself in English. Tell us what you like to do when you're not working. Then tell us why you're excited about this role and why you believe you're the right fit. This is how we evaluate your English and communication skills. Do NOT use a script. description:
About the Role

We’re a fast-growing Danish multi-brand e-commerce company, and we’re looking for someone to work directly alongside the founder as his right hand. This is not a typical VA role where you follow scripts all day. You’ll be thrown into real problems, expected to think critically, and trusted to figure things out.



Your experience doesn’t matter. Your drive does.



We don’t care about your resume, your certifications, or how many years you’ve worked in e-commerce. We care about who you are. If you’re the kind of person who learns fast, takes ownership, and gets genuinely excited about solving problems - we’ll teach you everything else.



The founder will personally invest time in developing your skills, teaching you cutting-edge tools (including AI), and building you into a top 1% AI-powered operator. You’ll learn things most people in this industry never get access to - because you’ll be working side by side with someone who’s building it.

This role is for someone who wants to build something big together - not just collect a paycheck.



What You’ll Do

Manage and optimize daily e-commerce operations across multiple brands (Shopify, Klaviyo, inventory, fulfillment)

Own workflows end-to-end - identify problems, build solutions, and improve processes without being told

Coordinate with tea
mbers, influencers, and suppliers

Help build and maintain automations (n8n, Make, AI tools)

Handle whatever needs handling - the scope will evolve as the business grows, and so will you



Who You Are

Excellent English - written and spoken. This is the one hard requirement. You communicate clearly, precisely, and confidently. If your English is strong, you can learn anything else.

Driven and ambitious. You’re not looking for a comfortable job - you’re looking for a launchpad. You want to grow, learn, and build something meaningful.

A critical thinker who doesn’t just ask “what should I do?” but figures it out and comes back with a solution.

Detail-oriented and precise. You catch the things others miss.

Comfortable with fast-paced, constantly changing work. New tools, new tasks, new challenges - that excites you, not stresses you.



No experience required. Seriously. We’d rather have someone with zero experience and unstoppable drive than someone with 5 years of experience who waits to be told what to do.



What You’ll Get

Direct mentorship from the founder - you’ll learn e-commerce, automation, AI tools, and business strategy hands-on.

A path to become a top 1% AI-powered operator. We’ll teach you how to use AI to multiply your output.

Real ownership and responsibility from day one. No micromanagement.

A growing company where your role evolves with the business - the ceiling is as high as your ambition.

Competitive pay with raises tied to performance and growth.



How to Apply



Applications that do not include ALL of the following will not be considered.



Your application MUST include:

Then tell us why you're excited about this role and why you believe you're the right fit. This is how we evaluate your English and communication skills. Do NOT use a script. title: Content Strategist & Manager
description:
We are looking for a sharp, proactive Content Strategist and Social Media Manager to work alongside Keenya 5 hours per day. This is a collaborative role — Keenya will brief you weekly on what is happening in the business, and your job is to take that information and build the content strategy around it.



You will not be waiting to be told what to post. You will be bringing ideas, angles, and a weekly content plan to Keenya based on the business priorities she shares with you. You think about content the way a marketer does — every post has a purpose, every caption has a direction, and everything connects back to growing the audience and driving sales.



What You Will Do

Content Strategy

Receive a weekly business briefing from Keenya (upcoming webinars, offers, podcast episodes, newsletter topics, YouTube videos) and build a full content plan around it

Come up with content ideas, hooks, and angles for TikTok, Instagram,
, YouTube, LinkedIn, and Threads — proactively, without being asked

Understand how content connects to sales and structure ideas accordingly — not just content that gets views, but content that converts

Think about each platform differently — what works on
 is not what works on TikTok, and you know the difference



Caption & Script Writing

Write captions for all platforms — formatted, spaced, and ready to copy-paste with no reformatting needed

Write short-form video scripts and hooks for TikTok and Instagram that Keenya can film

Write promotional content for webinars, offers, and product launches that is built to sell, not just inform

Adapt Keenya's brand voice accurately — her tone is direct, faith-forward, relatable, and results-focused



Platform Management & Scheduling

Schedule and post all content on
, YouTube, LinkedIn, and Threads

Manage the content calendar and keep it updated, organized, and always one week ahead

Promote newsletter episodes, podcast episodes, and YouTube videos consistently across all managed platforms — this is a non-negotiable weekly responsibility

Engage with comments and 
 on
, LinkedIn, and Threads



Weekly Planning & Communication

Submit a weekly content plan to Keenya every Monday covering what is going out that week and why

Flag opportunities, trends, or content ideas proactively — do not wait for Keenya to ask

Communicate any blockers or questions clearly and quickly — no radio silence



What You Will Not Do

Keenya manages TikTok and Instagram directly. You will NOT be posting on those platforms.



However, you WILL be writing scripts and hooks for TikTok and Instagram content that Keenya films and posts herself.



Your strategic thinking applies to every platform even when you are not the one posting.



Who You Are

You have experience in social media strategy, content marketing, or a related field

You understand short-form video content and what makes people stop scrolling, follow an account, and buy

You know how to write — captions, scripts, hooks, and promotional copy that sounds human and converts

You are proactive. You bring ideas before being asked. You do not wait to be directed on what to do next

You understand that content has to do more than look good — it has to sell

You are organized, consistent, and reliable — you do not miss deadlines or go quiet

You can take a weekly briefing and turn it into a complete content plan without being hand-held through every step

You are comfortable working in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment where priorities can shift



Tools We Use

Tool

What We Use It For

Canva

Graphics, carousels, and visual content

Metricool

Scheduling and analytics

Notion

Content calendar and project management

Meta Business Suite

 scheduling and management

YouTube Studio

YouTube content management

Google Drive

File storage and team collaboration

Claude / ChatGPT

AI-assisted content ideation and writing





What Success Looks Like in the First 30 Days

Week

What You Have Accomplished

1

You have read every brand document, studied the content ecosystem (newsletter, podcast, YouTube), and submitted your first weekly content plan without being prompted

2

Content is scheduled and going out on
, YouTube, LinkedIn, and Threads on time. The newsletter, podcast, and YouTube channel are being promoted consistently across all platforms every single week

3

You are bringing content ideas and angles to Keenya proactively. You are not waiting to be asked. The content calendar is one full week ahead at all times

4

Keenya is reviewing and approving your weekly plan with minimal changes because you have learned the brand voice, the strategy, and what the business needs





Non-Negotiables

These are not preferences. They are requirements.

You submit a weekly content plan every Monday. No exceptions.

You promote the newsletter, podcast, and YouTube channel every single week across all managed platforms. This is not optional.

You bring ideas. You do not wait to be told what to post.

You ask questions when you are stuck — but you do not ask questions that you could answer yourself by reading the brand documents you were given.

You communicate. If something is delayed, wrong, or unclear, you say so immediately — not the day it was due.





How to Apply

To be considered for this role, please submit the following:



A brief introduction telling us who you are and why this role is a fit for you

A Sample Portfolio

Two to three examples of content strategy work you have done — content calendars, caption samples, strategy documents, or campaign plans

Your answer to this question:



"Keenya has a webinar on Wednesday, her podcast drops Monday, and her newsletter goes out Thursday.



What content would you plan for
 and YouTube that week and why?"



Your availability



Applications that do not include the question response above will not be reviewed. We are specifically looking for how you think, not just what you have done.

title: ???? Hiring: AI Automation VA (Storm Tracking + Auto Content Posting)
description:
We’re looking for a sharp, technical VA who can build an automated system that detects hail/storm activity and instantly turns it into social media content.

title: Virtual Learning & Content Assistant
description:
About Us

We are a leading health and safety training centre in Northern Ireland, UK, committed to elevating the standard of workplace safety education. As we expand our digital footprint, we are looking for a highly organised Virtual Learning & Content Assistant to support our training programmes and help transform traditional content into engaging, lasting digital resources.



Role Overview

You will work directly with management, taking the content they provide and building structured, learner-friendly courses within our learning tools. Using AI and content authoring software, you will convert live training sessions and internal information into clear, easy-to-use digital assets. No need to create content from scratch – your skill lies in structuring, formatting, and enhancing what you are given.



Key Responsibilities

Build & Manage Online Courses in Our LMS

• Upload and arrange content into logical, easy-to-follow course structures.

• From the content provided, create:

o Quizzes and tests

o Assignments and activities

o Reading materials and supporting resources

• Keep all courses up to date as training regulations and materials change.

• Ensure courses are well structured, accessible, and simple to navigate.



Create eLearning Content

• Develop helpful articles, guides, and learning resources based on existing course content.

• Convert live training sessions/ module books into clear written content.

• Maintain consistent style, tone, and formatting across all resources 



Track Training & Reports

• Ensure eLearning data (completions, scores, etc.) is accurate and up to date.

• Help organise training reports and maintain a clean file-tracking system.

• Identify and correct missing or incorrect data.

• Provide leadership with reliable, up-to-date training data on demand.



Support Digital Content Creation

• Help repurpose existing face-to-face training into digital formats.

• Use tools – including AI – to create:

o Online course content

o SharePoint resources

o eLearning materials

• Review all content for accuracy, quality, and alignment with health and safety standards.



Required Skills & Qualifications

• Strong organisation and time management skills – you can man-age multiple courses and deadlines.

• Clear writing and attention to detail – excellent command of UK English spelling and grammar.

• Comfortable working independently – this is a remote role; self-motivation is essential.

• Experience with Learning Management Systems (LMS) – e.g., Moodle, TalentLMS, or similar.

• Familiarity with Synthesia, SharePoint, or similar digital tools.

• Ability to work with different teams and meet deadlines.



Preferred Qualifications

• Experience in training, learning & development, or a similar support role.

• Familiarity with AI or content creation tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Canva, Articu-late Rise).

• Experience supporting live or blended training programmes.

• Experience working in a health and safety training centre, corpo-rate, or professional services environment (a plus).

• Proficiency in PowerPoint – able to clean up and structure slide-based content.

• No other work commitment – full focus on this role.

• Teaching background – particularly a teacher with a licence  is highly desirable, as you understand how learners absorb information.



Why This Role Matters

This isn't just administrative support – you will play an essential part in making sure employees and trainees can learn, grow, and find the information they need long after live training sessions are over. By turning expert-led health and safety training into enduring digital resources, you directly help save time, reduce risk, and improve workplace safety across Northern Ireland.



To apply, please send your CV and a brief video introduction explaining your experience with LMS, AI tools, and content creation.

title: Remote Bookkeeper + Executive VA — QuickBooks Online
description:
Dancon Services (IBX Emergency LLC)  ·  NJ/NYC  ·  Construction & Emergency Mitigation

Full-time · 40 hrs/week  |  EST overlap required  |  QBO ProAdvisor preferred  |  US client experience required



ABOUT THE COMPANY

Dancon Services is a construction, emergency mitigation/restoration, and maintenance company operating in the New Jersey and New York City area. We handle general contracting, water/fire damage mitigation, and ongoing facility maintenance for commercial clients. We are a growing S-Corp with multiple active job verticals and are looking for a dedicated remote professional to own our day-to-day bookkeeping and provide executive administrative support.

ABOUT THE ROLE

This is a full-time, dedicated remote position. You will work directly with the company owner and be responsible for keeping our books clean, current, and accurate in QuickBooks Online — as well as supporting daily administrative operations. You will not be shared across multiple clients. This role requires someone who is self-directed, highly reliable, and communicates proactively in English during EST business hours.



BOOKKEEPING RESPONSIBILITIES

• Daily transaction categorization — income, COGS, and operating expenses

• Monthly bank and credit card reconciliation (Citibank and others)

• Accounts receivable — invoicing in QBO, tracking outstanding balances, following up on overdue payments

• Accounts payable — entering vendor bills, tracking due dates, aging reports

• Job costing — allocating labor and material costs to specific projects

• Class and location tracking across service verticals (Mitigation, GC, Maintenance)

• Progress billing support for active construction contracts

• Subcontractor payment tracking and 1099 vendor record maintenance

• Payroll journal entries (W-2 payroll in progress)

• Monthly P&L, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow report generation

• Aged A/R and A/P reporting

• Year-end close preparation and CPA support package

• Chart of Accounts maintenance and cleanup as needed

• Deposit recording and invoice matching

ADMINISTRATIVE / VA RESPONSIBILITIES

•
 inbox monitoring — flagging invoices, vendor bills, and financial correspondence

• Document collection and filing (W-9s, certificates of insurance, contracts) in Google Drive

• Client follow-up on outstanding invoices

• Vendor record organization and subcontractor file maintenance

• Scheduling support — calls, deadlines, weekly check-ins

• Drafting payment reminder
s and professional correspondence

• Data entry across platforms (QBO, 
, Google Sheets)

• General administrative support to fill available hours



REQUIRED SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE

• 3+ years of bookkeeping experience using QuickBooks Online (not desktop)

• Demonstrated US client experience — must understand US GAAP, 1099 filing, S-Corp structure

• Strong bank reconciliation skills — zero tolerance for sloppy closes

• Experience with job costing or project-based accounting

• Proficient in Google Drive, Gmail, and Google Sheets

• Strong written English — clear, professional, concise

• Reliable EST overlap — available 9am–5pm EST Monday–Friday

• Experience working independently without daily hand-holding

STRONGLY PREFERRED

• QBO ProAdvisor Certification (Intuit-issued)

• Construction or contractor industry bookkeeping experience

• Familiarity with progress billing, retainage, or WIP reporting

• Experience with 
 or similar project management tools

• Accounting degree or diploma (Philippine CPA or equivalent is a strong plus)

• Experience supporting executive-level administrative tasks



COMPENSATION AND TERMS

Hours

Full-time · 40 hrs/week Schedule

EST overlap required

Rate

Based on experience Trial period

2-week paid trial



NDA required before start. You will be given access to QBO, Google Drive, and Gmail under supervised permissions. A short paid skills test will be part of the hiring process.

title: Account Manager (Digital Marketing Company)
description:
***All applications must be submitted through this link ONLY:

hire.localvisibility.co/job-overview-account-manager

***Messages here in OnlineJobs.ph will not be considered.





Account Manager

Greetings from Local Visibility - your future workplace filled with positivity and endless possibilities! We are seeking talented account managers to join our dynamic team!



About Us:

Local Visibility is a growing digital marketing agency specializing in lead generation for home improvement and service companies in the US and Canada. We have been in business for 14 years and take pride in providing high-quality services.



Why Us:



Team harmony: Your wins are ours, and together, we create a harmonious work environment where your efforts and ideas truly shine.

Grow with us: Being with us means your journey is always exciting! Our goal is to give you the tools, help, and chances to move your career forward.

Everyone’s welcome: We’re happy to be in a place where each special voice isn’t just heard but really appreciated.

Celebrating YOU: Birthdays, small wins, or achievements - it’s important to celebrate the good things. We love acknowledging and appreciating each other.



Job Overview

The Account Manager is crucial for ensuring customer satisfaction and retention by fostering strong relationships, understanding client needs, and facilitating effective communication between clients and internal teams. As an account manager, you are responsible for managing the relationships with clients. They must speak English fluently without an accent. Additionally, the candidate must be presentable, as this is a client-facing role, and should have a strong background working with American clients.



The position includes:



Customer Relationship Management: Cultivate and maintain strong relationships with clients. Regularly communicate with clients to understand their needs, address concerns, and provide solutions.



Account Management: Understand the client's business objectives, industry challenges, and pain points to tailor solutions and offerings effectively.

Responsibilities:

Create monthly marketing performance reports 
 Ads, Semrush, Bright Local, AdWords, Analytics).

Responsible for handling incoming calls and providing support or assistance as needed.

Follow up on customer service requests weekly to ensure they are in progress and close the loop with clients.



Required Qualifications

Must be able to speak English without an accent and demonstrate strong verbal and written communication skills required to convey information.

Must have prior experience in customer service, phone sales, or account management for a marketing agency.

Must be able to demonstrate knowledge of digital marketing, including SEO, PPC, and Social Media

Must have a reliable internet connection with a backup option and a quiet, distraction-free working environment.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Who We Are

M3 Auto Detailing is not your average car care company. Based in St. Petersburg, Florida, we are a premium detailing, paint correction, and ceramic coating operation built on one principle: quality over quantity.

We serve clients who care deeply about their vehicles and expect an experience that matches that level of care — from the first DM or text message to the final inspection.

We operate at premium market pricing, and we earn every dollar of it. Our clients are not looking for the cheapest option — they are looking for the best. That means every interaction with our brand, including the very first message a lead receives, needs to reflect the standard we hold ourselves to.

We are a small, fast-growing operation run by a founder who is deeply invested in building something great. There is no corporate layer here. The work you do will directly impact real clients, real revenue, and a real brand that is scaling quickly.

If you want to be part of something that is growing and be a meaningful contributor from day one, you are in the right place.



The Role

We are looking for a highly organized, detail-obsessed Virtual Assistant to join the M3 Auto Detailing team.

This is not a basic task-checking, clock-in/clock-out position.

We need someone who takes ownership.

Someone who treats our clients like they are their own clients.

Someone who understands that a lead left on read is revenue left on the table — and that is not acceptable here.

You will be the first voice of our brand in many client interactions. That is a responsibility we take seriously, and we expect you to as well.

You will work directly with the founder, receive clear frameworks and SOPs to guide your work, and be expected to operate independently within those guidelines during your shift.



This role has four primary pillars:

Writing and maintaining internal Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs)

Client communications and lead response via Instagram DMs,
 messages, text, and lead forms

KPI tracking and reporting for leads, sales, and ad performance

Social media posting and scheduling across Instagram 

Sending messages to new followers, following up and nurturing older leads in the DMs.

Responsibilities in Detail

SOP Development



You will be responsible for documenting how M3 Auto Detailing operates — from how we greet a new lead, to how we follow up after a ceramic coating job, to how we handle reschedules, deposits, and client communication.

These SOPs will become the backbone of our operations as we scale.

You need to be able to take a verbal explanation or rough outline and turn it into a clear, structured, professional document that any future tea
mber could pick up and follow.



Responsibilities:

Write, format, and maintain SOPs across all areas of the business

Interview the founder to extract process knowledge and turn it into written systems

Revise SOPs as processes evolve

Organize all documents in a clear, accessible file structure

Help improve efficiency by identifying weak points in current systems

Client Communications & Lead Response



Speed and tone are everything in this part of the role.

A lead that reaches out and does not hear back quickly may be gone within hours.

Your job is to make sure that does not happen.

You will be given a messaging framework that tells you exactly how to respond to different inquiries — your job is to execute that framework with consistency, professionalism, and warmth.



Responsibilities:

Monitor and respond to inbound Instagram DMs,
 messages, text leads, and form submissions during your shift

Ensure zero qualified leads go unanswered during working hours

Qualify leads by collecting vehicle info, service interest, and scheduling details

Follow up with prospects who go cold

Confirm appointments and communicate prep instructions

Follow up after services for reviews, check-ins, and retention opportunities

Maintain premium-brand communication standards in every conversation

KPI Tracking & Business Support



We run paid ads and track performance closely.

This role includes helping monitor lead flow, appointments, conversions, and overall business performance so we can make better decisions faster.

You do not need to be a marketing expert, but you must be organized and capable of tracking numbers accurately.



Responsibilities:

Track daily and weekly KPIs (leads, booked jobs, closes, revenue, no-shows, etc.)

Help maintain lead tracking sheets and sales reports

Organize ad performance reporting fro
ta and Google Ads

Help identify patterns, missed opportunities, and operational bottlenecks

Support miscellaneous admin tasks that improve business efficiency

Social Media Posting and Messaging



M3 Auto Detailing has an active Instagram presence and growing content across multiple platforms.

Content is created by the founder and team.

Your role is not to create the content — it is to make sure it gets posted consistently, on schedule, with the right captions,  and formatting. As well as send dms, follow up, and nurture leads in the dms.

Consistency on social media is not optional for us.

It is part of how we generate awareness and attract high-quality clients.



Responsibilities:

Post 2–3 pieces of content per day across Instagram and TikTok

Send/Respond to 50-100 dms/messages per day on IG.

Write or refine captions to match brand voice — professional, confident, and results-focused

Schedule posts using approved tools when content is provided in advance

Flag missing content or asset gaps proactively

Tools You May Use

Instagram

 Business Suite

Google Sheets

Google Drive

Meta Ads Manager

Google Ads

QuickBooks

ChatGPT

Loom

CRM / Lead Tracking Software



Who We Are Looking For

We want to be upfront:

This role has a high standard attached to it.

We are intentionally writing a longer job description because we want to filter out applicants looking for something easy.

If you have made it this far, that is a good sign.



The right person for this role has:

Exceptional written communication skills — clear, professional, and error-free

A genuine obsession with organization and doing things right the first time

Experience in a client-facing or customer service role where responsiveness mattered

Comfort working independently without constant supervision

A working knowledge of Instagram and TikTok

Experience writing SOPs, process documents, or internal systems

The ability to follow frameworks precisely while still sounding human

Reliability — you show up, log in, and do the work every day

Strong attention to detail when tracking KPIs and business operations



This Role Is NOT For You If…

You need constant direction and struggle to work independently

You treat client communication like a box to check instead of a reflection of the brand

You have inconsistent availability or disappear without notice

You are not detail-oriented — in this business, details are literally the product

You are looking for something temporary or a side gig you will deprioritize

You cannot commit to the full Monday through Friday schedule

Position Details



Type: Part-Time, Virtual (Remote)

Hours: Monday – Friday, 10:00 AM – 4:00 PM EST (30 hrs/week)

Compensation: $200 Per Week

Pay Schedule: Bi-weekly

Location: Remote — must be available and actively working during scheduled hours

Start Date: As soon as the right candidate is identified



How to Apply

We are not looking for the most applicants.

We are looking for the right one.

In your application message, include the following:

A brief introduction — who you are and why this role specifically interests you

Your relevant experience in client communications, social media, KPI tracking, or documentation

One example of a time you caught a mistake or improved a process at a previous job

Confirmation that you are available Monday–Friday, 10 AM–4 PM EST



Also include the word Ceramic somewhere in your application so we know you read the full job post.

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

We mean that.

Attention to detail starts with the application.

title: Client Success Manager – AI Email Marketing | $1,000/Month
description:
We are a fast-growing AI
 marketing company. Our platform uses AI bots to write hyper-personalized outreach
s on behalf of our clients - and we need a sharp, client-focused professional to help those clients get the most out of it.



This is a full-time remote position paying $250 per week ($1,000/month) - a highly competitive salary. If you are fluent in English, have a passion for marketing, and love helping clients succeed, we want to hear from you.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Onboard new clients and guide them through setting up their AI
 campaigns

- Help clients craft and refine their AI prompts to produce high-converting, on-brand copy

- Review and maintain client knowledge bases so the AI generates accurate, personalized
s

- Review AI-generated
 output for quality, tone, and accuracy before campaigns go live

- Monitor campaign results and prepare clear performance reports for clients

- Proactively communicate with clients via
, messaging, and calls to ensure ongoing satisfaction

- Identify opportunities to improve client results and flag issues before they become problems





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Expert-level English, both written and verbal. Your written communication must be polished, professional, and persuasive. This is non-negotiable.

- Strong marketing copywriting instincts - you understand what makes an
 compelling, and you can spot weak copy and fix it by updating the prompts in the clients bot and reviewing the outputs until it is as good as it can be.

- Client-facing experience - account management, customer success, or similar roles where you owned client relationships

- Comfortable with AI tools - curiosity and aptitude for working with AI platforms, prompts, and workflows (prior experience a plus but not required)

- Highly organized and self-directed - you manage multiple clients without dropping the ball and don't need to be chased for updates

- Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional environment for client calls





COMPENSATION & SETUP



Pay: $250/week (~$1,000/month)

Hours: Full-time, 40 hrs/week (11am - 7pm UK Time)

Location: Remote, Philippines-based

Contract: Long-term, stable ongoing role





HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, please include the following in your application message:



- A brief introduction about yourself and your relevant experience

- A short sample of marketing copy you've written 
, ad, or landing page — anything that shows your writing ability)

- Your experience working with clients or customers directly



Applications without a writing sample will not be considered. We read every application carefully.

title: DTC Video Editor - Performance Ads for Meta & TikTok
description:
We are looking for a video editor experienced in direct-response ads to help produce high-performing creatives for DTC brands.



This is not cinematic editing. We are looking for someone who understands paid social advertising, strong hooks, retention editing, and fast-paced storytelling.



You will work with our creative strategist and editing team to turn raw footage, UGC, and AI assets into scroll-stopping ad creatives.



Responsibilities

 • Edit short-form video ads (15–45 seconds) for Meta, TikTok, and paid social

 • Transform raw footage and UGC into high-converting ad creatives

 • Add captions, pattern interrupts, sound effects, and visual hooks

 • Follow scripts, creative briefs, and reference ads

 • Implement feedback and revisions quickly

 • Source B-roll clips or supporting visuals when raw footage is limited

 • Utilize AI tools and stock assets when necessary to enhance creatives

 • Maintain organized project files and follow the team workflow

 • Must be familiar with AI content generation and how to create content using AI tools.



Output Expectations

 • 1–3 completed ads per working day

 • Around 50–60 ads per month



Requirements

 • Experience editing direct-response / DTC ads

 • Strong proficiency with CapCut

 • Understanding of hook ? problem ? solution ? CTA structure

 • Ability to edit fast-paced ads designed for retention

 • Comfortable sourcing clips or B-roll when needed

 • Familiar with AI tools or stock footage to supplement missing assets

 • Reliable communication and ability to follow direction



Nice to Have

 • Experience editing UGC-style ads

 • Experience with Meta or TikTok ad creatives

 • Familiarity with ecommerce brands



Work Setup

 • Remote

 • Full-time (40 hours per week)

 • Weekends optional depending on workload



To Apply



Please include the following in your application:

 1. 3–5 examples of ad creatives you’ve edited

 2. What editing software you use

 3. Your monthly rate

 4. Your availability



Also answer this question:



What do you think makes a strong hook in the first 3 seconds of an ad?

title: Pixi JS Front-End Developer
description:
We’re looking for a skilled PixiJS Front-End Developer to help build high-performance browser-based games and interactive experiences.



This role focuses on game UI, rendering, and real-time interactions using PixiJS. You’ll work on engaging game interfaces, animations, and systems that deliver smooth gameplay across devices.



We strongly prefer developers with gaming experience and those who actively use AI tools to accelerate development.



Responsibilities:



Game Development & UI

• Build and maintain game interfaces using PixiJS only

• Develop smooth animations, transitions, and interactive elements

• Implement core visual systems (reels, cards, UI states, effects)

• Ensure responsive and consistent gameplay experience



Performance & Optimization

• Optimize FPS, memory usage, and rendering performance

• Manage assets efficiently (sprite sheets, textures, animations)

• Debug performance issues across desktop and mobile



Collaboration & Workflow

• Work with designers and developers to bring game concepts to life

• Translate mechanics into polished visual interactions

• Integrate APIs and dynamic data into the UI

• Use AI tools to speed up development, debugging, and iteration



Requirements

• Strong experience with PixiJS (required)

• Experience building browser-based games or interactive apps

• Solid knowledge of JavaScript / TypeScript

• Experience with animations, rendering, and game UI systems

• Strong focus on performance optimization

• Experience handling game assets (sprites, atlases, animations)

• Familiar with game loops and real-time interactions

• Self-driven and able to execute independently

• Must overlap with CET working hours



Bonus Skills

• Experience with slot games, card games, or casual games

• Familiarity with game math or probability systems

• Experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, Copilot, Cursor, etc.) in development

• Knowledge of Three.js or other rendering frameworks

• Experience building mobile-friendly browser games



Location

Remote role open to candidates based in the Philippines, with CET overlap.



How to Apply (Submissions missing requirements will be declined)

Please include:

• Full name at the end of your proposal

• Resume

• Portfolio (PixiJS or game-related projects required)

• Tech stack and tools you use (including AI tools)

 lists and buyer interest lists.

 groups, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, and marketplace style content.

 groups and online communities.

description:

Required Skills & Experience

Strong knowledge of hydraulic and pneumatic systems in mechanical applications

Solid grounding in mechanical engineering principles

Proficient in CAD for system modelling, schematics, and line diagrams

Experience with SolidWorks (3D modelling, assemblies, and technical drawings)

Familiarity with Finite Element Analysis (FEA) for mechanical components

Ability to evaluate mechanical strength, structural integrity, and system performance

title: Property Management - Accountant (Remote)
description:
Please follow the application instructions below.



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, offering comprehensive solutions with years of expertise across the construction and renovation sectors. We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, and partitions.



Our commitment to delivering the best value property maintenance has established us as a reliable partner for residential and commercial clients nationwide. With decades of experience, including 50 years of expertise in garage conversions, we pride ourselves on impeccable craftsmanship, turning our clients' visions into reality while ensuring their properties remain in top condition.



Role Overview

We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Property Management Virtual Assistant to join our dynamic team. This role focuses on identifying and analyzing property investment opportunities in the UK market, managing tenant relations, and supporting property operations through comprehensive administrative and research functions. The successful candidate will work closely with property investors, agents, and stakeholders to identify profitable deals, maintain property portfolios, and ensure smooth property management operations across the UK market.



Key Responsibilities

Property Deal Sourcing & Analysis



Deal Identification: Identify, analyze, and present property investment opportunities in the UK market that align with specific investment criteria

Market Research: Conduct comprehensive research on property prices, rental yields, and market trends to support informed investment decisions

Property Analysis: Evaluate property deals based on location, condition, investment potential, and return on investment (ROI)

Investment Presentations: Prepare detailed property analysis reports and presentations for investment review

Opportunity Assessment: Screen and qualify property opportunities to ensure alignment with investment strategy



Property Marketing & Lead Generation



Property Advertising: Create and monitor property advertisements across online platforms to attract buyers, tenants, and investors

Lead Management: Track and follow up with property leads via CRM systems, ensuring no opportunities are missed

Marketing Optimization: Monitor ad performance and optimize listings for maximum visibility and engagement

Platform Management: Manage property listings across multiple online property portals and marketing channels



Tenant & Property Management Support



Tenant Communication: Assist with tenant inquiries, communications, and relationship management for managed properties

Maintenance Coordination: Schedule and coordinate property maintenance, repairs, and inspections

Documentation Management: Maintain accurate records of tenant agreements, maintenance logs, and property documentation

Issue Resolution: Address tenant concerns and coordinate solutions promptly and professionally



Stakeholder Coordination & Communication



Meeting Coordination: Organize and schedule meetings with agents, developers, investors, and other property stakeholders

Professional Calls: Make and receive calls to agents, sellers, and tenants with professionalism and clarity

 Management: Draft, send, and organize
s, ensuring timely responses and professional communication

Relationship Building: Maintain positive relationships with property agents, vendors, and service providers



Documentation & Contract Management



Contract Preparation: Prepare contracts, agreements, and property reports for sourcing and management activities

Legal Documentation: Organize and maintain property-related legal documents and compliance records

Report Generation: Create comprehensive property reports, market analyses, and investment summaries

Record Keeping: Maintain organized digital filing systems for all property documentation



Administrative & Operational Support



Daily Operations: Handle day-to-day administrative duties to keep property operations running smoothly

CRM Management: Maintain and update CRM systems with property leads, contacts, and transaction details

Data Management: Ensure accuracy and completeness of property data and client information

Process Optimization: Identify opportunities to streamline property management processes



Required Skills & Experience

Essential Qualifications



Property Experience: Proven experience in property management, real estate, or property investment support

UK Market Knowledge: Understanding of UK property market, rental regulations, and investment landscape

Deal Analysis: Ability to analyze property deals and investment opportunities effectively

Administrative Excellence: Strong administrative background with experience managing multiple tasks



Technical Skills



CRM Proficiency: Experience with CRM systems for lead tracking and relationship management

Property Platforms: Familiarity with UK property portals (Rightmove, Zoopla, OnTheMarket, etc.)

Microsoft Office: Advanced proficiency in Excel for financial analysis, Word for documentation, and PowerPoint for presentations

Research Skills: Strong online research capabilities for market analysis and property sourcing



Communication Skills



Professional Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills for stakeholder engagement

Phone Etiquette: Confident and professional telephone manner for agent and client calls

 Management: Ability to draft clear, professional
s and manage correspondence efficiently

Stakeholder Relations: Strong interpersonal skills for building relationships with agents, tenants, and investors



Analytical & Research Capabilities



Market Analysis: Ability to research and analyze property prices, rental yields, and market trends

Investment Assessment: Understanding of property investment metrics (ROI, yield, capital appreciation)

Attention to Detail: Meticulous attention to detail in property analysis and documentation

Critical Thinking: Strong problem-solving skills for evaluating property opportunities



Organizational Skills



Multi-tasking: Ability to manage multiple properties, leads, and projects simultaneously

Time Management: Excellent organizational skills with ability to prioritize tasks effectively

Documentation: Strong record-keeping abilities and systematic approach to file management

Deadline Management: Ability to meet deadlines and manage time-sensitive property transactions



Application instructions

Please complete the attached application form and submit it along with your CV:

title: Mortgage Loan Processing Virtual Assistant (Remote)
description:
We’re looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented Mortgage Loan Processing Virtual Assistant to support daily loan operations, pricing, and client communication.



This role is ideal for someone with experience in mortgage processing or financial services who wants to grow into full-cycle loan processing over time.



What You’ll Be Doing

Client Assessment & Pre-Approval

- Assist clients through the mortgage pre-approval process

- Review credit, income, and financial documents

- Run loan scenarios (loan amounts, payments, interest rates)

- Prepare and organize client files



Loan Structuring & Pricing

- Create and send Loan Estimates (LEs) and pricing scenarios

- Compare lenders based on rates, terms, and guidelines

- Prepare loan comparisons and closing cost estimates



Loan Processing & Coordination

- Submit loan files and track progress

- Communicate with lenders and clients for conditions

- Upload and organize documents in CRM and lender portals

- Support clients through closing



Daily Operations

- Manage tasks and pipeline in CRM

- Send follow-ups via
 and phone

- Track loan status and maintain accurate records



Requirements

- Experience in mortgage processing, lending, or financial services

- Strong understanding of:

+ Loan Estimates (LEs)

+ Mortgage pricing

+ Loan workflows



- Excellent English communication skills

- High attention to detail and accuracy

- Strong follow-up and task management skills

- Comfortable using CRM systems and lender portals



Interested? kindly send your resume and short intro video/vocaroo recording highlighting your experience also provide your whatsapp number.



Please note that applications without a Vocaroo or intro video will not be considered for the next step of the process.

title: Recruiter
description:
Workstream is a mission-driven company building the all-in-one HR, payroll, and hiring platform for managing the hourly workforce. There are 2.7 billion hourly workers, making up 80% of the global workforce, but this market has been heavily underserved by technology and deserves better. Workstream has been purpose-built for the hourly workforce from day one so that these businesses and their employees can thrive.



Our customers include leading brands from multiple sectors, including Burger King, Carl's Jr./Hardee's, IHOP, KFC, and Culvers. We are a high growth series B company and quickly expanding our product portfolio to deliver on our vision. We are backed by legendary VCs and industry experts like Founders Fund, BOND, and Coatue.



Values



Here are our Company Values and we’d love to have individuals who can be a culture-add to our team!



What We Offer



Permanently Remote

Pay wired directly to your bank account

$50 Monthly Stipend

Annual Bonus

Flexible PTO

Enjoy company time off during some of the major US and PH Holidays

Company-issued Device

Career fast track for performers and internal mobility

Learn from a team of Stanford, MIT, Google and Harvard alumni



Grow With Us



We're looking for an experienced Recruiter to join the Philippine Recruiting  team at Workstream. You'll be a key part of our global talent strategy, dedicated to sourcing top talent for our startup culture. The ideal candidate will be passionate about connecting exceptional talent with our innovative environment, proficient in assessing qualifications, and deeply aligned with our mission.



As a Recruiter, you'll play a crucial role in identifying and hiring top talent, making a direct impact on our high-performing team in the competitive SaaS industry.



Day in the Life:



-Drive the recruitment process from end to end, removing blockers and driving to a close

-Review and analyze resumes using our ATS software (Greenhouse) 

-Proactively source and engage potential candidates through various channels, including different job boards and social media

-Develop and execute creative sourcing strategies against prioritized requisitions

-Conduct comprehensive interviews and assessments to evaluate candidates' qualifications, skills, and cultural fit within our dynamic startup environment

-Manage various positions across different teams, including but not limited to sales, customer support, finance, and technology

-Partner closely with hiring managers to understand their talent needs, set expectations, and provide regular updates on candidate pipelines

-Ensure a positive and professional candidate experience throughout the recruitment process, from initial contact to offer acceptance

-Stay updated on industry trends, market dynamics, and competitor strategies to inform and refine our recruitment approach

-Monitor and report on recruitment metrics to enhance and streamline the recruiting process

-Contribute to the growth of Workstream's PH Recruiting function by developing and refining processes and serving as a thought partner for the rest of the team



Who You Are:



-At least 1 year experience in recruitment, with the ability to manage a diverse range of roles effectively

-Proficiency in leveraging various recruitment tools and platforms to source and engage candidates

-Exceptional verbal and written communication skills to effectively convey job opportunities and requirements

-Strong relationship-building skills with candidates, hiring managers, and cross-functional teams

-Ability to assess candidates' qualifications and evaluate their alignment with our startup culture and values

-Willingness to adapt to changing priorities and thrive in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment

-Collaborative mindset and the ability to work closely with diverse teams

-High ethical and professional standards, ensuring compliance with all relevant laws and regulations

-Prior experience in Recruiting for sales positions within a Tech company



Nice To Have



-Experience in Recruiting Sales positions within a SaaS company

-Experience in a startup environment



Please submit your application here:

title: Senior Graphic Designer - Meta Ad's Asset Specialist
description:
Senior Graphic Designer —
 Ads, Funnels & Landing Pages

Company: Dream Out Loud Group

Location: Remote (Philippines based)

Type: Full-time contractor

Reports to: Morgan Nelson (Founder & CEO) / Marketing Lead

Apply to: 
 with your portfolio (Please read the FULL ad first)



About Dream Out Loud:

Dream Out Loud is a fast-growing coaching, events, and mastermind business on a mission to help ambitious entrepreneurs build businesses that fund the life they actually want. We run premium programs, live events (including DreamFest, our flagship annual event), and high-touch masterminds for founders who want to scale without burning out.



We move fast, hold a very high bar, and invest heavily in people who want to grow with us. Our audience is entrepreneurs, high performers, and business owners who respond to bold, aspirational, beautifully designed content.



The Role:

This is not a "general graphic designer" role. We are hiring a world-class expert in a very specific craft: designing high-converting
 ad creative.



Your #1 priority, every single day, will be producing scroll-stopping
 and Instagram ad images that drive cold traffic to convert: click, opt in, and buy. This is the most important creative output in the business. If our ads don't convert, everything else slows down.



Beyond that, you'll also design the full visual ecosystem the ads point to: landing pages, funnel pages, opt-in pages, sales pages, thank you pages, webinar assets, and supporting creative across our brand.



You will own the look and feel of everything a new customer sees from the first ad impression all the way through to checkout.



What You'll Actually Do (In Order of Priority):



1.
 & Instagram Ad Creative (Primary Focus)



Design static ad images, carousels, and image variations for Meta campaigns

Build ad sets with multiple creative angles, hooks, and visual concepts for testing

Design pattern-interrupt visuals that stop the scroll and drive clicks

Work from proven direct-response principles (hook, clarity, contrast, curiosity, social proof)

Iterate fast based on ad performance data

Adapt creative for different audiences, offers, funnels, and seasonal campaigns



2. Landing Pages, Funnels & Sales Assets:



Design landing, opt-in, webinar, sales, and checkout pages

Build full funnel creative aligned with ad messaging so the journey feels seamless

Design lead magnets, ebooks, PDFs, workbooks, digital product covers

Create visual assets for
 and nurture sequences



3. Event & Brand Creative:



Design promotional creative for events, launches, and program rollouts (DreamFest, masterminds, coaching programs)

Create branded templates, social graphics, thumbnails, on-brand marketing collateral

Maintain and evolve brand consistency across every visual touchpoint



Non-Negotiables:



3+ years designing
 and Instagram ad creative for businesses that actually spend on ads

Proven track record of ads that performed. You can show winners and talk CTR, CPC, ROAS

Expert-level Photoshop, Illustrator, and Figma. Bonus: After Effects, Canva Pro

Strong grasp of direct-response design principles (Hormozi, Brunson, Kern style is familiar)

You design for conversion, not art awards. 



Clarity beats cleverness



Fast turnaround. 



Can ship 10+ variations in a day when needed

Excellent written English and ability to run on async briefs via Slack and Loom



Reliable home setup: stable internet, pro workstation, quiet focus space



Full-time availability, overlapping 4+ hours with Australian Eastern time



Nice to Have:



Experience in coaching, events, personal brand, or info-product space

Funnel-building inside ClickFunnels, GoHighLevel, or similar

Basic video editing (CapCut, Premiere, After Effects)

Experience with high-ticket offers and premium brands

Familiarity with AI design tools (Midjourney, Canva AI, Photoshop Generative Fill)



Who You Are:



You live and breathe design. You scroll Meta Ad Library for fun.

You have opinions about what makes an ad work and can defend them with data

You take feedback well, iterate faster than expected, never take it personally

Obsessed with conversion, not just aesthetics



Want to be part of a team, not a freelancer hiding behind

Care about doing work you're proud of, consistently



What You Get From Us:

High-growth business with real ad budget and real pressure to perform

Direct line to the founder and marketing team (no agency layers)

Clear briefs, fast feedback, work goes live same day

Chance to become the design engine behind one of Australia's fastest-growing founder brands

Competitive full-time contractor pay (we pay above market for the right person)

Long-term role with room to grow into a creative lead position



How to Apply

Send an
 to 
 with the subject line:



Graphic Designer Application — [Your Name]



In the
, include:



A short intro: who you are, where you're based, why this role fits

A clean portfolio link showing your best work, focused on:

 and Instagram ad creative you've designed

Landing pages and funnel design



Any campaigns where you can share performance results (even anonymised)



Expected monthly rate (USD) for full-time work



Earliest available start date



Important: Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed. We want to see your work, not just read about it.



We will only reply to shortlisted candidates. Shortlisted designers will be invited to a paid test project before final offer.

title: E - Commerce Video Editor
description:
Overview

We are seeking an exceptional, data-driven Video Editor obsessed with driving conversions for e-commerce/DTC brands. This is a fast-paced role requiring a marketer's mindset, platform expertise, and rapid iteration based on performance data.



Core Responsibilities (What You Will Do)

Conversion Focus: Edit raw footage (often UGC-style) into scroll-stopping, short-form ads (15-60 seconds) for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube, focused entirely on driving sales.



DR Implementation: Structure videos using Direct Response (DR) frameworks (e.g., Problem-Agitate-Solution), ensuring a powerful hook in the first 3 seconds, and seamless CTA integration.



Technical Execution: Apply advanced post-production techniques: color grading, audio mixing, speed ramping, dynamic transitions, and creating engaging typography/subtitles.



Rapid Iteration: Maintain fast turnaround (24 for first cuts) and produce multiple testing variations based on performance metrics (CTR, ROAS, Hook Rate).



Platform Mastery: Optimize content (9:16, 1:1, etc.) for native feel and best practices across TikTok, Reels, and YouTube Ads.



Pre-requisites (Must-Haves)

Experience: Proven portfolio of successful e-commerce/DTC ad editing (not just cinematic/corporate work).



Software Mastery: Advanced proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro or Final Cut Pro.



Mindset: Deep understanding of DR Marketing and key metrics (ROAS, CTR). Must be performance-driven, flexible, and willing to iterate based on data without ego.



Skills: Expertise in UGC-style editing, audio/sound design, and closed captioning/subtitles.



Bonus Skills

Proficiency in After Effects, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve.



Familiarity with ad platforms and marketing metrics.



Workload: Initial paid trial, then transitioning to 10 - 20 hours per week ongoing.



Shift: Flexible hours; work is output-based with strict deadlines.



To Apply:

If you are an exceptional designer with a portfolio that demonstrates world-class DTC brand quality, kindly fill out the application form:






Looking forward to receiving your application!

description:
