title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 2a
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 


/cro-shopify-web-developer/



CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education



APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 


/cro-shopify-web-developer/a

title: Financial Analyst (Early Career)
description:
We’re looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Financial Analyst (Early Career) who’s eager to learn and grow within a fast-paced environment. This role is ideal for someone with a strong foundation in finance or accounting who wants real exposure to how finance operates beyond the books.



What You’ll Do

Support backend accounting and financial operations

Assist in preparing financial reports, analysis, and data summaries

Provide support during financial planning and internal meetings

Work closely with leadership on financial insights and decision support

Assist in tech management and financial systems coordination

Help streamline processes using technology and financial tools



What We’re Looking For

Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, or a related field

Basic understanding of financial principles and accounting processes

Tech-savvy and comfortable using modern tools and systems

Strong attention to detail and willingness to learn

Good communication skills and ability to support meetings and discussions



What You’ll Gain

Hands-on exposure to real-world financial operations—not just accounting

Opportunity to learn how finance drives business strategy

Mentorship and growth in both finance and tech-enabled operations



Why Join Us

This isn’t just a numbers role—you’ll gain a deeper understanding of how finance actually works in a business setting. If you’re curious, driven, and ready to build a strong foundation in finance, this is a great place to start.



Only applications submitted on our career site will be considered.

title: Next-Gen Finance Analyst
description:
If you’re just looking for a routine accounting job, this isn’t it.

We’re looking for a hungry, high-potential Finance Analyst who wants real exposure to how finance actually drives a business. This role is for someone early in their career who’s ready to learn fast, think critically, and grow quickly.



What You’ll Be Doing

Get hands-on with real financial data, reporting, and analysis

Support backend accounting while learning how it connects to bigger financial decisions

Assist in preparing insights and materials for leadership-level financial discussions

Work directly with management on financial and operational support

Help build and maintain systems, reports, and dashboards

Take on ad hoc projects that push you beyond your comfort zone



What We’re Looking For

Degree in Finance, Accounting, or a related field

Strong analytical mindset with attention to detail

Tech-savvy — comfortable with spreadsheets, tools, and learning new systems quickly

Not afraid to ask questions, take initiative, and figure things out

Someone who wants more than just a “job” — you want to build real skills



Why This Role Stands Out

You won’t be boxed into pure accounting — you’ll see how finance actually works

Direct exposure to real financial decision-making

Fast learning curve — you’ll gain more here in months than most roles in years

High-growth environment with real responsibility early on 



Applications will only be considered if submitted through our careers page.

title: Customer Service
description:
About Us



Let’s See Italy is a Rome-based tour operator dedicated to delivering unforgettable travel experiences across Italy. We specialize in high-quality, immersive tours that showcase the culture, history, and beauty of Italy. Our team is passionate about hospitality, customer satisfaction, and creating seamless travel experiences for our guests.



Role Overview

We are seeking a Customer Service Representative to join our remote team. This role is essential in ensuring our customers receive exceptional support before, during, and after their tours. You will be the primary point of contact for clients, handling inquiries, resolving issues, and maintaining the high standards of service our brand is known for.



Key Responsibilities

- Respond to customer inquiries via
, chat, and phone in a timely and professional manner

- Assist customers with bookings, changes, cancellations, and general tour information

- Provide personalized recommendations and support to enhance the customer experience

- Resolve customer concerns efficiently while maintaining a positive tone - Coordinate with internal teams (operations, guides, logistics) to ensure smooth service delivery

- Maintain accurate records of customer interactions and transactions

- Uphold the company’s high standards of hospitality and service excellence



Requirements

- Fluent/native-level English (written and spoken) is required

- Proven experience in customer service, preferably in hospitality, travel, or tourism

- Strong communication and problem-solving skills

- Ability to work independently in a remote environment

- Comfortable handling high volumes of customer interactions

- Flexible availability to work shifts within 8:00 AM – 12:00 AM CET

- Tech-savvy and comfortable using customer service platforms, booking systems, and communication tools



Preferred Qualifications

- Experience in the travel or tour industry

- Familiarity with Italy as a destination (Rome knowledge is a plus)

- Additional languages are a bonus What We Offer

- Fully remote position with flexible scheduling

- Opportunity to work with a passionate, international team

- Involvement in a fast-growing travel company

- Competitive compensation based on experience

title: Lead Generation Specialist (High Ownership Role)
description:
LEAD GENERATION SPECIALIST (High Ownership Role)

We are hiring a Lead Generation Specialist to support a growing plant-based chef business.



This is not a task-based role. This is a thinking role.



You will own lead generation end-to-end from identifying opportunities to driving booked calls.

 

READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING

This role requires attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions exactly.

We do not review generic, copy-paste, or AI-generated applications.

If you do not follow the instructions below exactly, your application will not be considered.

 

RESPONSIBILITIES

• Research and identify high-quality, aligned leads

• Initiate and manage outreach across platforms

• Qualify and move leads toward booking

• Follow up consistently and intentionally

• Manage and track all leads inside GoHighLevel CRM

• Keep pipelines organized and moving

• Identify gaps, missed opportunities, and opportunities to improve

 

REQUIREMENTS

• Strong, hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (non-negotiable)

• Proven experience managing full lead generation cycles

• Strong communication and decision-making skills

• Ability to operate independently without constant direction

• Experience with outreach, follow-ups, and nurturing

 

HOW YOU'LL WORK

• You bring ideas, not just execution

• You think through problems and suggest solutions

• You take responsibility for outcomes, not just tasks

• You communicate clearly and proactively

This role requires an executive-level mindset applied to lead generation.

 

WORK SETUP

• Part-time or full-time

• Fixed hours with MST overlap

• Daily check-ins and end-of-day updates required

 

COMPENSATION

• $8–$12/hour depending on experience

Opportunity to grow into a larger role based on performance

 

INSTRUCTIONS 

Step 1: Lead Thinking Test (Required)

Before recording your video: Submit 2-3 real leads you would pursue for Iwacu Flavors. Put them in an accessible Google document and attach it to your application. 



In the document, include the ff:

• Name/company

• Why they are a strong fit

• How would you approach outreach

 

Step 2: Video Submission

Record a short video answering the ff:

1. Introduction: Who you are and your relevant experience

2. Strategy: How would you approach lead generation for Iwacu Flavors? Be specific

3. Communication: What is your favorite food, and how would you describe it in a compelling way?

 

Step 3: Attention Check (Mandatory)

At the start of your video, clearly say:

“Green Mango”

And include this exact phrase in your application subject line.

Applications that do not include this will not be reviewed.

 

Final Note

We are looking for someone who can think, d
, and take ownership. If that’s you, we look forward to seeing your work.

title: Website Designer
description:
We’re a growing U.S.-based marketing agency that helps service-based businesses grow through paid ads, landing pages, websites, funnels, and systems.



We’re looking for a CRO / Website Specialist who is very strong in GoHighLevel and WordPress.



Your main role will be building, editing, improving, and QA-ing websites and landing pages with a strong focus on conversion.



This is not mainly a graphic design role.

This is not mainly a Google Ads management role.



We want someone who is strongest at:

 • building pages in GHL

 • editing and improving sites in WordPress

 • making pages look clean and professional

 • improving mobile responsiveness

 • thinking through layout, flow, CTA placement, and conversion



You do not need to be an advanced Google Ads strategist, but it is a strong bonus if you understand the basics of Google Ads and how landing pages support paid traffic.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who wants to grow with a fast-moving agency and play an important role in helping client campaigns perform better.



(Directions on how to apply are at the bottom of this posting.)



JOB REQUIREMENTS

 • Strong hands-on experience with GoHighLevel

 • Strong hands-on experience with WordPress

 • Experience building and editing websites, landing pages, and funnels

 • Strong eye for layout, spacing, section structure, and mobile optimization

 • Able to build clean, high-converting pages from examples, briefs, or direction

 • Experience with forms, buttons, embeds, calendars, and basic integrations

 • Strong attention to detail and ability to QA your own work

 • Fast and accurate with revisions

 • Comfortable working across multiple client projects

 • Fluent written and spoken English

 • Good communicator

 • Reliable internet and dependable work habits

 • Available full time Monday–Friday



BONUS SKILLS (Nice to Have)

 • Basic to intermediate Google Ads experience

 • Understanding of how landing pages connect to paid traffic

 • Familiarity with conversion tracking

 • Experience with GA4, GTM, pixels, or event setup

 • Understanding of CRO / conversion principles

 • Experience with service business lead generation

 • Ability to spot weak headlines, poor CTA placement, cluttered layouts, or friction points on a page



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

 • Building and editing websites in GoHighLevel and WordPress

 • Creating landing pages for paid traffic campaigns

 • Improving existing pages for better conversion

 • Making sites mobile responsive and clean across devices

 • Setting up forms, calendars, buttons, and page sections

 • Supporting website launches and page updates

 • QA-ing pages before they go live

 • Making ongoing edits and improvements for clients

 • Supporting ad-to-page funnel execution

 • Occasionally assisting with Google Ads-related tasks if you have experience there



IMPORTANT



This role is best for someone who is:

 • very strong in GHL

 • very solid in WordPress

 • interested in conversion-focused page building

 • at least somewhat familiar with Google Ads



We are looking for someone who can help us execute quickly, improve page quality, and support better campaign performance.



HOW TO APPLY

 1.
 us at 

 2. Use this subject line: CRO / Website Specialist – GHL + WordPress

 3. Attach your resume

 4. Include your OnlineJobs.ph profile link

 5. Include links to 3–5 pages or websites you have built or edited in GoHighLevel or WordPress

 6. Include a screenshot of your internet speed. 

 7.  In your
, answer these questions:

- How many years of experience do you have with GoHighLevel?

- How many years of experience do you have with WordPress?

- Which platform are you stronger in: GHL or WordPress?

- Have you built landing pages for paid ads before?

- What do you usually look for when trying to improve a landing page’s conversion rate?

- How much Google Ads experience do you have? (Beginner / Intermediate / Advanced)

 8. Send us a short message here on OnlineJobs.ph letting us know you applied by



We’ll review applications and reply by
 with next steps for qualified candidates.



Thank you and we look forward to hearing from you.

title: React Developer
description:
Arima is developing a privacy-preserving synthetic data generation algorithm to help companies make their data less siloed and more powerful. Together with 21 proprietary data partners, Arima's Synthetic Society is a knowledge base that mirrors the real world and helps companies enrich their 1st party intelligence to build complete customer journeys. We have APIs and a marketing focused business intelligence tool available to help customers easily leverage our datasets, integrate 1st party data in a privacy preserving way, and run analysis and modelling in a few clicks.



We are looking for a React Developer to join our team. You will spend your time developing our web app. If you've got a wide range of skills and like to play, have a real passion for building compelling products, let's talk!



Requirements

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field, or equivalent experience

- Ability to work independently with product leadership to take customer requirements and deliver a high-quality solution

- Strong proficiency in JavaScript, including DOM manipulation and the JavaScript object model

- Thorough understanding of React.js and its core principles

- Experience with popular React.js workflows (such as Context API or Redux)

- Experience with RESTful APIs

- Experience with unit testing

- Knowledge of modern authorization mechanisms, such as JSON Web Token

- Familiarity with modern front-end build pipelines and tools

- Familiarity with common front-end development tools such as Babel, Webpack, NPM, etc.

- Experience with benchmarking and optimization

- Familiarity with code versioning tools (such as Git)



Preferred Qualifications

- Familiarity with newer specifications of EcmaScript

- Familiarity with data structure libraries (e.g., Immutable.js)

- Knowledge of isomorphic React is a plus

- Knowledge of TypeScript

- Previous experience with a full web stack, including protocols and web server optimization techniques



Remote:

This is a full remote role.

title: High-Performance Executive Operator (Data & Operations)
description:
This is not a traditional Executive Assistant role.



We are looking for a high-performance operator who can combine data intelligence with operational execution and work directly alongside a fast-moving, visionary leader.



This role is for someone who can bring structure to data, clarity to decisions, and execution to leadership initiatives.



If you thrive in fast environments, think analytically, and operate with ownership, keep reading.



Who We Are:



DAP Brands is a community of high performers building businesses that create real impact.



Our leadership team moves quickly, thinks strategically, and expects people to take responsibility rather than wait for instructions.



We value:

• Speed

• Accountability

• Emotional maturity

• Precision

• Ownership

Compensation & Growth:



This role offers:



• Competitive compensation aligned with performance

• Direct exposure to executive decision-making

• The opportunity to shape internal systems and operations

• Long-term growth as the company scales



At DAP Brands, we reward impact and ownership, not just tenure.



Final Note



This role is for someone who wants to build, solve, and operate at a high level.

title: Integrations Associate – Automation & Systems
description:
DAP Brands is seeking a detail-oriented, technically savvy, and solution-driven Integrations Associate to support our mission of building seamless, scalable automations across the organization. This role goes beyond task execution. You’ll work closely with our Technology Integration Manager to design, maintain, and optimize workflows that improve efficiency across Sales, Marketing, and Operations.

title: Data Analyst (SQL-Heavy / Systems-Focused)
description:
DAP Brands is looking for a high-ownership, systems-minded Data Analyst who doesn’t just report numbers; they build and maintain the foundation that powers decision-making.



This role is critical as we move toward a centralized PostgreSQL database and cleaner, more reliable data across all teams.



If you’re someone who sees messy, inconsistent data and thinks “this needs structure, validation, and automation”. Keep reading.



What This Role Really Is



You are not just analyzing data.



You are responsible for:

- Structuring it

- Cleaning and validating it

- Standardizing it across systems

- Making it usable and trustworthy



You ensure that when leadership reviews data, it’s accurate, consistent, and ready for decisions.



Key Responsibilities

- Build, manage, and optimize SQL/PostgreSQL databases for centralized data access

- Write efficient, scalable queries for reporting and operational use

- Design and maintain ETL processes to ensure clean and consistent data flow

- Perform data cleaning, validation, and normalization across multiple data sources

- Ensure data integrity, especially across CRM and operational systems

- Identify inconsistencies, duplicates, and structural issues in datasets

- Create and maintain client-level dashboards and reporting systems

- Develop reports that directly support business and operational decisions

- Collaborate with teams to define metrics and improve data tracking

- Proactively improve how data is collected, stored, and used



Non-Negotiables (Must-Have)

- Strong experience with SQL (PostgreSQL preferred)

- Strong proficiency in data cleaning, validation, and normalization

- Advanced skills in Excel / Google Sheets (pivot tables, queries, data modeling)

- Experience with CRM systems (e.g., GoHighLevel, HubSpot) and maintaining data integrity

- Proficiency in programming/scripting (JavaScript, XML, or similar)

- Exceptional analytical and problem-solving skills

close attention to detail

- Proactive mindset and strong ownership



Strong Plus (Will Set You Apart)

- Experience building or managing centralized databases or data warehouses

- Hands-on experience with ETL tools or automation workflows

- Experience with dashboarding tools (Power BI, Tableau, Looker, etc.)

- Experience handling client-level or multi-entity datasets

- Background in operations, marketing, or financial data analysis

- Experience in fast-paced, high-growth environments



What We Actually Need (Read This Carefully)



Most candidates can analyze data.



We are looking for someone who can:

- Ensure data accuracy across systems (not just within one report)

- Build clean, standardized datasets fro
ssy inputs

- Maintain data integrity inside CRMs and operational tools

- Reduce manual work through automation and better structure

- Take ownership of data issues and fix them without being told



Final Note



We move fast.

We expect ownership.

We value people who fix problems before they’re told.



If you’re looking to “analyze data,” this role is not for you. Apply on our website 
/careers and write MAVERICK before your name.



Suppose you want to build the backbone of how a company uses data. We want to talk.

title: YouTube SEO Specialist
description:

title: Python Engineer
description:
Arima is developing a privacy-preserving synthetic data generation algorithm to help companies make their data less siloed and more powerful. Together with 21 proprietary data partners, Arima's Synthetic Society is a knowledge base that mirrors the real world and helps companies enrich their 1st party intelligence to build complete customer journeys. title: BDR (Business Development Representative) — Growth Path to Account Executive
description:
We're building a sales team from the ground up — and you're getting in on the ground floor.

Clear Local Edge is a digital marketing agency that helps local service businesses (plumbers, roofers, electricians, pressure washers) in Southwest Florida show up on Google and get more customers. We use AI-powered tools that do the heavy lifting. Your job is to get business owners on the phone and curious enough to talk to my boss for 15 minutes. That's it.

What you'll do as a BDR:



Call 30-40 local businesses per day from a lead list we provide (no hunting for leads)

Handle the "I'm busy, who is this?" objection and turn it into curiosity

Book qualified prospects onto our calendar for a free strategy session

Log everything in Trello and follow a daily checklist



What you WON'T do:



Close deals (that's Chris's job — for now)

Figure things out on your own (we have scripts, tools, and training ready)

Work without support (you'll have daily check-ins and coaching)



Why this isn't a dead-end gig:

We promote from within. Every person on this team starts where you're starting. How fast you move up depends entirely on you.

Your growth path:

BDR (now) ? BDM (2-4 months — you start closing your own deals + commission) ? Account Executive (6-12 months — dedicated closer, higher base + commission)

Top performers who build the team become Sales Managers and Territory Directors.

We don't hire outside for senior roles. We build from within. If you're the kind of person who follows the system, shows up every day, and wants to grow — this is your shot.

Schedule: Part-time to start, 25 hrs/week. Monday-Friday, 9:00 PM - 2:00 AM Manila time (9 AM - 2 PM US Eastern). Once trained and successful then full-time.

Pay: Up to $7/hour depending on experience. Performance bonuses available.

Requirements:



Strong spoken English (you'll be calling American business owners during their workday)

Cold calling experience — outbound B2B preferred, but any high-volume calling counts

Reliable internet and a quiet place to make calls

Available to start within 1 week



To apply, include ALL of the following in your message:



Subject line: "CLE BDR — [Your Name]"

Your DISC personality profile results (free test: 
/disc)

A 60-second voice recording introducing yourself (use 
 — it's free, no signup)

One paragraph about your cold calling experience and how many calls per day you've handled



Applications missing the voice recording will not be reviewed.

title: AI Content Quality Assurance (QA) Specialist
description:
Overview: We are looking for a detail-oriented AI Content QA Specialist to join our production team. Your primary role is to audit, edit, and finalize AI-generated e-learning course content on the HeyGen platform. This is a post-production role focusing on visual consistency, text accuracy, and audio quality.



Responsibilities:



Content Audit: Review HeyGen projects to identify and remove duplicate or redundant slides.



Copy Editing: Perform text-based edits within the HeyGen platform, specifically replacing flagged keywords (e.g., updating terminology as instructed).



Visual QA: Inspect slide layouts to ensure text is formatted correctly, resizing or adjusting elements that have not rendered properly.



Audio QC: Listen to generated audio for each slide to ensure AI voice quality meets our standards, identifying and flagging and replacing any "robotic" or unnatural-sounding clips.



Finalization: Prepare the project for final export once all edits are complete.



Requirements:



Exceptional attention to detail (this is a high-volume, precision-based role).



Basic experience with AI video tools or content editing platforms (experience with HeyGen is a major plus).



Ability to follow a strict Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) consistently.



Reliable internet connection and ability to listen to audio clearly.

title: Warehouse Implementation Expert Warehouse Implementation Expert
description:
JOB SUMMARY



We are building out an in-house fulfillment warehouse and are seeking a seasoned, overseas-based Warehouse Implementation Expert to lead the design, planning, and build-out of the operation from the ground up. This is a fully remote, project-based engagement — no on-site travel is required.



We need someone with a proven track record of setting up and launching fulfillment warehouses end-to-end: from layout design and slotting strategy through process workflow development, simulation modeling, WMS implementation, and go-live support. Expertise in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central (BC) is essential, as BC will serve as the core platform for our warehouse management operations.



The ideal candidate has done this before — multiple times — and can bring structured methodology, simulation tools, and hard-earned implementation experience to guide our team through every phase of the project. This is a hands-on expert role, not a purely advisory one.



JOB DESCRIPTION



About the Project



We are re-establishing fulfillment in-house for a high-volume eCommerce operation. The scope covers warehouse layout design, workflow engineering, simulation and optimization modeling, WMS selection and implementation within Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central, and assembly/kitting operations. We have an internal warehouse manager and developer who will own execution; we need an expert to architect and guide the entire implementation.



Phase 1 — Discovery & Planning



Conduct a thorough review of our product catalog, SKU mix, order volume, and operational goals

Assess the physical warehouse space via video walk-throughs, floor plans, and provided documentation

Develop a detailed understanding of our eCommerce order flow, fulfillment requirements, and growth projections

Define project scope, implementation phases, key milestones, and success metrics



Phase 2 — Layout Design & Optimization



Design the warehouse layout including receiving, storage, pick/pack, shipping, kitting, and returns zones

Develop slotting strategies optimized for SKU velocity, order profiles, and operational efficiency

Run simulation models to test layout configurations, traffic flow, and throughput under various volume scenarios

Iterate on layout designs based on simulation results to identify the most optimized configuration before any physical build-out begins

Provide clear, documented layout recommendations with supporting simulation data

Phase 3 — Workflow & Process Engineering



Design end-to-end inbound and outbound workflows including receiving, putaway, wave/batch picking, pack, ship, and returns

Engineer assembly and kitting station workflows and integrate them into the broader fulfillment flow

Define SOPs for each warehouse function, built around the BC WMS environment

Identify automation opportunities and recommend equipment or technology to support throughput goals

Phase 4 — WMS Implementation (Business Central)



Lead or guide the configuration of Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central WMS modules to match designed workflows

Evaluate whether native BC WMS functionality is sufficient or whether an ISV add-on (e.g., Tasklet, Warehouse Insight) is required; make a documented recommendation

Define bin structures, zone configurations, directed put-away and pick strategies within BC

Configure wave and batch release rules for high-volume eCommerce picking

Set up assembly order and kitting workflows within BC

Support integration design between BC, the eCommerce platform, and carrier/shipping systems

Work closely with our internal developer to implement, test, and validate BC configurations

Phase 5 — Testing, Simulation & Go-Live



Design and execute pre-go-live simulation runs to stress-test workflows and system configurations

Identify and resolve process gaps and system issues before launch

Develop a go-live playbook and cutover plan

Support the internal team through go-live and initial steady-state operations

Provide post-launch review and optimization recommendations



Engagement Model



100% remote — all collaboration via video calls, screen sharing, simulation tools, and async documentation

Overseas candidates are strongly preferred; global time zone overlap can be discussed

Structured project phases with defined deliverables, milestone check-ins, and documentation handoffs

Close collaboration with our internal warehouse manager and BC developer throughout all phases



QUALIFICATIONS & REQUIREMENTS





Required





Proven experience setting up and implementing fulfillment warehouses from scratch — end-to-end, multiple engagements

Deep expertise in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central WMS — configuration, implementation, and optimization

Experience running warehouse simulations and modeling tools to optimize layout, flow, and throughput before physical implementation

Strong knowledge of high-volume eCommerce fulfillment operations: wave/batch picking, slotting, order profiles, carrier integration

Demonstrated ability to design warehouse layouts, slotting strategies, and operational workflows

Experience working fully remotely on complex implementation projects, with structured deliverables and async communication

Excellent English communication skills (written and spoken) for video collaboration with a US-based team



Strongly Preferred



Assembly order and kitting workflow experience within BC or comparable WMS environments

Experience evaluating and implementing BC ISV WMS add-ons (e.g., Tasklet Mobile WMS, Warehouse Insight, or similar)

Returns management process design and implementation

Experience integrating BC with eCommerce platforms (Shopify, Magento, etc.) and shipping carriers

Familiarity with US-based fulfillment regulations, carrier requirements, and eCommerce logistics standards



What We Are Not Looking For

Candidates who require on-site presence at our facility

Generalist ERP consultants without specific, hands-on warehouse setup and implementation depth

Advisors who can guide but cannot actively implement — we need someone who has done the work, not just overseen it

Candidates without demonstrated Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central WMS experience



If you're interested, please apply using this link

title: Remote Video Editor
description:
We’re looking for a remote video editor to join our team on either a part time or full time basis.



We’re a production studio working across climate, innovation and policy, creating high quality films and content for organisations doing meaningful work in the world. Our work ranges from documentaries and explainers to event coverage and branded content, and we’re looking for an exceptional editor to help raise the bar of our in house output.



This role is for someone with real passion, a strong creative eye, and the ability to make serious topics feel sharp, modern and engaging. We want someone who genuinely cares about what they produce, brings ideas to the table, and wants to make work with substance. A big part of the role is helping us create high quality, dynamic films for clients whose content too often falls into stale corporate visuals.



We’d love someone who is excited to be part of a small, dynamic team looking to make an impact through creative work. We value people with real passion, especially if you also make creative work in your own time. We’re here to grow together.



Requirements:



•?  ?Strong editing experience in Premiere Pro, After Effects and Audition

•?  ?A high end remote set up, including a machine that can comfortably handle high end 4K edits, plus fast and reliable internet

•?  ?A strong portfolio with relevant client work

•?  ?Excellent English and clear communication

•?  ?Able to take initiative, manage projects independently and work without being chased

•?  ?Strong creative judgement and a genuine interest in making impactful work

•?  ?Available to work UK hours, ideally 10am to 6pm with a 1 hour lunch break



Process:

•?  ?No CV needed, just send us a link to your portfolio with relevant work

•?  ?Shortlisted candidates will be invited for a video call

•?  ?We’ll then issue a paid editing test

•?  ?Successful candidates will start on an initial trial basis, with the potential to move into a longer-term full-time role if it’s the right fit



We can’t wait to hear from you! Please do not
 or contact us directly; otherwise, you will not be considered for this role. Please apply through this platform only.

title: Financial Coach - USA
description:
Job Title: Financial Empowerment Coach

Are you passionate about helping others transform their relationship with money?

We are looking for a high-energy, empathetic, and results-driven Financial Coach to join our team. In this role, you won’t just be crunching numbers; you’ll be a mentor, a strategist, and a catalyst for life-changing financial habits.

The ideal candidate blends deep financial literacy with the "soft skills" of behavioral coaching and a natural ability to identify growth opportunities for our clients.

The Role & Responsibilities:

Curriculum Delivery: Facilitate 12 financial courses per year (one per month), per group, 

 guiding groups through core topics like budgeting, debt elimination, and wealth building.  you will have input on tweaking the course structure before the first cohort starts. 

Client Mentorship: Conduct 2 high-impact 1-on-1 interactions per month per client, providing personalized accountability and tailored action plans.

Behavioral Coaching: Help clients identify and overcome the emotional hurdles and "money scripts" that hold them back.

Growth Mindset : Identify clients who would benefit from deeper levels of support or advanced programs, comfortably navigating "upsell" conversations that align with the client’s long-term goals.

What We’re Looking For:

The Educator: You can take complex financial concepts and make them simple, engaging, and actionable for a diverse audience.

The Listener: You have a "coach first" mentality—asking powerful questions rather than just giving directives.

The Closer: You possess a subtle "sales" instinct. You understand that offering additional services isn't just a transaction; it's providing the client with more tools for success.

Financial Fluency: Solid understanding of personal finance fundamentals (credit, cash flow, debt reduction strategies, etc.).

Requirements:

Proven experience in financial coaching, counseling, or a related field (e.g., life coaching with a focus on finance) Accounting teachers can be a contender.

Exceptional communication and presentation skills (virtual and/or in-person).

Comfortable with sales targets or "value-add" performance metrics.



USA - graveyard shifts.

description:

title: Marketing Operations & Project Admin
description:
About the Company

Southwick’s Zoo is New England’s largest zoo, welcoming hundreds of thousands of guests each year. In addition to the Zoo, our marketing department supports Galliford’s Restaurant & Tavern, Daniels Farmstead, and Wild Events, our weddings and private events brand.

Our marketing team manages everything from ticket sales and seasonal events to weddings, festivals, dining, and special experiences across all four brands. This role is part of a fast-paced, creative, and growing department.



About the Role

Southwick’s Zoo is seeking a highly organized Marketing Operations & Project Admin to serve as the operational backbone of our marketing department. This role focuses on keeping projects on track, managing workflows, and ensuring smooth communication across all of our brands.

You will work directly with the Marketing Director and function as both a project manager and administrative partner for the department. Please include the word "Zebra" in your reply to us to show that you read the description fully. 



Key Responsibilities

• Manage all marketing projects using tools such as Trello, 
, or Basecamp

• Build and maintain Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for marketing workflows

• Track deadlines, assign tasks, and follow up with tea
mbers to ensure projects stay on schedule

• Monitor and respond to shared marketing inboxes, drafting and routing
s as needed

• Maintain marketing calendars, meeting schedules, and task timelines

• Schedule meetings, send calendar invites, and track action items

• Provide daily operational support to the Marketing Director

• Organize documents, reports, and project records

• Identify bottlenecks and help improve efficiency across the department



Required Skills & Experience

• Experience in project management, operations, or administrative support

• Strong organizational and time management skills

• Experience using project management software (Trello, 
, Basecamp, etc.)

• Excellent written English and professional communication skills

• High attention to detail and follow-through

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities



Work Requirements

• Fully remote

• Must be available at least 4 hours per day during U.S. Eastern Time (9am–5pm EST)



How to Apply



Please include:

1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your previous admin experience

3. Your availability

4. Resume and Cover Letter

title: Senior Cloud Accountant (Direct Hire / Work from Home)
description:
Please don't apply if you're not an experienced CPA with 5+ years.



Join the team as a Senior cloud accountant at Bean Ninjas USA!



Bean Ninjas USA is on the lookout for enthusiastic and skilled professionals to become part of our expanding team. If you're passionate about cloud accounting and meet the qualifications listed below, we’d love to connect with you!



Filipino candidate must possess the following (Please do not apply if you do not have the following):



~ 5+years of full-time accounting experience within a BPO or similar environment.

- end-to-end bookkeeping experience including preparation of Balance Sheet and Income Statement

~ Proficient in cloud accounting software and platforms.

~ Strong analytical skills with attention to detail.

~ Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.

~ Bachelor's degree in Accounting or related field (preferred)

- Has Xero and/or QuickBooks Online experience



Qualifications for the role:



- Full-time work (Mon-Fri) for our US clients within the Philippines working hours of 8 am to 5 pm.

- We also offer flexibility on the schedule at work once you are familiar with the processes and client work.

- Excellent attention to detail and time management skills.

- Team player who would get along well with the rest of the Bean Ninjas team



Specific Responsibilities



In this role, you will look after management reporting and weekly/monthly transaction processing for a portfolio of Bean Ninjas bookkeeping clients.



Bookkeeping Service Delivery



-Uses Xero and QuickBooks Online

-Uses Xero and QBO add-ons and integrations like Hubdoc, A2X, Receipt Bank, Stripe, and Paypal.

-Responds to client queries via our online
 helpdesk software Helpscout.

-Communicates with other staff via Slack.

-You write well: concise, understandable, helpful, professional, and fast. You can build rapport with others solely through your writing.



Remote work

-You’re self-motivated and ideally, have previous experience working remotely and with little direct supervision.

-You must have an excellent internet connection.

-You know how to keep your computer and work secure and private.

-You know the joys of using two monitors (or splitting a big monitor) to do bookkeeping work.



Who are we?

Bean Ninjas is a bookkeeping and financial reporting business founded on Australia’s Gold Coast in 2015.



We specialize in eCommerce businesses and our mission is to create financial freedom through stress-free business finances for our clients.



We have over 16 Philippine tea
mbers here and we are growing!



What’s it like being part of the Bean Ninjas team?



Career development

We believe in developing our team and promoting internally. You will go through an initial 6-month training program and will then receive ongoing training and mentoring. We prepare individual staff development plans for each tea
mber.



Flexible and remote role

This is a remote role and you will have some level of flexibility in choosing your regular work hours, but must generally be online during Philippine working hours.



Benefits

We offer a variety of benefits from 13th-month pay, birthday vouchers, birthday time off, accrued leaves, and Christmas shutdown leave (where everyone does not need to log in to work for a couple of days during the Christmas shutdown which is usually 5 to 7 working days, yet these days are still paid for by the company!), 6-week maternity leave, remote social activities, and pieces of training and up to date certifications for our accountants on various accounting platforms or integrations.



Bean Ninjas is recognized as an industry leader. You will be working alongside Chartered Accountants and CPAs who have come from firms such as Ernst and Young, BDO, and Grant Thornton.



We won the Xero Australia Bookkeeping Partner of the Year Award in 2019 and the equivalent state award for Queensland in both 2017 and 2019.



Applications can be sent to 
 and include a copy of your resume. Please do not apply if you have no relevant experience or are only looking for a project-based role. Thank you!

title: Patient Intake Coordinator (Spanish Speaking)
description:
I’m looking for a Bilingual Intake Specialist(Spanish) to serve as the primary point of contact for our new and active clients. I need someone who can ensure a seamless onboarding experience and handle the coordination of our services with care. In this role, you’ll focus on building client relationships, monitoring referrals, and tracking authorizations to keep our service delivery efficient and our clients satisfied.



Primary Responsibilities

• Serve as the main contact for new inquiries and current clients, building and maintaining long-term trust.

• Guide clients through the onboarding process and ensure all required documentation is accurately recorded.

• Monitor and manage client referrals across various departments.

• Collaborate with referral sources to maintain strong partnerships and support client acquisition.

• Assess client needs to match them with the right services and clinicians.

• Coordinate schedules, availability, and authorizations while proactively resolving any service barriers.



Other Duties

• Review and manage client authorizations to ensure optimal use of our services.

• Maintain accurate records for our waitlist and authorization tracking.

• Provide regular updates to both clients and our internal teams.

• Act as a liaison between clients and our clinical/administrative departments to support smooth transitions.

• Engage with clients regularly to gauge satisfaction and collect feedback for service improvements.



Qualifications

• Fluency in Spanish is required for this role.

• At least 2 years of relevant intake experience.

• Previous experience working in scheduling or intake departments is required.

• Experience in ABA, Speech Therapy, or Occupational Therapy environments is highly preferred.

• Strong communication skills and the ability to manage complex coordination tasks.



Work Schedule

• You must be available to work Monday through Friday, 8:30 am – 5:30 pm Pacific Time (US).



Apply via:

title: Part-Time AI Optimization VA — Austin Real Estate Operation (Night Shift, CST Hours)
description:
What this role is

I run a commercial real estate operation in Austin, TX (Twelve Rivers Realty, Driftwood Business Center). I've built out an AI-augmented workflow stack — Claude with MCP tools connected to Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Drive, Slack, Canva, Docusign, QuickBooks, and a custom platform called OpenClaw. The infrastructure is already in place. What I need is an operator who lives inside this stack every day and keeps the machine running.

This is not a generalist VA role. I am not looking for someone to schedule meetings and send invoices. I'm looking for an AI-native operator who can run prompts, iterate outputs, and turn raw inputs (my weekly Instagram Live show,
s, listing photos) into finished deliverables across multiple platforms.

What you'll actually do



Take each week's "12:00 at 12 Rivers" Instagram Live episode and turn it into: a LinkedIn article, a newsletter draft, 3–5 social posts, and a Reels script with captions.

Triage my Gmail inbox using Claude-based workflows. Draft responses. Flag anything that needs my eyes.

Prep listing launch packages: HTML
, PDF flyer, social captions, and coordinate with my photographer and agent colleagues.

Run Canva designs (templates provided) for flyers, social graphics, and one-pagers.

Tune prompts when outputs drift. Tell me what's working and what isn't.

Help test and refine workflows in OpenClaw, Claude Projects, and connected MCP tools as we build them out.



Must-have



Native-level written English. This will be tested.

Demonstrated prompt-iteration experience with Claude, ChatGPT, or Gemini. You must be able to show a before/after where you tuned a prompt to fix an output.

Willing and able to work a night shift on CST hours (11pm–3am Manila) long-term. I pay a premium for this. Do not apply if you cannot keep this schedule consistently.

Fast and fluent with Gmail, Google Drive, Slack, and Canva.

Reliable internet and a quiet workspace for occasional Zoom/Slack huddles.



Nice to have (not required, but will move you to the top of the pile)



Real estate or US commercial real estate familiarity.

Experience with MCP servers, Claude Projects, Claude Code, or custom AI integrations.

Short-form video editing (CapCut, Descript, Premiere).

Base44, Lovable, or other no-code / vibe-coding app experience.

Copywriting for LinkedIn or real estate newsletters.



Compensation details





Paid weekly via Wise, Payoneer, or direct deposit (your preference)

Performance bonuses for ongoing quality and speed

13th-month consideration after 6 months of consistent performance

Opportunity to expand to full-time if the fit is strong

title: Full Time Dispatcher
description:
About the Role



We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Dispatcher with a positive attitude and excellent communication skills. The ideal candidate will have expertise in load negotiation, scheduling, and route planning, while adhering to DOT and ELD regulations.



Vehicles Being Dispatched



26-Foot Box Trucks (10,000 lb weight capacity) – Dock-high with lift gate

Sprinter Vans / Cargo Vans / Ram ProMaster (High Roof)



About Us



Eveready Express is a well-established leader in the trucking, courier, logistics, and distribution industries, founded in 1984. We pride ourselves on honesty, integrity, and mutual respect.



Key Responsibilities

Dispatching Vehicles



Negotiate rates with drivers while aiming for a minimum 40% margin, and assign vehicles to specific routes and deliveries based on customer orders, schedules, and driver availability.



Communication with Drivers



Maintain constant communication with drivers by providing instructions, updates, and support throughout their routes.



Routing and Scheduling



Plan efficient routes to minimize travel time, fuel costs, and vehicle wear. Adjust schedules as needed to accommodate changes or unexpected events.



Tracking Shipments



Monitor shipments in real time using tracking systems and GPS technology. Address delays or issues as they arise.



Customer Interaction



Serve as the primary point of contact for customers after dispatch, providing delivery updates, addressing inquiries, and resolving concerns or complaints promptly.



Documentation



Maintain accurate records of trucking activities, including driver logs, delivery schedules, and customer communications. Ensure compliance with company policies and regulations (e.g., BOL, POD).



Problem-Solving



Resolve logistical problems or emergencies such as vehicle breakdowns, traffic delays, or adverse weather conditions.



Safety Compliance



Ensure trucks and drivers comply with safety regulations and company policies. Regularly verify driver credentials, vehicle maintenance, and adherence to transportation laws in collaboration with HR.



Team Collaboration



Work closely with Customer Service, Fleet Drivers, Billing, Sales, HR, and Warehouse staff to coordinate operations and improve efficiency.



Continuous Improvement



Identify and suggest improvements to dispatching processes, customer satisfaction, and operational efficiency. Offer feedback and innovative solutions to the management team.



Working on Load Boards



Bid on Sylectus, DAT, Amazon Relay, and other broker platforms during the off-peak season.



Qualifications



• At least 2 years of experience in the U.S. logistics industry, with proven experience in dispatching, logistics coordination, or transportation management.



• Strong verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to effectively interact with drivers, customers, and tea
mbers.



• Excellent organizational and multitasking skills, with strong attention to detail and the ability to prioritize tasks in a fast-paced environment.



• Proficiency in dispatching software, GPS systems, and other relevant technology tools.



• Knowledge of transportation regulations, safety procedures, and industry best practices.



• Ability to remain calm under pressure, with a problem-solving mindset and flexibility to adapt to changing circumstances.



• Availability to work irregular hours, including evenings, weekends, and holidays, to ensure 24/7 coverage.



Hardware & Technical Requirements



• Processor: 2.0 GHz or higher (Intel Core i5/i7 preferred)

• RAM: Minimum 8 GB

• Disk Space: 100 GB of free space

• A second monitor for multitasking

• Backup computer

• Noise-canceling headset

• Internet: Minimum 10 Mbps wired connection for both primary and backup ISPs

• USB sticks are not allowed for backup ISP connections



Perks of the Job



• Competitive weekly salary

• Opportunity to receive HMO benefits

• Opportunities for advancement within the company



To Apply



Please send an
 with the subject line:



“I want to dispatch for Eveready”



to 



Your
 must include:



• A voice recording (via Speakpipe or Vocaroo) explaining why you are a good fit for the role

• A PDF copy of your resume

• A photo of your workstation

• A screenshot of your internet speed test from speedtest.net



Please follow all instructions above. Only applicants who demonstrate genuine interest in the role will be considered.



If selected, you will be invited to a brief
 or Google Meet interview, which will require a video call.



Equal Opportunity Employer



Eveready Express is an Equal Opportunity Employer and does not discriminate based on race, religion, color, disability, medical condition, genetic information, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, marital status, gender identity or expression, sex (including pregnancy), age, veteran status, or other legally protected characteristics.



We are committed to fostering a culture of diversity, equity, and inclusion.



Note



Eveready Express reserves the right to modify job duties and assignments at any time. The job description provided is not all-encompassing and may change depending on business needs.

title: Senior Google Ads Specialist (High-Budget Campaigns)
description:
We are looking for a skilled Google Ads Specialist who has hands-on experience managing large monthly advertising budgets and can consistently deliver strong, data-driven results.



Key Responsibilities

Manage and scale Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, Shopping)

Optimize performance based on CPA, ROAS, and conversions

Control and allocate budgets effectively to maximize ROI

Continuously test and improve campaign performance

 Requirements

Proven experience managing high monthly ad budgets

Strong knowledge of optimization and scaling strategies

Data-driven mindset with measurable results

Ability to work independently and deliver consistent performance

 Application Requirements (Mandatory)



Please include in your application:



Your recent monthly ad budget managed

Campaign types you specialize in (Search / Display / Shopping)

At least one real campaign result (CPA / ROAS / conversions)



 Applications without real numbers will not be considered.



How to Apply



Send your CV + required details to:





Subject:

[Google Ads Specialist] – Your Full Name

title: Operations & Sales Support Specialist
description:
Schedule: Full-time, 40–50 hours/week 



Hours: Fixed schedule — 8:00 AM–4:00 PM PST or 9:00 AM–5:00 PM PST, Monday–Friday 



Location: Remote (PST hours required) 



Overview 

We are seeking a highly capable Operations & Sales Support Specialist to support daily operations, customer communication, and project-based assignments. This role requires strong communication skills, excellent organization, and the ability to manage both repetitive and non-repetitive tasks with minimal supervision. Only strong English communication (written/spoken) candidates will be considered 



Responsibilities 



Operations & Administrative Support (50%) 



Manage purchase orders, imports, logistics follow-up, and vendor communication 



Maintain compliance records and organize internal documents 



Support daily operational workflows and integrate with internal departments 



Assist with receiving, cost updates, and order tracking 





Project-Based & Ad Hoc Assignments (30%) 



Help with insurance renewals, recruitment, sourcing, and compliance projects 



Support process improvements and system updates 



Handle time-sensitive special tasks requiring independent follow-up 





Sales Support & Communication (20%) 



Respond to customer and vendor inquiries via
 and phone 



Prepare sales documents, quotations, and follow-up communications 



Assist with coordinating sales-related tasks and maintaining documentation 

 



Qualifications 



Experience in operations, administration, or sales support 



Excellent written and verbal communication 



Ability to explain tasks and responsibilities clearly 



Work with QuickBooks, ConnectBooks, RingCentral, Microsoft Office/Excel 



Strong organization and ability to handle multiple priorities 



Independent problem-solver with initiative and follow-through 



Analytical background (education or work experience) preferred but not required 



Strong English communication (written/spoken) 



 



Schedule Requirements 



Full-time, Monday–Friday 



Must work either 8:00 AM–4:00 PM PST or 9:00 AM–5:00 PM PST 



No flexi-time or alternative schedules 



Must be fully available during PST business hours 



Minimum 8 years of professional work experience 





Please attach your resume.

title: Landscape Architect
description:
We are seeking a talented and detail-oriented Licensed Landscape Architect with at least 5 years of experience to join our design team. The ideal candidate will blend technical precision with creative flair, overseeing the development of comprehensive site plans that integrate complex hardscape features, aquatic elements, and regional horticulture.



This role requires a professional who is as comfortable navigating government zoning regulations as they are designing a custom fountain or selecting the perfect palette of Florida-native vegetation. You will be responsible for managing projects from initial concept through detailed construction documentation, ensuring every design is both beautiful and buildable.



Position Requirements:



* Degree in Landscape Architecture

* In-depth experience designing and preparing site plans and landscape/hardscape plans

* Ability to review and apply government regulations

* Knowledge and experience with hardscape and construction details

* Experience with hardscape materials, pools, and fountain design

* Knowledge of Florida vegetation and growing conditions

* Strong AutoCAD, Microsoft (Word and Excel) skills

* Working knowledge of graphic software programs (Adobe Photoshop, Sketchup, and

PowerPoint)

* Ability to manage multiple priorities

* Work samples

* Positive attitude and Proven ability to meet rigid project deadlines.

* Minimum Experience: 5 years

* Minimum Education Level: Bachelor’s Degree

* Required Major: Landscape Architecture





Desired Qualifications:

* Self-motivated

* Detail oriented

* Freehand illustration and rendering skills

* Good communication and verbal presentation skills

title: Administrative & Project Support
description:

The top priority of this role is administrative excellence — someone who thrives on

organization, polish, deadlines, and follow-through. This VA will manage post-meeting

action items, prepare and format documents, coordinate agreements, and ensure projects

move forward without bottlenecks.



Secondary responsibilities include grant proposal support, WordPress updates, and light

social media execution, including LinkedIn and Canva-based assets.

If you love turning messy notes into clean deliverables and making sure nothing falls

through the cracks, this role is for you.





Primary Responsibilities:

1. Administrative & Executive Support (Top Priority)

* Write and refine scopes of work based on client conversations

 coordination

2. Project & Task Management

* Track action items coming out of meetings

4. Website & Content Support

5. Light Social Media & Design Support

* Create or update simple graphics using Canva

* Maintain brand consistency across visuals and posts



Required Skills & Experience:

* Strong administrative and executive support experience

* Excellent document creation, formatting, and polishing skills

* Experience drafting or managing agreements and scopes of work

* Project and task management experience

* Highly detail-oriented with strong follow-through

* Excellent written English communication

* Canva experience

* Organized, proactive, and dependable



Preferred (Nice-to-Have) Skills

* Social media scheduling tools experience

title: Legal Administrative Assitant
description:
We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Legal Administrative Assistant to support a busy law firm with essential administrative and legal tasks. The ideal candidate will have experience in legal billing, document management, calendaring, and client file organization. This role requires strong attention to detail, the ability to track deadlines, and familiarity with legal procedures. Experience with Timeslips, Westlaw, and legal calendaring systems is highly desirable. The candidate must be proactive, tech-savvy, and capable of handling confidential information with discretion.





Required Skills:

* Strong administrative skills with experience in legal billing and documentation.

* Proficiency in Timeslips for billing attorney time, cost logs, and research expenses.

* Ability to organize and maintain client case files digitally, including scanning and labeling exhibits.

* Expertise in calendaring legal deadlines, hearings, depositions, and trial schedules.

* Ability to track upcoming deadlines and send timely reminders to attorneys.

* Experience with scheduling hearings and coordinating with the court.

* Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook, and Adobe Acrobat).

* Ability to transcribe dictation and draft correspondence on law firm letterhead.

* Research skills, including running TLO people searches and retrieving information from Westlaw.

* Excellent organizational and time-management skills.

* Strong communication skills, both written and verbal.

* High level of confidentiality and professionalism when handling legal documents.





Experience & Qualifications:

* 2+ years of experience in a law firm or legal environment preferred.

* Experience with billing software such as Timeslips is strongly preferred.

* Familiarity with court filing procedures and case deadlines.

* Experience handling confidential legal documents and maintaining compliance with firm policies.

* Prior experience in exhibit preparation and trial/hearing file organization is a plus.

* Strong ability to work independently and remotely with minimal supervision.

* Prior experience in dictation/transcription is a plus.

title: Restaurant Operations Monitoring Specialist
description:
Job Summary:

The Video Surveillance Analyst is responsible for monitoring daily camera footage across restaurant locations to ensure compliance with company policies, operational standards, and security procedures. This role involves identifying irregular activities, documenting i
, and providing daily reports with video evidence and actionable insights to management.



Key Responsibilities:



Monitor CCTV footage daily to detect and report operational and security violations

Identify and report any instances where cash drawers are opened without a corresponding bill being printed

Flag unauthorized removal of cash from registers or drawers

Observe and report employees not adhering to uniform policies

Detect and document staff using personal cell phones during working hours

Monitor and report employees consuming food in unauthorized areas

Ensure staff remain in their assigned workstations and report deviations

Identify any products being handed to customers without proper billing

Track and report any unauthorized movement of products from storage or back-of-house areas

Compile and submit detailed daily reports including timestamps, descriptions, and attached video clips for each i

Maintain confidentiality and integrity of all surveillance data

title: FULFILLMENT COORDINATOR - Supply chain management (E-commerce)
description:
FULFILLMENT & INVENTORY COORDINATOR



We are looking for a strong, highly capable Fulfillment & Inventory Coordinator who can take full control of inventory flow, supplier coordination, and fulfillment execution.



This is not a passive role. We need someone who is authoritative, proactive, and highly competent — someone who can lead conversations, solve problems fast, and make sure operations run smoothly at all times.



You don’t wait for issues to happen. You prevent them.



-Requirements (Strict)-

At least 2 years of experience as a Fulfillment Coordinator, Inventory Coordinator, Supply Chain Coordinator, or similar role

Proven experience managing inventory flow, stock levels, and fulfillment operations

Experience communicating and collaborating with Chinese warehouses or suppliers

Strong advantage if you have experience working with warehouses in Shenzhen, China

Strong background in inventory forecasting, demand planning, and stock management

Excellent communication skills with the ability to be clear, firm, and authoritative

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Strong problem-solving and decision-making skills

Fast thinker who can act under pressure

Takes full ownership of results, especially stock availability and fulfillment efficiency

Mandarin speaking is a strong BONUS



-Responsibilities-

Manage inventory flow and stock levels across all SKUs

Forecast demand and prevent stock shortages before they happen

Coordinate with warehouses, suppliers, and logistics partners

Handle procurement and replenishment decisions

Track shipments and proactively resolve delays or risks

Oversee order scrubbing and fulfillment coordination

Prepare shipment documentation and declarations

Act as the main point of contact for warehouse and supplier communication

Ensure smooth fulfillment operations with minimal errors or delays

Maintain strong control over inventory performance and execution



-Weekly Output Expectations-

Report SKUs at risk of going out of stock

Identify delayed or at-risk shipments

Provide actions taken to resolve issues

Present a clear execution plan for the following week



If you are someone who thrives in operations, takes ownership, and knows how to keep inventory and fulfillment under control, we’d love to hear from you.



Excited to see your application! Please send your resume link , intro video (If available) and relevant experience.

title: EO & Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) Strategist
description:
About Us

We are at the forefront of the search revolution. As a leading GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) agency, we help global enterprises and high-growth SaaS brands move beyond traditional rankings to become the default answers provided by AI engines like ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and Claude.



The Role

We are seeking a high-level SEO Expert for a long-term freelance partnership. This isn't a traditional "backlink and keyword" role—it’s about defining how brands exist within the AI ecosystem.



We are looking for a dedicated partner to start at 50?pacity (approx. 20 hours/week) with a focus on long-term collaboration. As we scale, your role and capacity can grow with us.



The Mission: Building the "Trust Stack"

In this role, you will move past standard optimization to build a brand’s E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, and Trustworthiness) so convincingly that AI models cite them as the definitive source.



Key Responsibilities

GEO Integration: Develop and execute strategies that ensure client content is captured, understood, and prioritized by Large Language Models (LLMs).



Authority Architecture: Optimize for E-E-A-T by auditing brand signals, creator credentials, and external citations.



Technical SEO: Maintain the foundational health of client sites to ensure seamless data extraction for both crawlers and AI agents.



Strategic Optimization: Move beyond keyword density to focus on "intent-matching" and "answer-engine" visibility.



Performance Analytics: Pioneer new ways to measure brand "share of voice" within AI-generated responses.



Requirements

Expert-Level SEO Background: You have a deep understanding of how search has evolved over the last decade.



Strategic Mindset: You don't just follow checklists; you "walk the talk" by staying ahead of industry shifts and AI developments.



LLM Curiosity: You are actively experimenting with how AI tools retrieve and present information.



Commitment: We need someone who wants to be an integral part of our team for the long run, not just a one-off project.



Position Details

Model: Freelance / Contractor.



Capacity: (50% time).



Location: Remote.

mber who can confidently manage clients from intake through treatment and case progression to resolution.

title: Real Estate Disposition Sales Specialist (Remote)
description:
LOCATION: Remote (Company based in Georgia; operates in GA & SC). Open to applicants outside the U.S.

COMPANY: HBI HOME SOLUTIONS, LLC

POSITION TYPE: FULL-TIME

Compensation: $6-$10/hr + commission on closed deals -> Total earning: $1,000 – $4,000 per month.



JOB DESCRIPTION:

We’re a high-performing U.S.-based real estate investment company that closes 100+ deals per year. We’re looking for a Real Estate Disposition Sales Specialist to help match our investment property inventory with active buyers. You’ll join a remote-first team that moves fast, celebrates wins, and offers long-term growth for the right individual.

This is a great fit for remote professionals or U.S. expats living abroad who want a full-time role with consistent deals, structured sales training, and a career pathway in the real estate industry.



OUR COMPANY:

We’re a real estate wholesaling company with main markets in GA & SC with a focus on acquiring deals from Real Estate Agents. We transact about 80-100 deals a year with gross revenue of $1.8M+/year. You can learn more about us and our model through these two podcast videos on Youtube:







Responsibilities

• Market off-market and exclusive investment properties to a curated list of investor-buyers

• Build and maintain strong relationships with new and existing buyers

• Negotiate sale prices, contract terms, and closing timelines with buyers

• Manage leads and daily outreach using CRM tools (40–50 contacts per day expected)

• Track activity, buyer feedback, and pipeline updates consistently

• Coordinate with internal teams to ensure clean and fast closings



Minimum Qualifications

• Fluent in English with minimal accent, capable of clear and effective communication.

• Must be able to work minimum 8-hour shift on US Eastern time zone (8-10 AM EST to 5-7 PM EST).

• 6+ months of experience in real estate sales (ideally with wholesaling companies)

s) at high volume

Preferred Skills

• Experience working with real estate investors and understanding investment buying criteria

• Experience in high ticket sales or negotiation against other parties to maximize profit

• Very competitive base pay + commission structure

title: Estimator (Residential Construction – Australia)
description:
We are seeking an experienced Estimator to support residential construction projects in Australia. This role focuses on accurate quantity takeoffs, structured cost estimating, and supporting tender submissions in a deadline-driven environment.



Role Overview



The Estimator will be responsible for reviewing tender documents, performing detailed takeoffs, and preparing accurate cost estimates for residential projects. This role requires strong attention to detail, the ability to manage multiple tenders, and familiarity with Australian construction standards.



Key Responsibilities

- Review tender documents, drawings, and specifications to define scope of work

- Perform accurate quantity takeoffs and prepare Bills of Quantities (BOQ)

- Develop detailed cost estimates for residential construction projects

- Coordinate with subcontractors and suppliers to obtain competitive pricing

- Review and validate quotations for completeness and accuracy

- Support preparation and submission of tenders and client proposals

- Manage multiple tenders and deadlines concurrently



Skills & Qualifications

- Strong ability to read and interpret architectural, structural, civil, and landscaping drawings

- Proven experience in quantity takeoff and cost estimating

- Minimum 3 years experience as an Estimator within the Australian construction industry, with residential project exposure

- High level of accuracy and attention to detail

- Proficiency in estimating software such as Bluebeam, PlanSwift, CostX, or Buildsoft Cubit (Cubit preferred)

- Ability to work independently and manage workload effectively



Application Requirement

Instead of a live test, candidates are required to submit a sample takeoff or estimate they have previously completed, preferably within the carpentry trade.
